Name: Sunon Furniture
Description:
Sunon is a workspace solution provider specializing in modular office furniture. With an eye for efficiency, comfort, and wellbeing, we started our journey in 1991. After years of learning and development, we are now a leading company in the industry and are striving to expand our presence worldwide. 

We provide people-centric products to our clients for sheer working pleasure. As an expert in the office furniture industry, we seek an innovative and intelligent way to perfect our products for your needs.

Gathering global design elites, and together with our manufacturing strength, we aim to create productive workspaces, be it for work, meeting, training, or leisure.

We design to help you work better.

Name: ACTIU
Description:
Actiu is a Spanish company located in the Foia de Castalla (Alicante), with more than 50 years of experience enhancing the wellbeing of people through the design and manufacture of furniture for work spaces, collective environments and contract areas.

Our continuous investment in technology; a sustainable growth committed to this country; the integration of design in all processes and the internationalization of the company are some of the keys to our presence in 90 countries of the five continents.

Our brand potential and local infrastructure located in each area enables actiu and our strategic partners to centralise a process based on the analysis and management of the project needs. Our aim is to maximise the use of resources in order to offer our customers the best result.

Name: KI
Description:
KI is a global leader in innovative furniture solutions for education, healthcare, government, and corporate spaces. Headquartered in Green Bay, WI, KI is an employee-owned company with a dedicated presence across the US, Canada, Latin America, Europe, and Asia.

At KI, we specialize in tailoring furniture and service solutions to meet the unique needs of every customer. Our distinct design and manufacturing approach ensures flexibility, efficiency, and exceptional results. Since 1941, we’ve been the trusted experts in creating adaptable and forward-thinking products that empower success in our core markets.

With our customer-first philosophy and unique Go-To-Market strategy, we make it easy for clients to procure solutions that perfectly align with their goals. At KI, we don’t just craft furniture — we deliver knowledge and partnership to help transform environments into thriving spaces.

Name: Salam Enterprises
Description:
Salam Enterprises is a proud member of the Salam International family. As a leading, regional, turnkey corporate interior solutions provider, we have inherited a rich legacy from our parent company Salam International Investments Limited.

With Salam International Investment Limited (SIIL), being a listed public Qatari shareholding company with operations in diverse business sectors representing technology and communications, construction and development, luxury and consumer products, energy and industry, and investments and real estate, we are especially proud to reflect a facet of SIIL’s construction and development sector. 

By being part of SIIL, one of Qatar’s largest and established conglomerates, which owns and manages over thirty five business units across the Middle Eastern region, we share in a rich heritage, of over half a century; built on a benchmark for integrity, innovation, reliability and total customer satisfaction. 

Salam Enterprises since 1996, has established an enviable reputation across the region as a leading corporate interior solutions provider and innovator through our operations in Doha, Dubai, Abu Dhabi and Manama. Our regional expansion began in Qatar, moving onto Dubai in 2000, Abu Dhabi 2004 and Bahrain in 2007.

Name: AFC Furniture Solutions
Description:
At AFC Furniture Solutions, we believe change is not just inevitable, it’s essential. With our all-new brand identity, we are embracing the future with boldness, clarity, and purpose.

For 17 years, we’ve been shaping workspaces that inspire productivity, foster collaboration, and prioritize well-being. Today, as All For Change, we stand at the forefront of modular office furniture solutions—where design meets sustainability, and innovation meets trust.

What We Do

Workspace Solutions – Modular workstations, collaborative pods, ergonomic chairs, and smart storage that adapt to evolving needs.

Craftsmanship at Scale – State-of-the-art manufacturing units with advanced technology and in-house testing labs.

Sustainable Impact – Circular design, recyclable materials, and ESG practices to build greener work environments.

Human-Centric Approach – Designs that balance comfort, flexibility, and inclusivity.

Why AFC?

We’re more than a furniture company, we are partners in creating spaces that empower people. From startups to global enterprises, we deliver solutions that blend design excellence, reliability, and responsibility.

With presence across India and growing global footprints, AFC is building a new chapter, where every workspace tells a story of transformation.

AFC – All For Change. All For You.

Name: Nowy Styl
Description:
Nowy Styl is a European leader in comprehensive furniture solutions for office and public spaces. Every day we equip new office buildings, conference centres, cinemas, stadiums, music halls, sports and multifunctional facilities. Our list of references includes multinational companies such as DS Smith, Honeywell, Deloitte and ABB, cultural institutions such as Polish National Radio Symphony Orchestra in Katowice and the Opera in Munich, as well as stadiums and passenger terminals all around the world. 

Our company portfolio consists of brands: 
Nowy Styl, Kusch+Co, SOHOS, Forum by Nowy Styl.      

Our furniture solutions are presented in 29 showrooms located in biggest European cities like London, Paris, Berlin, Prague, Bratislava and many more.
http://www.nowystyl.com

Name: FANTONI Spa
Description: Fantoni Group, a major Italian and international corporation, a journey begun in 1882, carried on and headed by the Fantoni family, through five generations, within a constantly growing industrial group. The Group is lead producer of chipboard and MDF panels, laminates and melamine papers and key player on the office furniture and sound absorption systems scene.

Name: Davis Furniture
Description: Davis offers a wide variety of contemporary business furniture for the corporate, hospitality, and healthcare environments. Our products represent some of the best award-winning designs in the industry and offer superb quality and value. As a 78-year-old, family-owned company, there is true craftsmanship that goes into every product, making available cutting edge designs that not only offer the best in function, but add quality and aesthetics to the business environment.

Name: Kokuyo India
Description:
Kokuyo Workplace India Limited is part of the Kokuyo Group, a global leader in office furniture and stationery, headquartered in Osaka, Japan. Our brands, namely Camlin, Lamex, ACTUS, ESTIC, and Formax, are among the strongest, most widely known, and respected in the industry. Kokuyo’s product offering covers all spaces in an office that include workstations, seating solutions, collaborative furniture, and a wide range of private offices and conference room solutions.

We understand great workplace design must factor in often conflicting needs and expectations from diverse stakeholders. Our collaborative design approach harmoniously cuts through the conflicts and enables us in creating Happy Workplaces - customized for every client. We believe in early client engagement & work towards a deeper understanding of the client’s requirements. Our state of the art in-country manufacturing facilities (Japan, Malaysia, China & India), backed by strong design engineering teams, are constantly innovating to bring the best of Kokuyo’s global designs custom-made for that market. 

Our dedicated installation and after sales service teams reach out to you through a wide network of showrooms and dealers spread across all major cities in the world. This dependable infrastructure enables us to go the extra mile for every client. As a team, we ensure 100% transparency and give full visibility to the client at all stages of the engagement. 

At the core of our business strategy, we believe we are “In India for India”, the only global office furniture manufacturer to have a manufacturing footprint of over 350,000 sq. ft. which uniquely positions us to serve both our Indian as well as Global clients on projects of any size and scale.  National in the true sense, we have showrooms and offices spread across the country. Our wide network of offices and dealers allows us to supply to the smallest of towns in the remotest locations.

Name: HNI India
Description:
HNI is one of the leading office furniture manufacturers in the world, headquartered in Iowa, USA. Our brands namely, Allsteel, HBF, HON, Gunlocke and HNI India are among the strongest, most widely known and respected in the industry. HNI’s product offering covers all spaces in an office that includes workstations, seating solutions, collaborative furniture and wide range of private offices and conference room solutions.
We understand great workplace design must factor in often conflicting needs and expectations from diverse stakeholders. Our collaborative design approach harmoniously cuts through the conflicts and enables us in creating Happy Workplaces - customized for every client. We believe in early client engagement & work towards deeper understanding of client’s requirements. Our state of the art in-country manufacturing facilities (USA, China & India) backed by strong design engineering teams are constantly innovating to bring the best of HNI’s global designs custom made for that market. Our dedicated installation and after sales service teams reach out to you through a wide network of showrooms and dealers spread across all major cities in the world. This dependable infrastructure enables us to go the extra mile for every client. As a team we ensure 100% transparency and give full visibility to client at all stages of the engagement. 

At the core of our business strategy we believe we are “In India for India”, the only global office furniture manufacturer to have a manufacturing footprint of over 350,000 sq. ft. which uniquely positions us to serve both our Indian as well as Global clients on projects of any size and scale.  National in true sense, we have showrooms and offices spread across the country. Our wide network of offices and dealers allows us to supply to the smallest of towns in the remotest locations.

Name: Rockworth International
Description:
Rockworth is Asia’s leading manufacturer of quality Office Systems Furniture.  We were established 49 years ago to meet the emerging demands of companies in need of specialist design and superior quality in office systems furniture.

Our group of companies today has more than 1,200 dedicated employees and serves clients through a regional network of authorized dealers in 27 different countries.

Most importantly, Rockworth is about people. Rockworth products are designed to create workspaces that enhance businesses by supporting people to access their best work.

Rockworth studies how people work, to fully understand the ever-changing needs of individuals, teams and organizations.

That also means designing office furniture and systems that accommodate the new and changing technologies – with the minimum of disruption.
Everything in the workplace must work in harmony and adapt to constant change. 

This is achieved through the versatility of the product, innovative design that is flexible in concept to meet a variety of installation needs.

Our goal is to help people to work more efficiently in an environment that inspires the mind and relaxes the body. So the company strives to understand the fundamentals of work. 

This philosophy has become Rockworth’s business goal: To produce office systems furniture that helps people discover their true potential. 

We understand that a successful organization requires a harmonious integration among people, facilities and technology to achieve the mission of the organization 

Rockworth is determined to become an expert in the three dimensions of a workplace, under the concepts of: Human, Space and Technology.

Whatever your need in Office Systems Furniture, Rockworth is dedicated 
to meeting your challenge.

Name: Zenith Interiors Pty Ltd
Description:
We believe that people need to feel inspired and motivated by their work environment - to focus, collaborate, socialise and feel part of a community. We enable organisations to create a modern working environment that reflect their core values and culture.

To capture the relevance of this leadership role, we’ve redeveloped our brand to articulate that we are “Curators of the Modern Workspace”.

Name: Connection
Description:
Part of the Flokk house of brands, Connection design & manufacture commercial furniture to create Space that Works.

Our business has significantly evolved since we first started manufacturing task chairs in 1997 and we now design & manufacturer high quality and intelligent products that add value in the modern workplace. Today we work with clients & partners in over 50 countries worldwide.

We specialise in understanding emerging work and learning styles and deploy this insight into our product’s design & purpose. Our insight is further enriched through collaboration with some of the UK’s leading workplace consultants, designers and trend forecasters to create innovative product & space solutions. 

We know what it takes to create inspirational environments and we understand the ever-changing needs of users within that space. Whether you’re an architect, designer, contract specifier or dealer, we can deliver the right products and services to deliver a Space that Works.

Have a look at our latest case studies on our website, you’ll see a range of successful engagements from agile office settings to large-scale education projects and everything in between.

Made In Britain

Name: Atmosphere Commercial Interiors
Description: Atmosphere Commercial Interiors is one of the largest office furniture dealerships in the US, providing office furniture for corporate, healthcare, education, and hospitality environments for domestic and international clients. We provide office furniture from Steelcase and hundreds of other vendors, plus a comprehensive menu of services, which ensures our client's expectations are met, on-time and on budget.  We partner with clients to deliver beautiful spaces, unleash workplace potential, and increase employee engagement and wellbeing.

Name: BAFCO
Description:
For over 30 years, BAFCO has been the premier choice for sophisticated office furniture solutions across the GCC. Since our inception in 1991, we have built a distinguished reputation for crafting innovative and functional workplace environments.

With a team of 300+ professionals, a cutting-edge 180,000 sq. ft. manufacturing facility in Dubai Industrial City, and a 200,000 sq. ft. warehouse for swift GCC-wide deliveries, BAFCO is equipped to meet the highest standards of quality and efficiency. Our Dubai and Abu Dhabi showrooms, featuring both UAE-made desking and seating solutions, as well as renowned international brands like Humanscale, Kano, BOS Barcelona, and Koplus, reflect our commitment to excellence.

Beyond furniture, our expertise encompasses Turnkey Fit-out, Design & Build Interiors, and Project Management services, allowing us to deliver over 1,000 interior projects each year with unparalleled precision and care.

𝑺𝒑𝒆𝒄𝒊𝒂𝒍𝒕𝒊𝒆𝒔

 Expert Turnkey Fit-out and Design & Build Interiors services
 Comprehensive Project Management and Consultancy for modern workplaces
 Premier Distribution: Exclusive brands like Humanscale, Kano, BOS Barcelona, Uchida, Koplus, DAS, Narbutas, EFG, and About Office.

Name: Riccó Office Furniture
Office Inspirations
Description:
At Office Inspirations we believe inspiring environments provide greater stimulation for the mind, leading to better ideas and higher aspirations!
 
We provide quality Furniture, Design Services, Technology, Partitions, Lighting, and Flooring & Fabric solutions for all types of workplaces such as: Commercial, Education, Healthcare, Hospitality.

Name: Pivot Interiors
Description:
Discover Pivot Interiors. We are a distinguished team of innovators, creators, and thought leaders dedicated to crafting exceptional interior solutions for businesses of all sizes. Our designs not only embody your brand but also inspire employees to thrive, create, and collaborate in the workplace. 

California born and raised, we are proudly headquartered in the Bay Area, serving clients statewide. With offices and Design Centers in Santa Clara, Fremont, San Francisco, Costa Mesa, Los Angeles, and La Mirada, we invite you to explore our spaces and experience the Pivot Interiors difference.

Name: Monarch Ergo
Description:
Monarch Ergo is born with the idea of Creating Workspace solutions suited for businesses and their people, polished to the point of perfection. Founded in 1996 to create more than just Office Furniture and to redefine what Workspace design stood for. This led us to our vision of creating Global Workspace Solutions. 

The urban workspace landscape has evolved considerably over the last few years, becoming more adaptable, creative, and flexible, thus paving the way for collaborative workplace culture. Driven by the Make In India initiative, Monarch Ergo is set to emboss its presence as a Globally recognized Workspace Solution provider.

Name: Solinoff Corporation
Description: En Solinoff proyectamos las ideas de nuestros clientes. Diseñamos, creamos y transformamos los espacios del sector corporativo, educativo, salud y comercial. Un equipo interdisciplinar experto en diseño de interiores, arquitectura y diseño de mobiliario convierte los ambientes en el mejor lugar para cada persona. Brindamos asesoría de principio a fin para crear proyectos a la medida y acorde a la identidad de la marca. Fabricamos, producimos e instalamos en el menor tiempo posible, gracias a la capacidad industrial de nuestra planta de 12.000 m2. Operamos en cualquier rincón de Colombia y en otros países de Latinoamérica. Contáctanos  https://linktr.ee/solinoff

Name: UniFor
Description:
UniFor’s products and furnishing systems are conceived to meet the needs of an extremely demanding and complex market which must be matched by adequate standards of expertise and manufacturing flexibility.

UniFor, a sister company of the Molteni Group, designs and manufactures solutions for the contemporary office. 

Acting as both manufacturer and design laboratory, UniFor researches and investigates original solutions capable of satisfying specific project requirements: series products and special orders, custom designs and personalized creations.

Innovative in terms of form, technology and product type, UniFor products are manufactured using industrial design components with high esthetic and functional content, carefully selected materials and advanced processing methods. Thus the UniFor factory is a place of both design and production, where cutting-edge industrial processes coexist with artisanal know-how and an ability to adapt to the needs of the client.

Specialization in large-scale projects, an all-embracing international presence and a close collaborative relationship with the designer have always characterized the activities of the company, which, from the very beginning (1969), has made architectural projects and industrial design the principle focus of its research and development strategies. This approach is also clearly reflected in UniFor’s sponsorship of numerous cultural events on a national and international level.

Name: Office Revolution
Description:
Office Revolution is a leading contract furniture dealership where design, function and business come together seamlessly. For over twenty years, Office Revolution has provided unlimited possibilities, unwavering customer service and an unrivaled client experience.

Office Revolution’s strength lies in the ability to provide extensive client-focused services, ultimately creating a complete package to meet all of our customers’ needs. As a top Teknion dealer in the United States, with locations in Chicago, Cleveland, Columbus and Raleigh, Office Revolution has the resources and expertise to transform your ideas into reality. We've done this for customers of all sizes, including McDonald's Corporation, U.S. Foods, Chicago Cubs, BMO Harris Bank and Groupon.

Name: Hightower
Description: Since 2003, the award-winning, family-founded company has curated a collection of in-house designed and manufactured products, Hightower Studio, while also working with a wide network of international partners including +Halle, Four Design, Ondarreta, and Swedese. Hightower is led by co-owner & CEO, Natalie Hartkopf, honored with a 40 Under 40 business leader award, and named a 2019 Rising Star by American Business Journals. Learn more and book a tour at one of Hightower’s US showrooms by visiting www.hightower.design. Hightower inspiration via Instagram or Pinterest @hightowergroup. Career opportunities and company news can be found on LinkedIn @hightower-group. Hightower is a certified Women Owned Business Enterprise and B Corp.

Name: Avanto
Description:
Avanto is a global leader in business solutions for the furniture manufacturing and commercial interiors industry. We help manufacturers, dealers, reps, and installers simplify how they work—making order processing faster, sales smoother, and operations more efficient.

Our flagship platform, OrderBahn, transforms how teams manage projects and process orders. It automates workflows, streamlines communication, and offers real-time tracking—so clients can manage orders with clarity and confidence. OrderBahn also integrates with leading ERP systems, helping businesses reduce costs, avoid errors, and improve customer satisfaction.

With 8+ years of industry experience and a team of over 200 experts worldwide, we combine deep industry knowledge with cutting-edge technology to solve everyday business challenges.

Headquartered in the U.S., Avanto is trusted by companies across the globe to drive innovation, efficiency, and growth in a rapidly changing market.

 Learn more about Avanto
 Discover OrderBahn

http://www.goavanto.com/
https://www.orderbahn.io/

Name: T&D Design
Description: T&D Design is a private limited company. It was founded in 2007 with a vision of transforming the office furniture industry in Egypt. We are uniquely positioned as the leading Egyptian and regional provider of office furniture. T&D Design is deeply present in Egypt, Kuwait, and Dubai. As a result of our loyal network of clients and suppliers, we have been able to invest heavily in our product portfolio. Consequently, our diversified operations played a dynamic role in being considered as a one-stop shop for office furniture.

Name: .mdd
Description:
MDD is well known for its quality products and unique design. The company offers a wide selection of office furniture, seating and reception desks. MDD has grown to be one of the top office furniture manufacturers and workspace solutions providers in Poland. Today, MDD exports the products to Europe, USA, Canada and GCC countries. 
MDD's mission is to provide professional service to ensure that client's project is specified within budget and delivered on time. Successful relationships with our clients are a measure of our dedication to continued client satisfaction. 

Our business practices always involve initiatives to benefit society. Therefore, the social responsibility became an integral part of MDD’s overall strategy. Taking care of the environment is definitely one of our main duties, avoiding any kind of pollution, minimizing the waste and promoting recycling. Our CSR team evaluates the processes and the strategies of the company, always trying to ethically improve our impact and implement new measures regarding our social, economic and environmental development.

More about us: https://mdd.eu/en/

Name: Elite Office Furniture
Description:
Building on over 40 years of industry experience, Elite has been shaping spaces through the design and manufacturing of contemporary and adaptive furniture. Rooted in deep industry expertise and inspired by the ever-evolving interior landscape, we continually innovate to meet the way people work, learn, and connect today.

By combining forward-thinking design with responsibly sourced materials, we create efficient, sustainable furniture solutions that enhance workplace, education, and hospitality environments.

Name: Okamura
Description:
A Legacy of Engineering Excellence !
Founded in 1945, Okamura’s engineering shaped industries beyond office furniture, including the N-52, Japan’s first postwar airplane, and Mikasa, the first automatic front-wheel-drive car.
Today: Okamura stands as a leader in the manufacture and supply of high-quality office furniture, store displays, and material handling systems, continuing to set the standard for excellence in Japan and beyond.
 Global Reach
Rooted in Japan, Okamura serves clients worldwide, enhancing office environments and optimizing productivity, comfort, and well-being through innovative solutions tailored to the evolving needs of modern workplaces.
 Innovative Office Solutions
Our product range includes ergonomic office chairs, modular desks, conference tables, storage solutions, and collaborative furniture, all meticulously crafted to meet diverse client needs. Each product reflects Okamura’s dedication to quality, combining functionality, style, and durability.
 Craftsmanship and Precision
Our tagline, "To the last detail," reflects our unwavering commitment to meticulous craftsmanship, showcasing the precision and excellence of Japanese manufacturing traditions. Every product is thoughtfully designed to uphold the highest standards of quality and functionality.
 Sustainability is at the core of Okamura’s operations.
Materials are carefully selected, and processes refined to minimize environmental impact while ensuring durability and quality. Rooted in Japanese heritage, our care for forests and nature deepens our commitment to sustainability every day.
Our Mission
Relentless innovation and a focus on customer satisfaction keep Okamura at the forefront of the industry. We continuously shape superior workplaces and workspaces that foster productivity, comfort, and employee well-being. Our mission is to deliver exceptional value through superior design and service, positioning Okamura as a trusted partner in creating ideal work environments.

Name: BSF Solid Surfaces Ltd
Description:
Looking for a hygienic, beautiful, silica free and durable alternative to stone, quartz, marble, or granite? Heard of Solid Surface but not sure what makes it unique?

Imagine a surface as versatile as your ideas, an innovative, sculptural material that’s practical and stunning. 

That’s Solid Surface.

Inspired by nature, Solid Surface is a man made material that can be heat formed into graceful curves and shapes that stone can’t achieve. Its sleek, seamless finish has made it the choice for iconic spaces such as the Oxo Tower, Battersea Power Station, Buckingham Palace, and Harrods.

Why Partner with BSF, an Award Winning Specialist Contractor?

As a family run, UK-based fabricator, we specialise in creating bespoke, high quality Solid Surface solutions, from worktops and countertops to wash troughs, tea points, and reception desks. With over 25 years of expertise, we craft handmade, made to order surfaces tailored to meet each project’s unique design requirements.

We work with top brands such as Corian, HIMACS, Staron, Hanex, Durat, Velstone, Kerrock, Krion, Tristone, Meganite, Mirostone, and Montelli , transforming designs into reality with precision and skill.

Since 1998, we’ve supported project managers, designers, and contracts managers in finding tailored solutions for interior fit outs, commercial builds, and high end residential projects.

Why Choose BSF Solid Surfaces?

 Full CAD/CAM Capabilities & Laser Templating
 Free Samples
 Competitive Pricing
 Extensive Product Range - We work with 14 reputable brands of Solid Surface 
 Advanced 3D Thermoforming
 Accreditations: ISO9001-2015, ISO14001-2015, SMAS, Constructionline Gold
 CPD-Certified Course Available Free - and we provide food, breakfast or lunch 

If you’re ready to explore the possibilities of Solid Surface for your next project, get in touch, we’re here to help.

 info@bsfsolidsurfaces.com
 01277 263603

Name: Elhelow Style Office Furniture
Description:
ELHELOW STYLE was established in 1987, the 1st Showroom in Abbass El Akkad which is largest showroom and company's head branch Successfully showrooms were officially opened in Ahmed El Zomor, Mohandseen and Alex.	 	



 	 
ElHelow Style have a special  types of local and imported (Modern & Classic ) office furniture since more than 20 years and we have always made our best efforts to satisfy customer needs and deliver the best quality possible.	 
 	 
ElHelow Style specialized in Office furniture developed fast and steady from a small company to a growing up one by a strong force with experience and knowledge under the guidance of open-minded management and dynamic staff.	 
 	 
ElHelow Style new techniques in the materials and instruments used have the great effect in producing a product with very high quality and keeping the preservation of environment which is our life focal point.

Description:

Name: Lapalma Design
Description:
Architectural contract furniture for Offices, Residential, Hotels and F&B.  
For thirty years, the company has shown talent, tenacity, know-how and above all inexhaustible enthusiasm, expertly combining metal with wood, leather and fabrics to create timeless pieces of furniture with clean fluid lines. The company’s story begins in the 1980s, when founders the Marcato brothers decided to go into business on their own. Their initial idea developed rapidly and Lapalma was established soon after, showing from the outset a preference for natural, recyclable materials. Following investments in machinery, Lapalma took advantage of the availability of new materials to develop a wide range of products for the contract market, which quickly demonstrated the brand’s appeal, attracting buyers on major projects worldwide for hotels, shops, museums and airports.
Lapalma’s blend of good design and aesthetic appeal produces furniture with a strong personality and has seen contributions from designers of international renown (as of 2013, Lapalma’s art director is Francesco Rota). The brand’s success has also been recognized with a number of awards, including the Good Design award, the FX International Interior Design Award and the Design Plus award. 
Today, Lapalma looks towards the future with the same unchanged enthusiasm. The genuine Italian nature of its products is stronger than ever, with its emphasis on craftsmanship and designs that appeal to the senses - the cornerstones of Italian design and production. It has brought in new fabrics, padding, leathers, and colour palettes and developed variations on individual product lines, building a diversified portfolio to accommodate products which are suited to the contract market, but can also cross over into other areas such as the home, outdoor and light office segments. Forward-thinking and true to its convictions, Lapalma is ready to take on new challenges, opportunities and markets.

Name: 800PhonePod

Are you tired of dealing with noisy coworkers or finding a quiet place to work remotely? Do you need a space where you can make private phone calls or have video conferences without interruption? Our acoustic Phone Pods are designed to provide you with a comfortable and peaceful workspace wherever you are. Whether you work in a busy open office, a co-working space, or from home, our Phone Pods give you the privacy and quiet you need to focus and be productive.

Plus, our Pods are easy to move and reconfigure, which means you can adapt to changing work environments or office layouts.

The 800 Phone Pod is perfect for anyone who needs a private space to work, make phone calls, or attend video conferences without distractions. Our customers range from professionals and entrepreneurs to students and remote workers who appreciate the benefits of a soundproof and private workspace.

Order your Phone Pod today and experience the difference it can make in your workday. Join the thousands of satisfied customers who have transformed their workspaces with our acoustic Phone Pods. Invest in your productivity and well-being with the 800 Phone Pod.

We horen dan ook graag wat we voor u kunnen betekenen en denken graag mee met onze opdrachtgevers en bouwheren. In de schaduw van de ontwerper of (interieur)architect, delen wij graag onze knowhow om een synergie tot stand te brengen tussen de verschillende materialen, technieken en werkmethodes. 

We stellen ons graag flexibel op, steeds in functie van het beoogde eindresultaat, de timing en het budget.

De Laere Decor is onafhankelijk, wij zijn niet gebonden aan merken of leveranciers. Wij hebben geen toonzaal daar wij geen standaardproducten of -opstellingen verkopen. Wij investeren liever in onze klanten en in onze medewerkers dan in een dure showroom, wat uiteindelijk onze bouwheren ten goede komt. Uiteraard bent u welkom in onze kantoren en ateliers te Wevelgem om uw project te bespreken en graag bezoeken we samen met u een van onze vele realisaties. In samenspraak met bouwheer en opdrachtgever nemen wij de meest diverse totaalaannemingen voor onze rekening. Wij begeleiden en coördineren dan het volledige totaalproject met inbegrip van onder- en nevenaannemers.  Zo bent u zeker dat de kwaliteit, de timing en het budget gerespecteerd en van dichtbij opgevolgd worden.

Name: VESUV Design
Description:
Wir revolutionieren das Sitzen – mit "Elan" - einem einzigartigen Swing-Hocker. Mit dem Elan findet der Körper beim Sitzen intuitiv in die Mitte und in die Balance. 

DAS PRODUKT
Elan ist ein Balance Hocker, der einen entscheidenden Schritt weiter geht als herkömmliche ergonomische Sitzmöbel. Als einziger Schwinghocker auf dem Markt aktiviert Elan gezielt das menschliche Balancier-System – ein körperlicher Modus, der vielen Erwachsenen abhanden gekommen ist, der sich jedoch bei Kindern im Vorschulalter gut beobachten lässt. Gleichzeitig gibt der Hocker bei voller Bewegungsfreiheit ein Gefühl von Sicherheit im Swingen.

MISSION
Unsere Mission ist, ein beschwingtes Lebensgefühl jedem Menschen, egal ob im Home Office oder im Büro mit dem Swing und Balance Hocker zu vermitteln. Wir möchten, dass Menschen die ihre Arbeit lieben sich gerne hinsetzen und erfrischt wieder aufstehen, dass diese Menschen sich durch ausbalanciertes Sitzen besser fokussieren können, mehr in sich zu ruhen lernen und aus dieser Verbundenheit heraus bessere Entscheidungen fällen können.

ÜBER UNS
Die S. Lautz UG (haftungsbeschränkt) ist ein in Berlin basiertes Start-Up, das den Elan als innovatives, hochwertiges Lifestyle-Produkt entwickelt hat und ihn nun auf den Markt bringen wird. Das Unternehmen befindet sind in der Startup-Phase.

Konstrukteur Stephan Lautz hat den Hocker parallel zu seinem Beruf als Körpertherapeut und Heilpraktiker entwickelt und an seinen Patienten getestet. Das Ergebnis ist ein Hocker, der sowohl Menschen hilft, die massiv Probleme mit dem Bewegungsapparat haben, als auch gesunden Menschen hilft, agil zu bleiben. 25 Jahre Berufserfahrung als Architekt und Bauleiter haben ihm geholfen ein Produkt zu entwickeln, das aus einfachen Bauteilen besteht, leicht zu montieren ist und in Serie produziert werden kann.

Con el dominio adquirido, ahora realizamos obras donde se integren los materiales y técnicas que dominamos, principalmente en los siguientes usos:

Comercial:	Murales decorativos, puertas, mobiliario en madera maciza, etc. 	
Religioso:	        Edificación de altares, combinando múltiples técnicas y materiales. 
Residencial: 	Implementación de cocinas en madera, muebles em general, etc.

Somos una asociación sin fines de lucro, cuyo objetivo central es brindar oportunidad de trabajo a jóvenes peruanos, sin que tengan que abandonar su lugar de origen, su familia y sus costumbres.

Así mismo formamos parte de la Operación Mato Grosso, un movimiento juvenil italiano creado para ayudar a los pobres, fundado por el sacerdote italiano Ugo De Censi en 1967.

Since 1999, Dirk Aßmann has been taking the family-run business into its third generation. Name: Oxford Office Furniture
Description:
Oxford Office Furniture was founded with a clear mission: to help businesses create productive, inspiring workspaces using quality office furniture that’s both affordable and sustainable. We believe well-designed environments significantly boost employee wellbeing and productivity, without costing the earth or compromising on style.
We specialize in both new and expertly refurbished office furniture, carefully restoring used pieces to extend their life and keep them out of landfill. We also support local charities, reflecting our commitment to community and responsible business. Thanks to our extensive national supplier network, we can source virtually any furniture you need from desks and chairs to storage and boardroom tables with fresh, exciting stock arriving regularly.
Our Story:
Founder Dave Beesley’s journey spans over 40 years in the office furniture industry. After facing a life-changing prostate cancer diagnosis and being told to expect the worst, Dave chose to prepare and push forward. His experience ignited a new purpose, and following a successful recovery, he launched Oxford Office Furniture in 2014 starting small with just a couple of vehicles and garden sheds as his base.
Since then, the business has steadily grown, reinvesting every penny into stock, modern equipment, and building a skilled team dedicated to exceptional service. Today, we operate from a spacious facility in Bicester, staffed by professionals focused on making your office furnishing experience seamless and successful.
Beyond furniture, we offer expert advice, tailored 3D space planning, office moves, clearances, and storage solutions all designed to support businesses at every stage of their workspace journey.
If you’re ready to create a workspace that truly works for you, we’d love to be part of your story. Reach out today, and let’s build something great together.

Name: ADAPTABLE (upcycling)
Description:
Créateur de bureaux professionnels upcyclés. 
L'idée est simple : récupérer in extremis, des bureaux qui allaient être jetés. 
On les jette parce qu'ils sont trop grands, ou parce qu'ils ont un angle, ou simplement parce qu'ils ne passent plus dans les nouveaux espaces. 
Et pourtant, en les refaçonnant, nous pouvons leur donner une deuxième vie ! 
Notre travail est de créer une belle chaine d'acteurs de l'économie sociale et solidaire : vider, emballer, redécouper et remettre dans les organisations de beaux bureaux adaptés à vos nouveaux espaces. 

Nos bureaux upcyclés sont en plus : 
Beaux et design
Bien adaptés au usages d'aujourd'hui
Bon pour limiter l'impact de nos achats

Notre raison d'être : 
Valoriser les vieux produits et valoriser notre écosystème, par des transformations vertueuses pour être à l'aise au travail.


Chez Adaptable, nous réinventons le design des espaces de travail par le prisme de l'écosystème vertueux. Nous transformons les matériaux oubliés en bureaux upcyclés, où chaque pièce raconte l'histoire d'une seconde chance — pour les objets comme pour les personnes. En valorisant les déchets, nous valorisons également ceux qui les transforment, en reconnaissant leur talent et en les mettant en lumière. Nous ne créons pas seulement des meubles; nous cultivons un environnement où la durabilité rencontre l'innovation et où chaque individu contribue à un avenir respectueux et regénératif.

Name: SpinaliS: Ergonomic Chairs for Healthy Posture | EU Manufactured
Description:
Who are we?
SpinaliS is an innovative brand name registered in Slovenia, EU. We have been manufacturing the office chairs that enable a healthy and active sitting since 1999. A network of independent partners makes it possible for us to sell our products in numerous European countries.
For our business partners we provide high quality products and an excellent support. SpinaliS is an established trade mark. Our office chairs are registered in the EU as a medical accessory.

Flexibility
Our end users can chose among various models, materials and colours. The models are adjusted to the specifics of different workplaces, as well as to gender and age of the users.

Made in EU
At SpinaliS we are proud to be able to provide the top quality of our products made in the European Union. It is our pleasure to offer employment and income to our staff and to our partners. We believe that the quality of our products surpasses the quality of similar imported products.

Active Health Protection
SpinaliS chair is a patented product intended for the consumers who are striving for healthy and active life. Sitting on all our office chairs mimics active sitting on a therapeutic ball (“Swiss ball”) and due to its movable seat prevents lower back pain. It provides a great help for people who already experience difficulties due to a sedentary lifestyle. Because of this exceptional characteristics of our office chairs you will always act for the benefit of the customer.

Support
It is our sincere wish to offer you a first class support. Our experienced experts will assist and advise you to close the deals and to provide information about availability of the products and delivery dates.

It is easy to become our partner:
Contact us and we will give you all the necessary details on our business co-operation. The business co-operation with SpinaliS brings numerous benefits to the partners as well as satisfied clients who will be returning to you.

Name: crea:space s.r.o.
Description:
Unikátny Dizajn,
ktorý predáva

V oblasti fit-out pre kancelárske priestory, máme 12-ročné skúsenosti. Naša spoločnosť navrhuje a zároveň realizuje interiéry kancelárií, pričom sa snažíme implementovať všetky pravidlá pre správny návrh priestoru. Sme zástupcovia niekoľkých svetových značiek, čo sa týka mobiliáru, podlahových krytín, taktiež zabezpečujeme drevo a kovo výrobu na mieru. Aktuálne sme sa začali venovať aj rezidenciám, kde ponúkame široké možnosti vyhotovenia interiéru na mieru.

Prinášame inovácie a kreativitu do sveta dizajnu kancelárskych priestorov, pretože práve tieto kľúčové faktory sú spolu s ergonómiou neoddeliteľnou súčasťou života. Po dlhoročných skúsenostiach v office segmente sme zistili, že pri návrhoch kancelárskych interiérov sú častokrát tieto faktory podceňované. Do popredia sa dostáva dizajn na úkor funkčnosti a využiteľnosti priestoru, preto sme sa rozhodli Slovákov naučiť, že ideálny priestor na prácu musí byť hravý a zdravý.

Name: SenseOn Group AS
Description:
Transforming Office Asset Management – One Circular Solution at a Time
Every year, millions of tonnes of perfectly usable office furniture and equipment are discarded, generating unnecessary waste, financial losses, and carbon emissions. At SenseOn, we are on a mission to change this.

With our cutting-edge digital platform, SmartCycle, we are developing a solution that will empower businesses and public institutions to take full control over their assets—tracking sustainability metrics, extending product lifespans, and ensuring compliance with EU regulations like the Taxonomy and CSRD. By leveraging AI, image recognition, and digital twins, we aim to simplify and accelerate the transition from a linear to a circular economy.

 Why SenseOn?
 Pioneering a digital-first circular economy – The only end-to-end platform addressing office furniture and equipment lifecycle management.
 Tangible impact – Up to 313 kg CO₂ savings per workstation, turning sustainability into a financial advantage.
 Expert team & strong partnerships – Backed by industry expertise, top-tier research institutions, and leading circular economy innovators.

While we continue to develop SmartCycle, we are already generating revenue through our operational services, helping organizations optimize procurement, reuse, and logistics for a more sustainable workplace.

We are now looking for investors and partners to scale our impact and take circularity in office asset management to the next level. Join us in redefining resource efficiency—because the future is circular. 


See our projects here: https://senseon.no/references/

Hero Furniture is ontstaan uit een samenwerking tussen ontwerper en meubelmaker. Door deze twee bij elkaar te brengen is alle expertise van ontwerp tot levering in huis. Het voordeel voor de klant is dat er korte lijnen zijn en aanpassingen van proto tot product geen probleem zijn. Zo krijgt de klant altijd een passende maatwerk oplossing!

Onze missie:

Leveren van maatwerk oplossingen welke altijd klant gericht zijn. Zowel in ontwerp als uitvoering. Vaak zijn dit maatwerk meubels en Audio Visueel gerelateerd.
Wat wij beloven

Belangrijk voor de klant is dat het uiteindelijke product lijkt op de gemaakte schetsen en voldoet aan de specificaties. Alleen door continue het proces te bewaken is dit mogelijk. Door het gebruik van professionele machines kunnen we ook de gewenste kwaliteit leveren.

Wat wij voor u kunnen betekenen

Voor elke vraag hebben we een oplossing! Vaak begint een aanvraag met een pakket van eisen. Aan de hand van deze informatie kunnen we een ontwerp maken. Het ontwerp kan geproduceerd worden en ook op locatie geïnstalleerd worden indien wenselijk.

Name: Still Design | acoustic solutions!
Description:
Wij zijn met Still Design begonnen omdat we vinden dat akoestiek een apart specialisme is bij de inrichting van gebouwen. Geluid is immers sterk bepalend voor hoe je een ruimte beleeft. Bij elke activiteit hoort een ander geluid. Zeker met alle flexibiliteit in ieders werkomgeving is dat een uitdaging.

Still Design is een hecht team van interieurarchitecten, industrieel ontwerpers, engineers en makers die akoestiek in de werkomgeving als passie hebben.

Geluid kun je niet zien. Wel horen én meten. We houden ervan om ons op feiten te baseren. Tabellen en decibellen. Daar begint het mee. En we luisteren ook goed naar wat gebruikers van een ruimte willen en prettig vinden. Een intensieve inventarisatie is de basis voor ons ontwerp.

We weten hoe geluid zich gedraagt in combinatie met materialen. Dat nemen we mee als we het ontwerp maken voor een ruimte. Daar stoppen we heel wat rekenwerk in. Zo werken we toe naar het gewenste akoestisch klimaat.

En we blijven ontwerpers. We willen functionaliteit en schoonheid graag samenbrengen. Dat komt het best tot uiting in een aantal innovatieve akoestische producten die we hebben ontwikkeld. Slimme panelen, modulaire glaswanden, plantenbakken of andere objecten. Met hoogwaardige akoestische prestaties, gepatenteerde toepassingen en fraaie vormgeving. Perfect inspelend op het wisselend gebruik van ruimtes. De productie ervan doen we in eigen huis. Zo kunnen we hoge kwaliteit garanderen en maatwerk in uitvoering en stijl leveren.

Persoonlijk contact vinden wij heel belangrijk. Niet alleen voor en tijdens de verkoop, maar ook na de aanschaf. Daarom hebben we een eigen bezorgservice in de regio. Onze medewerkers worden regelmatig door onze leveranciers getraind en volgen de laatste ontwikkelingen in de markt. Tot slot bent u bij ons bent u geen nummer, maar een persoon. Iemand waarvoor wij graag een oplossing bieden, zodat u weer door kunt gaan met uw dagelijkse business.

Prokan bestaat uit een gemotiveerd en enthousiast team van 18 medewerkers die naast een gedegen vakkennis, ook beschikken over een gezonde dosis klantvriendelijkheid. Dit gecombineerd met een vleugje noordelijke nuchterheid, maakt dat u met een goed gevoel zaken met ons zult doen.

Name: Scanform
Description:
Diseñamos espacios con flexibilidad, calidad e identidad propia. Fabricamos más que muebles, porque también ayudamos a contar grandes historias. Te explicamos por qué.

¿Qué se te viene a la mente cuando se habla de sillas y mesas? 

Probablemente, piensas que son muebles que cumplen con simples funciones: sentarse, escribir, guardar otros objetos, etc.

Pero son mucho más, porque los muebles cuentan historias.

¿Recuerdas el comedor de la casa de tus padres? Cada silla, mesa o mueble forma parte de un gran ecosistema donde suceden acontecimientos importantes…

Por ejemplo: una silla ergonómica que se encuentra en una oficina de gerencia, se utiliza para ejecutar, para tomar grandes decisiones. Una sala de reuniones, con 20 sillas y una gran mesa, cuenta cientos de historias de mentes brillantes que se juntaron para ejecutar grandes ideas.

En Scanform queremos que tus espacios, tus proyectos de arquitectura o tu empresa cuenten con un diseño innovador, flexible y sostenible, que permita habitar de manera cómoda y proporcione la libertad de desarrollar, estructurar y gestionar cualquier idea o proyecto.

Nuestro diseño de mobiliario no solo es capaz de evolucionar y adaptarse a los cambios que exige el mercado, sino que también escucha tus necesidades, trabajos y sueños, para ofrecerte soluciones de mobiliario que se adapten a los espacios en una forma estética, funcional y de calidad.

Tenemos más de 60 años ayudando a contar grandes historias a través de muebles de diseño y espacios flexibles. Hoy también te queremos ayudar a contar la tuya.

Somos una empresa de origen sueco, con más de 120 empleados, diseñando productos con influencia escandinava para el mercado colombiano e internacional.

Diseñamos espacios y muebles que se mueven y se relacionan constantemente, lugares pensados para crear entornos ciento por ciento efectivos y ecosistemas que crean soluciones reales.

Adaptamos el mobiliario a los usuarios para que los espacios tengan vida.

Name: Paretimilano
Description: Paretimilano was born from the long experience of the Romano family, who have been involved in metalworking for over 70 years. Paretimilano is a young and dynamic company that designs and creates partition walls, doors, profiles and accessories useful for dividing common areas with style and functionality, ideal for both open space offices and living spaces or boutiques. It bases its success on architectural innovation, evolving the production and design of aluminum systems with a specialization in surface finishes and technological and aesthetic solutions, including customized ones. «We do not offer simple painted partitions, but rather our products are processed through the oxidation process which guarantees coloration of the raw material of the product and not of the surface. In this way the resistance and durability performances are far superior to a classic dividing wall" - Riccardo Romano (Founder and R&D Manager). «Our customers love the constructive mastery of the profiles, combined with the evolution of the color finishes of the details (handles, hinges, lock blocks) coordinated down to the single screw.» - Amedeo Romano (Founder and Sales Manager).

Wir legen großen Wert auf Brandschutz, Hygiene und Mobilität und integrieren Nachhaltigkeit in alle Phasen – von der Materialauswahl bis zur Recyclingfähigkeit.

Description:
AQUARIUM op Kantoor is dé specialist in totale verzorging van aquaria bij bedrijven,scholen en particulieren.

Van ontwerp, inrichting en installatie tot reguliere all-in verzorging, wij nemen alle zorg uit handen.

Werken en de werkplek van nu is zoveel meer dan het bureau en kantoortuin van weleer. Welzijn van werknemers staat steeds meer centraal. Want een gezonde, stressarme en blije werknemer is een creatieve en loyale kracht die tegen een stootje kan. 

Met het oog op welzijn wordt bij het inrichten van het pand gebruik gemaakt van 'Biophilic Design'. Hierbij wordt op de werkplek een gezonde atmosfeer gecreëerd middels het introduceren van natuurlijke elementen die de werknemer zintuigelijk in verbinding stelt met de natuur.

Aquarium op Kantoor draagt hierin bij door het plaatsen van waterelementen op kantoor- en werkplekken. Hiermee creëeren wij unieke oplossingen voor bedrijven.

Meer natuurbewustzijn, dagelijks contact en de talloze lesstof die een aquarium biedt aan leerlingen is een van de hoofdgedachte van Aquarium op School.

Name: Utuş Ofis Mobilyaları
Description:
Sektörünün farklı alanlarında üstün uzmanlık ve köklü deneyimle hizmet vermenin gururunu yaşarken, her bir projenin yaşama ve yaşam kalitesine katkıda bulunmayı hedefleyen kurumsal birikimimizi sürekli zenginleştiriyoruz.

Tamamladığımız her yeni proje, müşteri memnuniyetini en üst düzeyde tutma misyonumuzun bir yansımasıdır. Her kurum ve birey, bu değerler zincirine katılarak, uzmanlık alanımızdaki kaliteli hizmet anlayışımıza değer katar.

Geçmişten bugüne, geleceğin yeni hedeflerini birlikte güvenle karşılıyoruz. Tüm faaliyetlerimizi yürürlükteki kanun ve mevzuata uygun olarak gerçekleştiriyor, oluşturduğumuz yönetim sistemi ile sağlıklı ve güvenli çalışma ortamı oluşturarak ekip ruhumuzu güçlendiriyoruz. Müşteri memnuniyeti odaklı hizmet anlayışımızla, her projede yüksek standartlarda çalışarak başarılarımıza yenilerini ekliyoruz.

“UTUŞ” imzalı koleksiyonlarımızla yaşamın tüm renklerini ofisinize taşıyoruz. Enerjik ekibimiz, ilham veren iç mimarlarımız ve güçlü teknolojimizle en iyi deneyimi sunmak için var gücümüzle çalışıyoruz. İnsan odaklı, yenilikçi ve estetik anlayışımızla ofislerinizi daha verimli, konforlu ve çağdaş hale getiriyoruz. Sizlere kaliteli hizmet sunmaktan gurur duyuyoruz ve gelecekte de bu yolda başarıyla ilerlemeye devam edeceğimizi taahhüt ediyoruz.

Name: ROVO Benelux
Description:

Daarnaast werken wij nauw samen met fysiotherapeuten, arbodiensten en gezondheidsinstellingen om onze deskundigheid op peil te houden en onze dealers optimaal te ondersteunen.

Wij delen dezelfde passie: samenwerken met mensen om mooie projecten te ontwikkelen. In januari 2011 hebben wij ROVO Nederland overgenomen en dit samen verder uitgebreid tot waar het nu staat: Een volwassen en succesvolle onderneming. Wij zijn dé partner op het gebied van bureaustoelen voor zowel bedrijven als particulieren.

De passie voor kantoormeubilair en met name bureaustoelen, spat er bij ons vanaf. We genieten van iedere stoel die we aanbieden en waar gebruikers dagelijks zoveel plezier en comfort aan beleven en die zelfs gezondheidsklachten weten te voorkomen.

Onze slogan is “wij blijven in beweging u ook?” dit is letterlijk en figuurlijk bedoeld. Als je meer wilt bereiken en stappen wilt maken, dan zal je innovatief moeten zijn en de markt actief moeten benaderen. Dat is de reden waarom wij aantoonbaar succesvol zijn in wat wij doen.

Wilt u meer weten over ons of heeft u ideeën die ons verder kunnen helpen? Neem dan gerust contact met ons op.

Name: Libero Furniture
Description:
Libero Furniture
Office Furniture & Fixtures Manufacturing | Dubai, UAE

About Us
Libero Furniture combines the elegance of European design with the precision of UAE craftsmanship. We specialise in producing premium office and home furniture — offering both Italian-designed components and fully custom local manufacturing. Our mission is to deliver furniture that stands out in terms of aesthetics, comfort, and durability.

What We Do

Source original molds and parts from Italian partners to preserve design integrity

Manufacture and upholster products locally in Dubai, ensuring faster lead times and customization

Provide full product warranties (up to 10 years) and Certificates of Origin

Handle end-to-end services: design, prototyping, fabrication, finishing, and installation

Our Value Proposition

Design excellence + local agility: access to premier Italian designs, backed by local production flexibility.

Quality assurance: rigorous QC processes, premium materials, and warranties.

Customization: tailored dimensions, finishes, and upholstery to suit client needs.

Regional advantage: minimized shipping lead times and cost benefits from being in the UAE manufacturing hub.

Nasz zespół doradzi i zaprojektuje funkcjonalne rozwiązania dla Twojego biura. Oferujemy nie tylko dobór odpowiednich mebli, foteli, paneli akustycznych ale także wykładzin biurowych, żaluzji, kwietników, wieszaków, pozostałych akcesoriów oraz zabudowę aneksów socjalnych czy kuchennych.
Jesteśmy przedstawicielem największych fabryk mebli biurowych takich jak: Nowy Styl, Balma, Noti, MDD, Bejot, Profim, Sitag, Wuteh, Las, Luxy i wielu innych.
Każdy projekt rozpoczyna się badaniem potrzeb, propozycją rozwiązań a następnie przygotowujemy ofertę wraz z projektem wnętrz. Dostawa i montaż odbywa się na ustalonych z inwestorem warunkach. Zapewniamy obsługę gwarancyjną i pogwarancyjną.

If you're seeking acoustic solutions in the workplace, our sister company, Acoustic Solutions, provides a comprehensive kit of parts to help you reduce unwanted noise.

Name: LaunchPOD
Description:
Welcome to The Future of Workspaces.  

Create Brilliant Workspaces that are future-proof and productive today.
LaunchPOD brings together everything that is required for progressive organisations and businesses to design new workspaces that enhance creativity, productivity and efficiency. Our workspace pods and accessories provide state-of-the-art features and innovative enhancements for individuals, small teams and remote professionals.  

Our pods strike the perfect balance for both remote and in-person workspace personnel and teams.

Name: Vivir Bonito México
Description:
Vivir Bonito fabrica mobiliario comercial a medida para negocios que necesitan resistencia, estética y operación sin fallas.

Qué hacemos: diseño, ingeniería, fabricación e instalación de mobiliario para restaurantes, franquicias, comedores industriales, farmacias, oficinas y espacios comerciales.

Soluciones típicas: mesas y sillas, barras, booths, banquetería fija, estaciones de servicio, vitrinas, exhibidores, almacenamiento, kioscos/islas, mobiliario de alto tráfico y especificación profesional.

Para quién: dueños, desarrolladores de franquicia, gerentes de operación, arquitectos y constructoras que requieren estándares consistentes, tiempos claros y calidad repetible.

Cobertura: proyectos en todo México (diseño remoto + fabricación + instalación según alcance).

Por qué confiar: procesos definidos, materiales para alto uso, control de calidad y experiencia en mobiliario operativo (no “mueble decorativo”).

¿Buscas fabricación de mobiliario para tu negocio? Escríbenos con: ciudad, giro, medidas aproximadas, fotos del espacio y fecha objetivo.
Location: San Pedro Garza García , Nuevo León

Name: BOX&OUT
Description: BOX & OUT specializes in the production, import, marketing and installation of quality office furniture, work and leisure spaces, seating areas, waiting and hospitality, acoustic solutions for work environments, libraries and schools, furniture for the elderly, alternative furniture, industrial carpentry, artist carpentry and more.

Name: Second Office | Partner in hybride werkplekken
Description:
𝐂𝐨𝐦𝐩𝐥𝐞𝐞𝐭 𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐳𝐨𝐫𝐠𝐝𝐞 𝐰𝐞𝐫𝐤𝐩𝐥𝐞𝐤𝐤𝐞𝐧

Sinds 2020 helpt Second Office organisaties bij het inrichten en beheren van ergonomische werkplekken, thuis én op kantoor. We nemen het volledige proces uit handen:

- Unieke bestelportals met ergonomisch advies
- Breed assortiment en professionele installatie op locatie
- Retour, opslag en herinzet van werkplekken bij uitdiensttreding
- Inzicht in productinzet, (rest)waarde en circulariteit op medewerker niveau
- Levert tot 12% kostenbesparing en 9+ medewerkerstevredenheid

𝐒𝐥𝐢𝐦𝐦𝐞 𝐭𝐡𝐮𝐢𝐬𝐰𝐞𝐫𝐤𝐩𝐥𝐞𝐤 𝐨𝐩𝐥𝐨𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐳𝐨𝐧𝐝𝐞𝐫 𝐠𝐞𝐝𝐨𝐞

Werkplekken thuis regelen kost vaak tijd, afstemming en gedoe. Second Office biedt één totaaloplossing: levering, installatie, beheer, support én herinzet bij uitdiensttreding. Volledig Arbo-proof, afgestemd op jullie beleid en zonder rompslomp voor HR of facilitair. Ontdek in een vrijblijvend adviesgesprek hoe organisaties tot 30% kosten besparen en een 9+ scoren op medewerkerstevredenheid.

𝐊𝐚𝐧𝐭𝐨𝐨𝐫𝐦𝐞𝐮𝐛𝐢𝐥𝐚𝐢𝐫 𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐯𝐚𝐧𝐠𝐞𝐧 𝐨𝐟 𝐧𝐢𝐞𝐮𝐰𝐞 𝐤𝐚𝐧𝐭𝐨𝐨𝐫𝐢𝐧𝐫𝐢𝐜𝐡𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐧𝐨𝐝𝐢𝐠?
Meer weten over het vervangen van kantoormeubilair of een complete kantoorinrichting? Ontdek hoe wij uw werkplekken kunnen transformeren tot een inspirerende en functionele omgeving.

Name: INNDESIGN
Description:
A INNDESIGN nasceu com o propósito de transformar espaços de hotelaria e restauração através de mobiliário com identidade e projetos personalizados.

Somos uma marca jovem, dinâmica e próxima, que alia o fornecimento de mobiliário à criação de ambientes únicos, funcionais e alinhados com a realidade operacional de cada negócio.

Valorizamos a flexibilidade criativa e o acompanhamento próximo em todas as fases.

Trabalhamos lado a lado com os nossos clientes — restaurantes, cafés, hotéis — para garantir que cada espaço reflete a sua identidade, facilita o dia a dia e eleva a experiência de quem o visita.

Fazemos do detalhe a nossa assinatura.

 Fala connosco: geral@inndesign.net

Name: DREWLUX GROUP
Description:
Firma DREWLUX powstała w 2004. Zaczynając od kompleksowego wyposażania sklepów przekształciła się w DREWLUX Group. Wspieramy rozwój naszych klientów jako generalny wykonawca prac projektowych, budowlanych, wentylacyjnych oraz aranżacji przestrzeni sprzedażowych oraz biurowych

The company DREWLUX was established in 2004. Starting with comprehensive shop equipment, it has evolved into DREWLUX Group. We support the development of our clients as a general contractor for project, construction, ventilation works, as well as for the arrangement of sales and office spaces.

Name: Inredningshuset Östersund
Description:
Välkommen in till Jämtlands ledande inredningsleverantör för kontorsmöbler och möbler för företag, skola, vård och omsorg. 

Vi levererar attraktiva inredningslösningar som hjälper dig och din organisation att behålla motivationen, produktiviteten och välbefinnandet. 
För oss handlar inredning om så mycket mer än bara möbler: det handlar om att använda design tillsammans med vår samlade kunskap, för att främja kreativitet och effektivitet, och att omvandla vårt kunnande inom ergonomi och hälsa för att skapa utrymmen som hjälper dig att forma en hållbar verksamhet som främjar individen. Vi kallar det för: Successful Interiors. 

Vi levererar helhetslösningar inom inredning; allt ifrån kontorsstolar, skrivbord och förvaring till sittmöbler, mattor, gardiner och belysning.

Name: Grupo Wi
Description:
fabricación de mobiliario comercial, impresión gran formato, visual merchandising y P.O.P. remodelación y mantenimiento en retail. Nosotros buscamos adaptarnos y agilizar los procesos con nuestros clientes. Entérate por qué en México Grupo Wi es la opción eficiente y ágil en proyectos de retail y fabricación de mobiliario comercial. Un espacio de retail que produce sensaciones y no dejan indiferente a quien se encuentra en él, es resultado de la magia del diseño comercial que hacemos en Grupo Wi. 

Libérate de contratistas anticuados, procesos tediosos y trabajos maquilados, Trabajar con Grupo Wi es una de las mejores decisiones para aumentar la plusvalía de tus proyectos en retail, somos ágiles para responder a las necesidades emergentes, dejamos las formalidades y trabajamos en equipo con la mejor actitud y espíritu de servicio. ¿El resultado? Tenemos cada día más clientes felices con los que nuestra relación de negocios se vislumbra a largo plazo.
Location: Col Granjas Esmeralda, Ciudad de México

Name: Queens Arts and Trends Corp
Description: We customize office furniture, office table, office chair, office workstation and cabinets. We deliver anywhere in Metro Manila and anywhere in the Philippines.

Name: HOUSE OF DIGBY
Description:
At HOUSE OF DIGBY, we’re building a new kind of company that’s relentlessly focused on bringing the joy back to the specifier experience and bringing the experience of authentic design to the forefront in new and exciting ways.  We work with leading manufacturers who share the belief that authentic design is timeless design. We believe that there are opportunities to bring moments of warmth, comfort and inspired design to every space, and our collection reflects that belief in every detail.

We recognize that a specifier should be inspired when working on a project the same way as they would be in their own homes. Our collection has been painstakingly curated with a focus on materiality, craftsmanship and style, built with durability for the contract market, and with options priced to suit any budget.

We're working with our sister company, digby, to deliver data, insight and technology to create truly beautiful, joy-inspiring experiences and amplifying those experiences with new opportunities for social interaction, access to information and rewards for their loyalty.

It's an approach that’s designed around the designer.  And we think it’s about time.

Name: Black And Blues Furnitures
Description:
At Black and Blue, we deliver a world-class experience to clients seeking ergonomic seating solutions. With over 25 years in the furniture industry, we adapt to evolving trends, providing aesthetic, ergonomic, and top-quality products. Our pride lies in unparalleled service, promising an unprecedented industry experience. 

Backed by Indian and overseas vendors, we set high standards year after year,  offering a 3-year warranty as most of our components are BIFMA certified . 
Our dedicated workforce drives us towards milestones, with 250+ products in showrooms, manufacturing, and warehouse facilities for swift delivery. As part of the Mittals Group, comprising 5 focused companies, we proudly cater to your needs.

Name: National Modular System
Description:
Welcome to National Modular Sytem, the premier destination for innovative office workstations and modular furniture solutions. With a passion for transforming spaces and enhancing productivity, we take pride in creating furniture that seamlessly integrates into any workplace, providing both style and functionality.

Our expert team of designers and craftsmen are committed to delivering excellence in every piece we create. From cutting-edge office workstations designed to maximize efficiency and collaboration to versatile modular furniture that adapts to your evolving needs, we cater to businesses of all sizes.

Name: PodRent
Description: PodRent is a leading provider of acoustic workspaces on a rental basis. With market-leading phone booths and meeting pods, our rental services allow businesses to try the most soundproof acoustic booths in the market with minimum financial commitment and no long-term investment. Our flexible rental basis offers scalability to grow or downsize as your business needs change. With a focus on sustainability, circularity, and flexibility, PodRent prolongs the lifespan of our products by refurbishing them and giving them new homes. Contact us today to transform your workspace effortlessly and cost-effectively with our versatile modular office pods.

Name: DESSA MUEBLES
Description: "Ayudamos a empresas y corporativos a generar espacios de trabajo confiables y productivos para la fabricación y diseño personalizado del mobiliario, ajustado a sus necesidades¨.

Name: INSPIRED Co.
Description:
INSPIRED began as a company offering unique ‘Real Wood’ furniture. Throughout the years we have expanded our product line and services to include whole store rollouts.

Today we have earned a reputation as a first-rate designer and manufacturer of high-end custom displays, retail, office, F&B and hospitality furniture.

Our goal is to create inspiring solutions that enhance your business, and improve daily life for commercial and non-commercial environments.

In today’s rapidly changing world, we believe that it is crucial to maintain a company culture that listens to our clients and to the market as we develop creative and innovative solutions that exceed your expectations.

Name: Officepoint.be

Name: Interarredo
Description:
Da oltre 50 anni impegnata nella realizzazione e nell’allestimento di Uffici (studi professionali, aziende, banche), Farmacie e Punti Vendita (bar, ristoranti, tavola calda, gdo, settore hospitality). 

Interarredo si pone come fornitore ideale dello spazio di lavoro combinando funzionalità, comfort e design. Le capacità progettuali e creative sono frutto delle specifiche competenze di staff supportate dai migliori produttori di arredi nazionali ed internazionali e dalle collaborazioni con architetti e progettisti qualificati nel pieno rispetto delle specifiche di progetto, tempistica e costi. 

La gamma di prodotti per l’arredo permette di offrire le migliori soluzioni in termini di design e di costo. Interarredo nel corso di tutti questi anni, ha sviluppato le proprie competenze garantendo professionalità e qualità per l’arredamento e contract.

Name: Business Furniture Direct Limited
Description:
Business Furniture Direct supply, delivery and install office furniture nationwide and have a showroom near Cheltenham, showcasing our most popular ranges of office furniture and office seating.

From one workstation to an entire corporate building, Business Furniture Direct create dynamic working environments for less.

Working with a vast range of manufacturers we source product to fit in with your timescale and budget. Covering a wide range of departments including reception, boardroom, breakout and canteen areas.

We work with clients locally and nationwide from a wide range of industries including healthcare, education, retail, SME and corporate companies.

We also hold a Waste Carrier's Licence so we can also remove and environmentally dispose of your existing furniture when using our office removal and relocation services.

Name: OfficeSpaceSolutions
Description:
We specialise in sourcing, refurbishing, and supplying high-quality office furniture and modular workspace products, helping organisations create functional and stylish environments with sustainability at the core.

Born out of a desire to challenge the waste-heavy culture of commercial interiors, OSS is rooted in circular thinking. We reclaim premium furniture from office clearances, surplus stock, and decommissioned sites across the UK. These items are carefully assessed, professionally restored, and reintroduced to the market with a renewed purpose — combining environmental responsibility with professional-grade quality.

Name: Red Oficinas
Description: Somos un equipo de profesionales con más de 15 años en reformas integrales que ahora con la venta de todo tipo de mobiliario de oficina, pretende sacar el máximo partido de los diferentes espacios de trabajo.

Name: HUB Office Furniture INC.
Description:
Curated, customizable, commercial furniture that works - HUB INC. makes furniture easy. Our personalized process ensures each furniture piece you select is perfectly tailored to your business needs, delivering quality products and exceptional service.

More than furniture—it's your story. Located in Kelowna’s business district, we help organizations create inspiring, personalized workspaces that reflect their people, culture, and brand. With 80 dynamic lines, including MillerKnoll, we offer the latest designs and timeless classics. Shop locally and reimagine your workspace with HUB INC.

At HUB we are:
Proud to be a female owned, Okanagan furniture supplier located in Kelowna.
Registered member of the Okanagan Society of Interior Designers.
Registered member of WEConnect International for women - owned businesses.
Registered member of the Black Entrepreneurs & Business of Canada Society.
Registered member of the Black Business Association of BC.
The only MillerKnoll Authorized Dealer in the Okanagan.

Name: PT. Okamura Chitose Indonesia
Description: Welcome to PT Okamura Chitose Indonesia, a dynamic joint venture between Okamura Corp (Japan) and PT Chitose Internasional Tbk. (Indonesia), established in 2015. As a leading player in the Indonesian market, we specialize in the distribution of high-quality Okamura products, offering a diverse range of innovative office furniture and solutions. Our commitment goes beyond mere product distribution; we take pride in delivering complete office interior services, ensuring our clients' workspaces are not only furnished with cutting-edge designs but also optimized for efficiency and productivity. With a perfect blend of Japanese precision and Indonesian expertise, we strive to redefine the standards of workplace environments, creating spaces that inspire and empower. Join us in shaping the future of workspaces with PT Okamura Chitose Indonesia.

Name: SMARTdesks
Description:
SMARTdesks.com offers more than just buying computer lab desks or conference tables as a generic commodity. We offer person to person design team interaction and collaboration with our customers. Together, project by project, we are shaping conferencing and education for the 21st century.

Every Space is Different
SmartDesks computer desk, computer lab and conference table solutions provide a configured solution for your space and need.

When you are looking for a full scale classroom, computer lab furniture or conference room design solution rather than a desk-in-a-box, think SmartDesks. Our specialty is designing for your space and pulling together our teams in collaboration with your IT integrators.

Design Interaction in a Cloud
What we do is assist our clients in a cloud based interactive platform. Using cloud based technology to exchange ideas, concepts & drawings in a holistic integrated cloud platform, we bring together our teams to reach configured solutions to fit your needs, your space, your environment.

Name: My French Ball
Description:
S'ASSOIR EN MOUVEMENTS :

Description:

With Stilfibra we want to reduce plastic and Co2 production by studying new

eco-friendly materials, while guaranteeing our products mechanical performance,

durability and design aesthetics.

Name: Lords Furniture Co.
Description: As we continue to grow and evolve over decades, Lords Furniture remains dedicated to enriching workspaces in Qatar and beyond. We are committed to continuously expanding our product portfolio and strengthening our partnerships with contractors, government entities, and corporate offices by creating lasting relationships based on reliability and the highest standards of service.

Name: Presto Office Furniture (Australia) Pty Ltd
Description:
Presto Furniture specialises in the design, importation and wholesale distribution of contract systems furniture specifically for the commercial office furniture market.

We collaborate with designers and specifiers and we service a range of office furniture retailers, commercial fitout companies, joinery and office furniture manufacturers. We supply the parts that contribute to the perfect fit-out!

Since 2008 our guiding philosophy for office furniture is simplicity in looks, highly functional, ergonomic design, great value and designed to withstand the rigours of the commercial business environment.

Our product range is tried and tested for functionality, durability and value. In addition, on-going research and development is undertaken to ensure our clients have access to the latest technological advances and innovative designs.

Most of our imported products are designed to be locally customised to meet your, or your clients’ exact requirements. As such our systems are highly flexible, designed to accommodate almost limitless sizes and configurations.

Distributing nationally, we ensure control over our inventory by maintaining our own warehouses, as well as holding high volumes for each product so that we are able to meet the requirements of the contract market.

Our company is 100% Australian owned.

Name: Ace Office
Description: Ace Office Furniture Houston LLC is no longer accepting new orders.

Name: Modular Furniture and Office Interior
Description:
Welcome to MFOI - Your Trusted Partner for Premium Office Furniture Solutions in India

At MFOI (Modular Furniture & Office Interior), we specialize in providing top-quality office furniture solutions tailored to meet the unique needs of businesses across India. With over 25 years of dedicated service in the industry, we have earned a reputation as a leading office furniture brand committed to excellence in design, functionality, and customer satisfaction. 

Explore our diverse range of office furniture products, including:
~Office Chairs: Ergonomically designed chairs that prioritize comfort and support, helping to reduce fatigue and improve posture during long hours of work.
~Office Tables: Stylish and functional tables available in a variety of sizes and finishes, perfect for meetings, conferences, and everyday tasks.
~Workstations: Versatile workstation solutions that optimize space utilization and promote collaboration, fostering a dynamic and efficient work environment.
~Storage Solutions: Innovative storage solutions to keep your workspace organized and clutter-free, enhancing productivity and workflow efficiency.


At MFOI, we understand that the right office furniture plays a crucial role in creating a productive and inspiring work environment. That's why we go above and beyond to deliver products of uncompromising quality, crafted with precision and attention to detail. Whether you're furnishing a small startup office or a large corporate space, our extensive range of office chairs, office tables, workstations, and storage solutions are designed to elevate your workspace while ensuring maximum comfort and functionality.

Name: Mobiliario.
Description:
Who we are
We are leaders in the corporate furniture industry in Puerto Rico and the Caribbean, with more than 25 years of experience. We have a large selection of furniture from the most innovative brands and the best designers from Europe, Latin America and Asia. We maintain a large inventory on the island and can design offices, communal spaces, restaurants, outdoor spaces and terraces for each client's unique needs. Always functional, our furniture is durable, with differentiated and contemporary designs.  Here you will find furniture for the needs of your office, restaurant, café, terrace, hotel or collective space, no matter the budget. 

why choose us

We guarantee the quality of our furniture.

We have a showroom in the "metro area" and we have a large inventory with immediate availability.

We carry a wide variety of modern and functional office, restaurant, terrace & patio furniture.

We offer competitive pricing.
