We deliver anywhere in the world.

Name: Urban 411 Office Furniture
Description: Urban 411 is a premier provider of bespoke office furniture solutions, dedicated to transforming work environments for businesses of all sizes. We specialize in creating functional, elegant, innovative office spaces that enhance productivity and reflect your corporate identity. Our carefully curated product range—from collaborative workstations to ergonomic seating—ensures that every element of your workspace is designed with precision and style. At Urban 411, we partner with you to deliver tailored solutions that elevate your business, fostering a professional and inspiring atmosphere for your team.

Name: PT Armindo Intercorp (VIP Furniture)
Description:
We are an office, school and home furniture manufacturer since 1990, with our well known brand VIP that you can find all across Indonesia.
Our products are mainly made of metal and wooden panel. 
Our factory is located in Sidoarjo, Jawa Timur. 
Our head office is located in Tangerang.

Name: Coşkunlar Nak. & Marwood Office Furniture
Description:
"Coşkunlar Nakliyat ve Marwood, İnovasyon ve Hizmet Kalitesi İçin Birlikte Çalışıyor!"

Coşkunlar Nakliyat, "Çalışan Firma, Çalınmayan Zaman!" mottosuyla, ofis mobilyası lideri Marwood ile stratejik bir ortaklık kurmuştur. Bu iki lider, müşterilere en yüksek kalitede hizmeti sunmayı hedefleyen bir vizyon etrafında birleşmiştir.

Coşkunlar Nakliyat'ın lojistikteki başarısı ve Marwood'un ofis mobilyası pazarındaki bilgisi, hizmetlerimizi daha da geliştirecek bir sinerji yaratmaktadır. Artık, sizin için çalışma alanlarınızı en son ofis mobilyalarıyla donatabilir ve bu ürünleri zamanında ve sorunsuz bir şekilde teslim edebiliriz.

Bu ortaklığın, müşterilerimiz için yeni fırsatlar ve hizmetlerin kapılarını açacağına inanıyoruz. Coşkunlar Nakliyat ve Marwood olarak, tüm ihtiyaçlarınızı karşılamak ve her gün daha da iyisini sunmak için taahhüt ediyoruz. Daha iyi bir ofis ruh hali için, bize güvenin. Çünkü biz, "Çalışan Firma, Çalınmayan Zaman" prensibi ile hareket ediyoruz."

Name: SeatMate
Description:
About Us | SeatMate - Innovating WFH Comfort for Pets & Their People

Welcome to SeatMate, where we are pioneering the first pet-accommodating office chair solution, crafted specifically for the dedicated work-from-home professional and their beloved pet. Our story was sparked by a small Dachshund named William - a loyal companion with a knack for staying by his owner's side at all times. While his loving nature could occasionally disrupt focus, it was this bond that inspired the creation of the SeatMate Chair.

Our purpose is to blend function with comfort, fostering an ideal work environment that caters not only to the needs of the modern remote worker but also to the companionship of their pets.

In the pipeline, we're scaling our vision to accommodate larger pets. Keep an eye out for our future project, the Larger SeatMate Chair. We're excited to extend our unique office solutions to a broader pet demographic, enhancing WFH productivity and pet satisfaction alike..

Name: Systems Furniture Installations, LLC
Description: We provide the market’s most streamlined furniture delivery and furniture installation service to ensure your products arrive in perfect condition. SFI provides the trucks and the staff to pick-up your furniture and deliver it to any location. Our experts have experience in handling and assembling various sizes and styles of desk units, tables, file cabinets, bookcases, workstations, chairs and more. Whether it is a few cubicles or hundreds of workstations, our team at SFI will plan and coordinate for your next furniture delivery service. Ensuring a seamless process completed to perfection.

Name: propads.gg
Description:
Wir sind stolz darauf, innovative und moderne Brands mit unseren Sonderproduktionen auszustatten. Wenn Sie auf der Suche nach qualitativ hochwertigen Produkten sind, die von Profis getestet und genehmigt wurden, dann sind Sie bei uns genau richtig. Nutzen Sie das Mauspad als große Werbefläche, Partnerplacement oder Office-Ausstattung. Integrieren Sie unsere Produkte in Ihren Shop und fungieren Sie als Retailer. Konfigurieren Sie gemeinsam mit uns Ihre Premium Box mit Gimmicks und diversen Inlays und überraschen Sie Ihre Kunden und Mitarbeiter.

Als einer der Marktführer für Premium Custom Mauspads OHNE Mindestbestellmenge, hebt propads.gg ganz klar von den Standard Merchandise Anbietern ab. Jedes Produkt wird über Monate hinweg mit innovativen Methoden entwickelt und innerhalb von 48 Stunden mit Liebe im Süden Hamburgs produziert. Wir haben uns auf die Fahne geschrieben, einen Schreibtisch lebendig, Farbintensiv mit Scharfen Konturen und hoher Druckqualität einzukleiden. Um diesen Standard gerecht zu werden, lassen wir uns eigene Maschinen anfertigen, nutzen exzellente und mehrfach zertifizierte Tinte, Papier und Rohstoffe.

obiekty i zakłady przemysłowe i handlowe,

W naszej firmie pracuje około 180 osób. Średni staż pracy to 8 lat. Szacunek, zaufanie i uczciwość są dla nas wartościami nadrzędnymi. Szczególnie cenimy koleżeńską współpracę, bo dzięki niej udaje nam się osiągnąć wspólne cele jako zespół. Bardzo ważne jest dla nas przyciąganie i motywowanie dobrych pracowników  .
Stworzyliśmy ku temu optymalne warunki: przedsiębiorstwo z płaską hierarchią, interesującymi zadaniami i ciekawymi możliwościami rozwoju zawodowego.

𝗭𝗿𝗼́𝘄𝗻𝗼𝘄𝗮𝘇̇𝗼𝗻𝘆 𝗿𝗼𝘇𝘄𝗼́𝗷 jest dla nas równie ważny, jak stabilne relacje z klientami.
C + P jest pierwszą firmą na świecie, która w produkcji seryjnej zastosowała bezrozpuszczalnikowy proces powlekania zanurzeniowego. Proces jest nie tylko bezemisyjny, ale też prowadzi do oszczędzania energii.

Service client exceptionnel : Nous sommes là pour vous accompagner à chaque étape du processus. Notre équipe dédiée est à votre écoute, prête à répondre à vos questions, vous conseiller et vous offrir une expérience client exceptionnelle 

Engagement envers le bien-être : Nous comprenons l'importance du bien-être de vos clients et de votre équipe. C'est pourquoi notre mobilier est conçu pour favoriser le confort et l'ergonomie, créant ainsi un espace propice à la détente et à la satisfaction de votre clientèle.

Contamos con un equipo multidisciplinar y estamos firmemente comprometidos con la innovación y las nuevas tecnologías para mejorar la experiencia del cliente.

Name: Inkasa Indústria e Comércio
Description:
A Inkasa nasceu a partir de propósitos familiares e pelo amor e conhecimento em design e decoração. O know how no ramo moveleiro atingiu 20 anos e com isso surgiu a vontade de mudar de lado, expandindo a barreira de cliente para fornecedor. Essa expectativa tomou forma em 2005, com o simples questionamento: “Porque nós mesmos não produzimos nossos móveis/produtos?”.

A ideia virou realidade e tornou-se, de fato, um ideal, aliado à muita dedicação, foco e empenho.

O conhecimento de 2 décadas parecia não ser suficiente para ter o sucesso esperado nesse novo desafio, mas a base estrutural do negócio (“família”) foi o fator determinante para que os tropeços se tornassem uma empresa de êxito e com visão próspera.

Após 9 anos de operações corporativas e de iniciar seu processo de fortalecimento de marca, a Inkasa resolveu atuar no mercado B2C, abrindo as portas para clientes que tenham prazer em decorar sua própria casa. Mais um desafio para a família que se desafia há muito tempo.
Sejam muito bem vindos à nossa página e sintam-se, literalmente, “Inkasa”.

Name: JFDuffy Consulting, LLC
Description:
With the consolidation of manufacturers, expansion of the competition, new international manufacturers entering the market, the realignment of products through changes in distribution and the new workplace environment, contract furniture and architectural product manufacturers need to evaluate if their current sales and go to market strategies still apply.  For new entrants into the market, what is the value proposition that will encourage distribution partners and steer clients and designers to their products?

More importantly, how does the ever-changing landscape in the contract furniture and architectural products industries affect the manufacturers’ ability to remain relevant in both the short- and long-term specifically with the interaction and retainment of their customers? These are the areas where JFDuffy Consulting through its inherent and validated experience can provide clients with tangible value and results.

Name: Dream Advanced Projects Office Furniture
Description:
Dream Advanced Project office furniture is furniture that is both functional and stylish, and that helps to create a comfortable and productive work environment. It is furniture that is designed to meet the individual needs of each worker, and that allows them to do their best work.

 Dream office furniture is ergonomically designed to promote comfort and reduce fatigue. This includes features such as adjustable heights, adjustable backrests, and lumbar support.

Flexibility: Dream office furniture is flexible and adaptable to the needs of the workers. This means that it can be easily rearranged to create different workspaces, and that it can be adjusted to accommodate different types of work.

Technology-friendly: Dream office furniture is designed to accommodate the latest technology. This includes features such as built-in charging stations, cable management systems, and monitor mounts.

Sustainability: Dream office furniture is made from sustainable materials and is designed to be durable and long-lasting.

Dream office furniture is more than just furniture. It is an investment in the health, well-being, and productivity of the workforce. When workers have access to dream office furniture, they are better able to do their best work and contribute to the success of the company.

Name: Kabin
Description:
Kabin helps forward-thinking local and global companies build performance infrastructure that sustains excellence across every kind of mind — neurodivergent, introverted, and everything in between.
Kabin designs, implements, and measures cognitive environments that make sustained deep work, focus, and inclusion a tangible business advantage.
Most companies unintentionally erode their teams’ cognitive capacity. The modern workplace — endless noise, interruptions, and overstimulation — guarantees decline instead of supporting peak decision-making, creativity, and focus.
Kabin transforms this reality by combining physical recovery infrastructure with the systems, data, and leadership engagement required to make it work. From acoustically engineered pods and recovery environments to leadership frameworks and measurable ROI metrics, we help organisations turn cognitive performance from accidental sabotage to strategic asset.
We’re not in the furniture business — we’re in the performance business. Every Kabin installation is backed by neuroscience, data, and a clear business case for cognitive wellbeing and inclusion.

 Our mission: A workplace where every employee — regardless of cognitive style — can operate at their full capacity, producing better decisions, breakthrough ideas, and sustained innovation.

Name: RCS Innovations
Description:
Through its Retail Solutions Division, RCS Innovations provides fully integrated custom display fixtures and digital solutions that inspire higher levels of customer engagement and operational effectiveness for retailers and brands.
We provide expert design and development support, premium-quality fixtures and millwork from our advanced manufacturing plant, best-in-class interactive technologies, and exceptional support services such as installation, logistics, and highly responsive project management. 
&GO is our brand name for digital solutions. It is a highly flexible and scalable digital solution that solves friction in the retail environment, from ineffective call buttons to locked security cases. Built on the MS Teams platform, integration is seamless and cost-effective. The system provides retailers with critical real-time performance metrics. Our made-in-Milwaukee touchless electronic smart lockers support in-store fulfillment, returns, BOPUS, rentals, and vending to create a fast, frictionless customer experience.
Through its Commercial Interiors Division, RCS Innovations manufactures millwork, and provides furniture, and furnishings for a multitude of commercial environments, including offices, multi-family residential, churches and schools, senior living, and retail. Products includes frameless cabinets, countertops, closet and storage systems. 
Our Commercial Interiors team are experts in millwork design and development, furniture, space planning, workplace and retail strategy, ergonomics, and finish integration. We create and successfully execute innovative designs from start to finish at a cost-effective price.
Our long list of customers includes AT&T, Samsung, Harley-Davidson, Kohl’s, Microsoft, PVH, Jiffy Lube, Cousins Subs, IEWC, Chortek, Northwestern Mutual, Shorehaven, Pat’s Rib Place, Mandel Group, and Catalyst Construction, to name a few.
As our motto says, when you work with RCS Innovations, you can “Consider it done!”

Name: Sagal Group
Description:
We work with business owners and leaders to help you create working spaces that allow your teams to thrive and be the best they can.

We are an independent, privately owned British company with a long history in furniture and design, run by people who love what they do.
 
Our exclusive partnerships with high quality furniture manufacturers throughout the UK and Europe allow us to design and develop new products as well as tailoring our existing product portfolio to meet clients’ exact needs. Our clients are not bound by manufacturer specifications; we can alter size, colour and finish to create a beautiful furniture solution that is wholly unique. And if we can’t find exactly what you’re looking for, we’ll design it ourselves. So, whether you are an architect looking for something more, or a contractor, designer or project manager who needs a furniture partner, we have the experience, passion and agility to deliver.

A Sagal-designed workspace is one that meets practical needs with real aesthetic flair. Our furniture is not just beautiful; as part of a well-designed space it improves the human experience and makes being at work a pleasure. From the big picture (enabling more flexible ways of working, making a workspace feel more like home) to the little details (storage, power and data) we’ll work with you to deliver the perfect solution.

We work with our clients from initial concepts to installation and beyond. In addition to our uniquely adaptable product range, we offer workspace audits, space planning, 3D plans to help you visualise your space and the kind of customer service that makes everything run wonderfully smoothly.

Name: Caruso Acoustic
Description:
Caruso Acoustic was founded from Lamm’s extensive experience, a leading company in the manufacturing sector for over 60 years and a winner of many national and international awards and recognitions. Lamm has managed to combine its craftsmanship in processing materials with the latest research and design techniques to create unique, increasingly customised products. Bespoke design, quality and Made in Italy are the elements that form Caruso Acoustic’s identity.

Ever since it was founded, the brand has invested its resources in research for new materials, correctly interpreting the public’s needs and broadening its own horizons towards new possible applications. Our engineers are fully committed to designing and creating products that meet all existing legislation in the field of venue acoustics. Thanks to our highly qualified team, Caruso Acoustic also offers support during the venue’s design phase by conducting acoustic and lighting technology analysis, focusing in particular on the venue’s intended use. Conference halls, classrooms, libraries, restaurants, bars, sports arenas, gyms, hospitals, medical practices, stores and offices are just a few of the possible places where these products can be applied.

Given that its goal is to provide users with the best acoustic comfort, Caruso Acoustic establishes a close collaboration with architects so it can also develop complex, customised projects. The result is an environment, intended as a space for interaction, that has been created to accommodate and organise all daily activities.

Name: IOC project partners
Description:
International Office Concept becomes IOC project partners. 

After more than a quarter of a century of activity and specialised experience in the office furniture sector, IOC project partners now embodies the new generation of this historic family business that is ready to undertake new visions and define new horizons.  
IOC wants to be the best project partner for architects, designers and design studios. The desire to meet the demands of designers and the ability to find appropriate technical solutions together with the creation of new products with a renewed language, see IOC project partners committed to obtaining the best results in articulated projects that interpret the complex world of the contemporary office that is in complete transformation and has changing and iridescent nuances. 
In addition to the previous production, the result of a decade of experience in the creation of custom made partition walls, with the characteristic title of the new projects that adopt the names of Milanese districts, IOC project partners offers a new range of products that meet the evolving needs of the office world. The types of workspaces merge and blend with those of living spaces and the line between life and profession is increasingly thinner. 
Today, intellectual work no longer requires the presence of a static physical place. We work dynamically in the office, at home, on a journey in a sort of temporal and spatial continuum with blurred outlines. The traditional office and the classic desk lose the meaning of “hierarchy” in favour of a renewed search for open status and the idea of “luxury” is declined in a more sophisticated search for well-being for the operational moments of the day.

Name: Zioxi Ltd
Description:
Zioxi designs and manufactures smart charging Trolleys, Lockers, IT desks, collaborative tables and mobile powerHubs for multiple mobile IT devices, such as mobile phones, laptops, tablets, PCs and VR headsets. 

In addition, our unique software, ‘Zioxi onView’, helps organisations reduce their power consumption, use more green energy and stay in control of their IT devices. Zioxi onView is available across our range of charging furniture and gives organisations peace of mind when it comes to the safety and security of their IT investment.

We have an experienced in-house design team that creates inspirational work and study spaces like IT/STEM suites for any institution or company that needs flexible, IT-connected, multipurpose spaces. We have seating and other furniture that brings it all together too.

Our IT furniture is used in many private and public sector environments in the UK and across Europe, where device security and readiness are key. We supply a wide range of educators and employers including universities, colleges and schools, commercial offices, warehousing, retailers, emergency services and defence.

We design and assemble all our charging solutions in the UK and ship to Europe from our subsidiary in Dusseldorf. 

We believe:
– in strategic partnerships with IT resellers that create mutual value
– that mobile IT device charging should actively help study and workplaces reach net-zero
– furniture should be versatile and agile, so one space can be used in many ways, making IT easy to use
– in building great quality furniture that lasts and stays looking good

We work with selected IT resellers, to supply our smart charging furniture all over Europe and the Middle East.

Contamos con una estructura productiva de 2.000 m², preparada para desarrollar cada proyecto de principio a fin:
• Carpintería en madera con mecanizado CNC y procesos de alta precisión.
• Herrería complementaria para resolver requerimientos estructurales y funcionales cuando el proyecto lo necesita.
• Cabinas propias de pintura, lustre y laqueado, garantizando terminaciones controladas y de alta calidad.
• Equipos especializados para el armado y montaje en obra.

Esta integración nos permite ofrecer coherencia técnica, agilidad y excelencia, manteniendo el control total de cada etapa.

Con más de tres décadas de trayectoria, nos hemos consolidado como proveedor confiable para constructoras líderes y arquitectos reconocidos a nivel federal, participando en obras de alta complejidad y gran escala.

Nuestro compromiso es simple:
crear soluciones en madera que eleven cada proyecto, con la solidez y experiencia de un equipo que entiende la escala, los plazos y la exigencia del mundo corporativo y constructivo.

Name: Verfijnd Interieurmakers
Description:
“𝐙𝐞 𝐤𝐞𝐞𝐤 𝐚𝐥𝐬𝐨𝐟 𝐳𝐞 𝐝𝐞 𝐄𝐢𝐟𝐟𝐞𝐥𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐞𝐧 𝐳𝐚𝐠!” 


Is wat een van onze klanten zei toen zijn vriendin thuiskwam en de gloednieuwe kast zag!

En DAT is precies waar wij bij Studio Jasper voor gaan! 

 Wie zijn wij?
Studio Jasper (VOF sinds januari) is een jonge en frisse meubelmakerij en interieurbouwer in Utrecht. Jong en fris, maar inmiddels met al 12 jaar ervaring. Opgericht door Jasper van der Hoeven en nu in partnerschap met Timo Pol om de volgende groeistap te zetten.

 Wat doen wij?
Studio Jasper maakt en ontwerpt op maat gemaakte interieurs en meubels die aansluiten bij jouw wensen.

 Hoe doen wij dat?
Kennismaking → We bespreken jullie wensen, ideeën en plannen voor het meubel of interieur, inclusief mogelijkheden, materialen, afmetingen en ontwerp.
Ontwerpfase → We maken een eerste schetsontwerp en een eerlijke offerte op maat. Bij een JA! plannen we de opdracht in en spreken we de leverdatum af.
Oplevering → Op de afgesproken leverdatum wordt het project opgeleverd en laten we jullie met een tevreden glimlach achter.

 Wat is onze werkstijl?
Kwaliteit, vakmanschap en details spelen bij ons een heel belangrijke rol. 

 Waarom doen wij dat?
Ondertussen uitgegroeid tot een volwaardig bedrijf met 8 gedreven en gepassioneerde personeelsleden, een mooie werkplaats in Nieuwegein en zijn we (letterlijk en figuurlijk) flink aan de weg aan het timmeren.

We houden van ons werk, zijn gepassioneerd en als we daar dan ook nog klanten blij mee kunnen maken, dan is onze missie volbracht. 

Neem gerust contact met ons op, we vinden het leuk jullie verder te helpen!

Name: GUEGAN
Description:
L'HISTOIRE ETS GUEGAN :

Les frères Jean et Antonin GUEGAN ont créés la société Établissements GUEGAN en 1954, soit il y a plus d'un demi siècle.

Le but de notre établissement est de réaliser des travaux dans la pure tradition de nos Maîtres compagnons. 

Par la suite, Jean-François GUEGAN et Véronique DOULLÉ (frère et sœur) ont repris la direction de l'entreprise en 1989.

Ils ont pris la décision de moderniser les outils de productions, tout en gardant le savoir faire traditionnel de la menuiserie, afin de répondre à l'attente de nos clients.

- 1954 : Jean et Antonin GUEGAN créent leur société de menuiserie artisanale.
     - 1973 : La société devient la SARL Établissements GUEGAN.
     - 1989 : Jean François GUEGAN et Véronique DOULLÉ reprennent les Établissements GUEGAN.

Notre atelier est divisé en quatre secteurs :

     - un secteur de machines numériques
     - un secteur de machines traditionnelles
     - un pour le montage des ouvrages
     - un pour la résine et les matériaux de synthèse

Nos ateliers sont aménagés dans le but de réaliser tous types d'ouvrages associant la modernité et la pure tradition de notre métier.

NOTRE BUREAU D'ÉTUDE :

Notre bureau d'étude nous permet de concevoir des plans en 2D et en 3D de l'ouvrage le plus simple à l'ouvrage le plus complexe.

Grâce à cela, nous pouvons répondre au mieux à l'attente de nos clients.

Le tout en parfaite corrélation avec une démarche d'éco conception, d'une responsabilité environnementale en adéquation avec notre outil numérique.

Bienvenue chez Ets GUEGAN !

Name: GreyFox
Description:
We are an Irish furniture company that specialises in collaborative spaces, ergonomics and craft.

At GreyFox we observe, listen and answer to the fundamental needs of a complex society with a focus on human movement, user health and wellbeing. GreyFox is a research and design led initiative, whose ambition is to develop, produce and distribute high quality, humanized furniture solutions. As we move toward higher density living and working in urban environments, we lose touch with our naturalistic roots and biophilic requirements. Our focus at GreyFox is to reconnect you, through the critical heritages of being human. In reimagining how we work, learn and connect, our collections provoke joy & surprise!

On our small island, we have a concentration of some of the worlds finest craftsmanship and creatives. GreyFox takes pride in its range of representation of trades and industries. From woodwork and upholstery to industrial and furniture design, we try our hand at everything in-house.

Established in 2016, GreyFox is a collaboration between Thomas Montgomery Ltd, a respected multi-generational manufacturer, Walls to Workstations (W2W), a specialist interiors provider, and Perch Design, a leading research and design studio specialising in applied human movement.

Description:

Clients who chose Deluxe do so because it provides ease of doing business with one vendor who not only provides complete interior works, but also Mechanical, Electrical, Plumbing and HVAC works are done through Deluxe.

Deluxe enjoys a reputation as one of the market leaders in contracting and execution of offices/commercial interiors. It has the competitive advantage of also supplying furniture through its local manufacturing facility, as well as boasting an impressive portfolio of 30 furniture brands from across the globe, all of whom are signed agencies of Deluxe Furnishing Company.

Name: Crest
Description:
The Crest team has a simple objective – to supply high quality design furniture and accessories to help you ‘improve your interior’.

We do this in two ways - by working with a selected portfolio of suppliers, to ensure this ethos is delivered to the client on time every time, and by working directly with forward thinking designers, architects and end users to fulfil projects in sustainable and innovative ways.

We have a design-led portfolio of furniture, rugs and accessories, sourced from some of the most iconic manufacturers in Europe, and we are also very well connected with other providers in the contract furniture industry, allowing us to offer a comprehensive interiors service.

We aim to ensure that you get the very best out of your environment or project, whether it’s your home, working office, hotel, restaurant or educational establishment.

Our focus on quality, craftsmanship, and design sets us apart. Our carefully chosen partners use the finest materials and attention to detail to ensure that their products look beautiful and stand the test of time. 

Whether you’re refitting existing offices or relocating, our portfolio can provide a variety of styles and tastes to suit your design and budget, and you can be confident that our partners are all environmentally conscious and working hard to be sustainable for the future.

Our staff are all interiors lovers, who are very reactive to market trends and are always happy to advise. If you have a particular idea or piece in mind, or would like help with your design choices, we are happy to help.

We can arrange showroom tours depending on your needs and can also run group training sessions to introduce you to our partners and their products.

Established in 1996, we are proud to say that we are now in our 29th year in business.

ISO 9001:2015 | ISO 14001:2015
SafeContractor Approved
Sedex Supplier Plus Member | Committed to Sustainability Leadership

Family owned – design led; feel free to say hello!

Name: Horreds Möbel AB
Description:
Horreds manufactures and sells office and meeting furniture with many built-in added values. We summarize it with one word – “Rebel Quality” – which means that our products withstand wear and tear, design changes, and can be renewed time and time again. Long-term sustainability is also reflected in our environmental and quality certifications. We place great importance on every detail, such as surfaces, the feel of wood, stitching, and material combinations.

LONG-TERM SUSTAINABILITY
We love it when our customers have high demands, want customizations, or have other preferences. Production takes place in our own factory in Horred, Sweden. Since 1936, our ambition has been to create lasting impressions with long-term and sustainable design. Be the rebel with a purpose.

It was here, in the mill town of Horred, Sweden, that our grandfather Sven’s curiosity about the need for smart and functional furniture was awakened. At the age of 14, he began his journey in the furniture world by working for his father, who manufactured children’s and doll beds. It was his passion for craftsmanship and the unique character of wood materials that inspired Sven. At the age of 25, he purchased a piece of land to start Horreds Möbel in 1936.

INCLUSIVE INTERIOR ENVIRONMENT
For us, interior design has always been about much more than just furniture. It forms landscapes that are meant to support people, their flows, and different functions. Our focus is to contribute to environments where people feel comfortable, included, and where different functions are facilitated. Whether it’s collaboration, focused work, or relaxation, that’s what furniture design means to us – both then and now.

You're welcome to take a tour in our factory, just e-mail us!

Name: Formaspace Contract
Description:
Formaspace Contract is an international designer & manufacturer of client-driven custom contract furniture located in the heart of Austin, Texas. 

We started our journey in the laboratory and industrial sectors in 1981. There, we learned that only custom solutions satisfy the client’s vision, completely. At the time, however, custom furniture manufacturing was expensive and meant longer lead times. Born from the same innovation drive that animated our Silicon Hills (Austin metropolitan area), we set out to advance our technology and streamline our processes, bringing these costs and lead times down. We quickly became one of the fastest-growing companies in the contract furniture market, and now, we have become a trusted manufacturing partner to many dealerships and A&D firms nationally.

Our team is led by true Austinites — artists with a vision. And our vision is grounded by the best engineers and craftsmen in custom furniture design and manufacturing. Together, we create differentiated, successful designs — on time and at the lowest possible cost. 

Headquartered in one of the fastest-growing cities in the US, we are proud to serve corporate, hospitality, and outdoor needs through our custom, all-American-made furniture. 

To learn more about the company, contact them at 800.251.1505 or email them at hello@FormaspaceContract.com

The following companies belong to 706 Seating Group: Chairsupply, Spindl, BenCamp, Sit-On and Workware. We develop and produce chairs for home-, catering-, office- and healthcare facilities. Our chairs fit into the interior of meeting areas, reception areas, canteen areas and waiting areas. 

Chairsupply is a manufacturer in the office furniture industry. It’s an unique private label concept that creates ‘private brands’ for their exclusive dealer network in 22 countries. All chairs meet the highest European standards for office chairs and are offered with 5 to 10 years Full Guarantee. Chairsupply offers office-, conference- and work chairs.

Spindl develops, produces and promotes dynamic seating products. Each chair is equipped with a mechanism that ensures you to sit down in a more active position and it makes you correct your posture with your legs and your pelvis. The results are less physical complaints, more concentration and higher productivity.
‘‘Dynamic sitting is the solution’’

BenCamp is a company specialized in seating furniture from Italy, where we aim to offer affordable priced furniture. BenCamp and its brand names Sit-On and Workware mainly focus on the hospitality industry and on home-, office-, care- and project design. The companies have a wide range of design and functional chairs in every size, colour and option. The intermodal transport of the products and the use of sustainable materials also ensures that we do our bit to the environment.

We have over 25.000 chairs in stock, allowing us to deliver in the Netherlands, Belgium and Germany within three working days. For other European countries, we deliver within one week. We strive to support you with the best service in finding the right chair.

Name: König + Neurath UK
Description:
The end of uncomfortable office environments.

At König + Neurath, we know you want to create modern office environments that delight workers. To do that, you must design a stylish and functional space that promotes worker collaboration and inclusiveness and provides areas that guarantee quiet and seclusion from the distracting noise of a busy office.

Since 1925, König + Neurath has been one of the most successful worldwide suppliers of workplace furniture and room systems, helping architects and designers create exceptional spaces for their clients, including Google, Snapchat, and PricewaterhouseCoopers. All product research, design and manufacturing occur in-house at our family-run HQ in Karben, Germany.

Almost uniquely today, we control all parts of the production process, and as a result, it is as easy to make bespoke one-offs as it is to produce an extensive series of products. Our architect and designer clients value the flexibility to customise our room systems and furniture. We are proud of this collaborative approach; as a result, your work is always design-oriented, creative and agile.

As you should expect from German engineering, we are highly performance-oriented, and our products are technically superior and reliable. The acoustic performance of our room systems is market-leading, and workers are thankful for the increased productivity these tranquil and comfortable spaces offer. One quick demo in our Farringdon showroom will remove any worries you have about the room keeping external noise out and conversations in the space private.

So, please visit us at our showroom to see for yourself.

Name: Aizen Furniture
Description:
Aizen Furniture stands as a premier provider of high-quality and affordable office and school furniture, proudly manufactured in Turkey. Our commitment to excellence is reflected in the meticulous use of premium materials such as High-Pressure Laminate (HPL), Werzalit, Compact Density Fiberboard (CDF), and solid wood.

Materials Excellence:

High-Pressure Laminate (HPL): Renowned for durability, HPL ensures enduring resilience and aesthetic appeal, making it ideal for high-use environments.

Werzalit: Offering weather-resistant properties, Werzalit is a key component for outdoor furniture, providing longevity and resistance to environmental elements.

Compact Density Fiberboard (CDF): Recognized for its strength and density, CDF forms the backbone of sturdy and reliable furniture components that withstand daily use.

Solid Wood: Embracing the natural beauty and strength of solid wood, our furniture incorporates this timeless material, adding warmth and authenticity to our designs.

Custom Design and Standard Products:
Aizen Furniture takes pride in providing a diverse range of options. Choose from our ready-made, high-quality standard products or opt for custom-designed furniture tailored to your unique projects, ensuring a perfect fit for your specific needs.

Comprehensive Support:
Our commitment extends beyond product offerings. We provide comprehensive logistics support, ensuring the seamless and timely delivery of our furniture to clients. Furthermore, we offer on-site assembly services, providing a hassle-free experience from the selection phase to the final installation, ensuring every detail is perfectly executed.

At Aizen Furniture, we offer a comprehensive package of standard and custom design options, supported by logistics and on-site assembly services. This ensures that each piece meets the highest standards of quality, durability, and aesthetic appeal, providing our clients with exceptional furniture solutions from start to finish.

Name: Desky
Description:
At Desky we know from experience how sit-stand working, and a more active work life, can benefit your wellbeing and performance. 

That's why we're devoted to bringing you the very best of the best when it comes to office and gaming desks, chairs and accessories. We exist to promote the benefits of active working and bring fantastic items at a terrific price to Australians nationwide.
Our company believes in the innovative power of active working, to improve your performance and your sense of health and wellbeing. And we also believe that you are entitled to live free of discomfort and pain. 

For many years we have put up with the negative effects of our inactive lifestyles. It needs to come as no surprise that the old-style workplace environment is bad for our health, we merely didn't evolve to sit still all day. More and more people are making the leap to a more active work life. But there is still work to be done. Enter our standing desks!
When we realised how difficult it can be to discover the devices we knew people required, we chose to do something about it. 

Our team of furniture professionals have actually sourced the best sit stand desk products and elements offered from near and far, and assembled a series of sit stand desks, stand up frames, ergonomic chairs and devices to allow you to construct your dream office.

Furthermore, ROF's remanufacturing capabilities breathe new life into clients' furniture and turn workspaces into tech-forward collaborative environments, promoting creativity, teamwork, and well-being. From the initial meeting to delivery and installation, we ensure our clients enjoy a tailored, effortless, and stress-free experience. 

At ROF: 

- Since 1991, we are a minority woman-owned, family business.

GRR Ofis olarak, mekânsal ihtiyaçlarınıza göre konforlu, işlevsel ve ferah alanlar yaratıp hayatınıza değer katıyoruz. Gerçekleştirilen mimari keşiflerin ardından iç mekân dönüşüm proje tasarımlarını, kurumların gereksinimleri doğrultusunda plan üzerinde üç boyutlu ve daha gerçekçi bir hale getiriyor; firmamıza özgün yenilikçi ve verimli tasarımlarla sunuyoruz. Tasarımın bir süreç olduğunu bilerek her anı verimli kullanıyor, sonuca ilerlerken titizlikle çalışıyoruz. Her projeyi yeni bir soluk, yeni bir heyecan olarak görüyor ve çıtayı yükseltmek için var gücümüzle çalışıyoruz. Bu felsefe ile yürüttüğümüz ofis, konut, café, otel ve okul projeleri ile standartlardan farklı tasarımları hayata geçiriyoruz.

Grr Mühendislik Mimarlık İnşaat Sanayi ve Ticaret Limited Şirketi, 2015 yılında inşaat mühendisliği, elektrik-elektronik mühendisliği, makine mühendisliği, mimari ve iç mimari alanlarında nitelikli çözümler sağlamak üzere kurulmuştur. Alanlarında uzman ekiplerimiz ile gereken proje ve uygulama hizmetlerinin standartlara uygun ve yüksek kalite gözetilerek sunulması hedeflenmektedir.

Çözüm ortakları olarak 2018 yılında Burotime Ofis Mobilyaları bayiliği alınmıştır. Anahtar teslim projelerimizde Burotime çözüm ortağımız olarak bizlere sınırsız ürün gamından ürün gruplarını sunmaktadır. Farklı ölçülerde malzeme çeşitliliğinde müşterilerimizin isteklerine cevap vermektedir.

Diğer bir çözüm ortağımız olan Floraankara 2021 yılında Grr Mühendislik Mimarlık bünyesine katılmıştır. Yapay bitki çözümlerimiz ile birlikte ofis alanlarındaki mekanlara estetik ve görsel değer katmayı amaçlamaktadır. Yapay bitkilendirmeyi yalın ve orijinaline en yakın haliyle modern yaşam alanlarımıza  taşımaktayız. Mimarlara sınırsız çeşitlilikte yapay bitki, bitki duvarı ve yapay ağaçlar ile ilgili ürün desteği sağlamaktayız.

Precíz, megbízható csapatként olyan egyedi bútorokat tervezünk és gyártunk, amelyek nemcsak stílusosak, de kiváló minőségűek is. A részletekben rejlik a szépség, és mi odafigyelünk minden apróságra.

Ha Ön is olyan projekten gondolkodik, amelyben a bútoroknak kiemelt szerep jutnak, kérjük, ne habozzon felvenni velünk a kapcsolatot. Szívesen segítünk megtervezni és megvalósítani az Ön elképzeléseit, és együtt egy olyan tér létrehozásában működünk közre, amely az Ön vagy az Ön ügyfelei igényeinek és stílusának tökéletesen megfelel.

Legyen részese az egyedi bútorgyártás varázsának! Várjuk az együttműködés lehetőségét.

Description:
Beukenholdt interieur op maat  |  Écht Westlands vakmanschap voor uw interieur

Het ontwerpen, het produceren en het realiseren van maatwerkmeubels en complete (turn-key) interieurs is ons specialisme! Of het gaat om nieuwbouw, bestaande bouw en of complete verbouwingen voor uw woning- of bedrijf, wij zijn uw betrouwbare partner om u te ontzorgen bij het realiseren van uw nieuwe interieur.
Met onze hoogwaardige kwaliteit van onze producten, vervaardigen veelvuldig maatinterieurs voor zakelijke, duurzame projectinterieurs en luxere woonhuizen.


Écht op maat  |  De kracht van onze eigen productie
Eigen vakmensen, eigen innovatieve machines en onze eigen productie is onze kracht en uiteraard onze trots! Alle maatmeubel, interieurs of verfijnde onderdelen daarvan worden in door ons zelf ontwikkelt, geëngineerd en geproduceerd. Te integreren apparatuur of verlichting kunnen worden meegeleverd en in onze productie worden opgenomen. Bij ons is elk project anders, elk project uniek en écht op maat dus!


Advies & ontwerp | Graag denken we met u mee
Volledig op uw wensen afgestemd, kunnen wij naast produceren ook uw meubel of interieur vakkundig ontwerpen of (door-)ontwikkelen.
Weet u nog niet helemaal precies wat u wilt?  Of welk materiaal, welke kleur of welke indeling u wilt? Dat is geen probleem! Wij denken namelijk graag met u mee en kunnen u op gebied van kleur, materialisatie, duurzaamheid, logistiek, ergonomie en meerdere normeringen goed adviseren. Onze interieurarchitecten en -designers kunnen op basis van uw wensen een ontwerp-op-maat voor uw project, woning en/of maatmeubel maken. In ‘ontwerp-voorbeelden’ op onze website meerdere interieurimpressies en ontwerpen die wij gemaakt hebben.
Heeft een al een ontwerp of weet u precies wat u wilt? Super! Dan ontwikkelen we uw ontwerp of specifieke wensen in overleg met u technisch door, waarna we deze voor u produceren. 

Meer informatie: www.bhinterieur.nl

Name: SL Interiør og Kontor AS
Description:
SL interiør har lang erfaring som totalleverandør av interiørløsninger til bedriftsmarkedet. Vi skreddersyr kontorlokaler og hjelper våre kunder med alt fra interiørdesign til kontorinnredning. Vi tilpasser våre tjenester etter deres behov og garanterer rask og effektiv kommunikasjon. «Vi svarer telefonen»

Vårt team består av dyktige mennesker med stolthet til arbeidet og vi streber etter perfeksjon. Vår største glede er å se fornøyde kunder som kommer tilbake gang etter gang. Vi Jobber hardt for å bygge langvarige kundeforhold basert på gode rellasjoner, tillit og kvalitet.

Vi er forhandler av mange spennende og kjente produsenter av design møbler og interiør. Men vi har også møbler i alle prissegmenter, så dere finner garantert det dere søker til konkurransedyktige betingelser.

Våre kunder skal oppleve å få alt på ett sted, med stor grad av kreativitet, fleksibilitet, effektivitet og kvalitet. Enkelte kunder ønsker kun å kjøpe møbler, mens andre går for hjelp til «hele pakka». Vår interiør designer kan visualisere hele lokalet i 3D, slik at dere føler dere trygge på at dere har funnet deres drømmelokale før dere går til innkjøp av interiøret og kontormøblene.

Vi har hovedkontor på Trollåsen syd for Oslo. Så åpnet vi et ekstra showroom i Voldgata 15 på Lillestrøm i Juni 2024. På denne måten er vi godt dekket i hele Østfold, Oslo og hele Romerike.

Vi kan vel alle være enige om at godt arbeidsmiljø fremmer trivsel og arbeidsglede. Ta derfor kontakt med oss for en uforpliktende befaring av ditt lokale.

Name: SEDIA
Description:
Με περισσότερα από 40 χρόνια εμπειρίας στην κατασκευή καθισμάτων και επαγγελματικού εξοπλισμού, η εταιρεία μας προσφέρει ολοκληρωμένες λύσεις για γραφεία, ξενοδοχεία, χώρους εστίασης, συνεδριακά κέντρα και εξωτερικούς χώρους. Η παραγωγή μας βασίζεται σε υψηλή τεχνογνωσία, άρτια εκπαιδευμένο προσωπικό, σύγχρονες εγκαταστάσεις και πιστοποιημένα υλικά που εγγυώνται ποιότητα και αντοχή.

Η αποστολή μας είναι να δημιουργούμε προϊόντα υψηλής αισθητικής και λειτουργικότητας για κάθε επαγγελματικό περιβάλλον. Η φιλοσοφία μας στηρίζεται στην τεχνολογική εξέλιξη, τον σεβασμό προς τον άνθρωπο και το περιβάλλον, ενώ οι αξίες μας — ποιότητα, δημιουργικότητα και ομαδική έρευνα — καθοδηγούν κάθε στάδιο του σχεδιασμού και της παραγωγής.

Με σταθερή δέσμευση στην καινοτομία και την αξιοπιστία, συνεχίζουμε να εξελίσσουμε προϊόντα που ανταποκρίνονται στις σύγχρονες ανάγκες επαγγελματικών χώρων σε Ελλάδα και εξωτερικό.

Fiziksel ortam düzeninin çalışan bireylerin duygusal dünyaları ve performansları üzerinde ki olumlu etkilerini ortaya çıkaracak tasarım çalışmalarında renk uyumu, gürültü seviyesi, ısı düzeyi ve yerleşim düzeni gibi hususların doğru şekilde konumlandırılmasını sağlamaktadır. Laboratuvar projeleriniz de sürekli gelişen, değişen ürün ve hizmetler arasından sizler için hedeflenen tasarımın doğru şekilde kurulması adına çalışmaktadır.
Dünden, bugüne proje danışmanlık hizmeti, mimari ve mühendislik tasarım uygulamaları alanına yönelen firmamız anahtar teslim laboratuvar kurulumu noktasında sizlere çözüm ortağı olmaktadır.

Name: Coggin Sustainable Office Solutions
Description:
Today, companies cannot ignore the effect they have on their environment. Shareholders, regulators and, vitally, customers expect businesses to act responsibly in their commercial activities. Here’s how we help you do that:

The circular economy is a hugely cost-effective way for companies to reduce their effect on the environment while lowering procurement costs AND enjoying high quality products.

At Coggin Sustainable Office Solutions (Coggin SOS) we support SMEs and large industry leaders by helping them sustainably procure, maintain and then ethically dispose of their used office furniture.

If you’re a business looking to reduce both costs and environmental impact we can

 refurbish furniture you already have so you can continue to use it

 collect and recycle what you no longer need - with zero landfill use

 supply you with high-quality, refurbished furniture that looks and performs better than new

Coggin SOS adds years of life to office furniture before finally recycling all its components. Our products look and function ‘better than new’ - so environmental care doesn’t mean compromising on quality.

Here’s how we reduce costs - and your carbon footprint:

 Office furniture resale: we supply quality refurbished used office furniture to UK businesses. Reduce business costs and significantly reduce your carbon footprint

 Office furniture refurbishment: prolong use of your existing office furniture through, for example, seating refurb/reupholstery, desk refurb/resizing

 Zero-landfill office clearance: sustainably dispose of used office furniture through buyback, donations and recycling (with full, transparent reporting)

Coggin SOS exists to fully utilise the game-changing advantages for any business that wants to

- reuse existing furniture by reshaping or refurbishing it
- ethically dispose of unwanted furniture - with full reporting
- acquire high-quality furniture while reducing their environmental impact

Get in touch today to learn more!

All-in-one production: From metal to wood processing – everything is made in our factory in Poland, ensuring top quality and timely delivery across Europe.

Design: We collaborate with top designers to create modular systems, acoustic pods, and soft seating that respond to the changing needs of hybrid work.

Export ready: Experienced in logistics and cooperation with international architects and dealers.

Our portfolio: Desks & tables, acoustic solutions, soft seating, reception counters, storage systems.

 Let's discuss your next project: export@balma.pl

Name: Hecor
Description: Hecor Company was founded in 2012 in Foshan, Guangdong. Originating from office partition, we continuously explore solutions for office spaces and officially launched our Office Pod product in 2017. Currently, we are one of the largest Office Pod manufacturers in China. We look forward to exploring future office space solutions together with you and creating a better working environment.

Name: Linea Italia
Description:
Empresa líder en fabricación de muebles para oficina con diseño de inspiración Italiana, con más de 30 años de experiencia en el mercado nacional y 15 años de presencia en países como Estados Unidos y Canadá.

Brindamos soluciones que se adaptan a la evolución de la forma de trabajo, con colecciones que aumentan la productividad y el bienestar para las personas. 

Estamos constantemente investigando como proponer diseños de mobiliario con innovación en procesos de ensamble sin herramientas, materiales certificados que garantizan calidad, con el mejor servicio en proyección y líderes en tiempos de entrega.

Empresa 100% mexicana fundada en 1991, enfocada a identificar y resolver a través del mobiliario las complicaciones de uso y función en las áreas de trabajo.
 
Contamos con un departamento de ingeniería y diseño que se mantiene en investigación constante, para abordar los problemas y proponer soluciones flexibles. Rompemos el paradigma del mobiliario tradicional y nos basamos en las necesidades particulares que cada proyecto exige, la planificación es fundamental para dimensionar la armonía y funcionalidad de la colección propuesta. 

Ofrecemos una política de satisfacción y servicio de garantía por 5 años, con cobertura Nacional e Internacional. 

Comprometidos con el medio ambiente desde la concepción del mueble, se optimiza el material evitando el menor desperdicio posible, garantizamos que las maderas y sus derivados que utilizamos están fabricados con materiales procedentes de bosques gestionados de forma sostenible. La estructura de acero tiene un acabado UVI, con 0% de emisión de gases a la atmósfera. Nuestra planta de fabricación cuenta con un sistema de reciclaje y aprovechamiento de partículas sólidas de subproducto de madera.

Name: Furniture At Work
Description:
Order from an Australian-owned and operated company for the latest furniture at work solutions.
Here at Furniture At Work, we’ve done all the hard work for you. Researching trends, sourcing suppliers and curating a range that makes us the market leader in Furniture for any work environment. Manufactured for form, function and easy assembly to get your work environment up and running fast.
Browse and order from our selection online or talk to one of our team who are always happy to help you with product information and advice. They can also help you with projects and larger quantity pricing.
Our teams vast experience in this industry is your guarantee that Furniture at Work will be the best place to find your furniture at work requirements.
If you need even more choice or assistance, talk to us about adding design, project management or installation/assembly to your order.
Above everything else we are here to make you a happy Furniture At Work customer for the long term.

Name: Business Furniture Solutions (BFS)
Description:
We’re Business Furniture Solutions — but you can call us BFS.

We’re a South African office furniture company that’s been solving workspace chaos since 2003. Desks, chairs, collab zones, cable management — if it belongs in an office (and occasionally causes minor breakdowns), we handle it.

Our furniture is made locally, delivered nationally, and built for the realities of real work — from tiny startups to five-storey HQs with “hot desks” no one asked for. We offer full-scale solutions across South Africa, southern and central Africa, and our teams don’t ghost you after the delivery truck leaves.

 Level 2 B-BBEE
 Head office in Johannesburg
 Regional teams in Pretoria & Cape Town
 Local manufacturing in three SA-based factories
 National delivery and installation
 In-house designers, consultants & project managers
 Full control — from layout to last screw tightened

Need help with a new space, a messy floorplan, or a boardroom that’s seen better ideas?

 0861 11 000 11
 sales@businessfurniture.co.za
 www.businessfurnituresolutions.co.za

Name: AFD Contract Furniture Inc.
Description:
Premier Office Furniture in New York and Beyond.
AFD Contract Furniture is one of the largest and most respected full-service companies for office furniture in New York, across the US, and in Latin America. As one of the leading resources for furniture management knowledge, solutions, and services, we provide the corporate, healthcare, educational, automotive, and architectural/design communities with strategic planning, professional expertise and individualized attention on every project.

AFD represents over 300 of the best office furniture manufacturers, handling everything from small offices to large complex installations of office furniture in New York and internationally. 


FOLLOW US! 
Instagram: @afdnewyork
Facebook: www.facebook.com/afdnewyork

Name: OFGO STUDIO
Description:
Since 1980, OFGO STUDIO has been a comprehensive manufacturer of office furniture with experience in creating high performance workplace environments that fulfill the changing needs of the marketplace.

We embrace research and design to bring innovative ideas, products, and services to the North American furniture marketplace. We supply a comprehensive line of innovative workplace products, including desking systems, divider panel systems, seating, filing & storage, and boardroom solutions.

Customer focus is the key building block of our strategy. At OFGO, every action is shaped by a commitment to meeting and exceeding customer expectations. We have built strong relationships with our customers through our commitment, innovative design, and superior service.

With over 250,000 square feet of manufacturing space, OFGO creates products with a full range of design specifications. Our commitment as an organization is to design, manufacture, and deliver innovative, and environmentally friendly product solutions. As part of our commitment to health and wellness, as well as quality, environmental friendliness, reliability, and product efficiency, OFGO is certified to ISO 9001:2008 standards.

Name: Turf Office
Description:
Turf Office Furniture’s first-class, in-demand service works with businesses to create an aesthetically pleasing environment while discovering workspace solutions that are functional and professional.

We provide creative, cost-effective results that meet the unique needs of your business.

Turf experts do the work for you from concept to design to completion while absorbing your input every step of the way

Name: LAMM
Description:
Where tradition produces masterpieces

LAMM is specialized in furniture solutions for public spaces, and is able to offer complete installation projects for conference halls, auditoriums, educational and training halls, waiting and multifunctional halls – collaborating in close contact with the architects. The company includes production divisions specialized in upholstery and in the manufacturing of metal, as well as an in-house Research & Development service, a guarantee for a top-level, cutting-edge project ability. Research, quality and service are the raw materials for an excellence-driven production, in order to offer flexible and custom-made solutions, based on the client's specific needs in terms of function, size and budget.

The worldwide acknowledged Italian excellence

Since 1959, Lamm studies the balance between function and design, merging a well-established experience in the sector and a deep, craftmanship-based knowledge of materials and manufacturing techniques (metal and upholstery) with an industrial productive conception, committing external manufacturing only to the best specialists, with cutting-edge technological skills. No wonder if our seating systems are present all over the world, thanks to our efficient and widespread commercial network.

The outstanding quality of both the materials and the manufacturing, the multifunctionality of its solutions, the efficiency and reliability of its production systems and the strong commitment towards a sustainable development and the safeguard of the environment are all key values for Lamm, as proved by the achievement of certificates (such as UNI EN ISO 9001:2000, UNI EN ISO 14001) and by several international acknowledgements.

Name: EKA Hellas SA
Description:
EKA Hellas SA is a company which focuses on creating office and commercial spaces that are destinations for the human interaction. 
Our mission is to provide innovative solutions for organizations by delivering high-quality services, sharing knowledge with their executives & consultants and staying ahead of trends, so that they can enhance well-being, productivity, and sustainability in their spaces ensuring long-term growth.

EKA Hellas SA is part of EKA Group and was established in 1991, diverted its activities focusing on big projects mainly with underfloor air-conditioning and access floor.
In 2011 EKA Ltd became the exclusive Steelcase Dealer in Cyprus, and 3 years later Steelcase offered EKA Hellas SA the dealership for Greece.
In 2017 EKA Hellas SA became the official distributor of Interface, the leading global company in carpet tiles manufacturing.
The same year, EKA Hellas SA opened its official showroom on 1 Kifissias Avenue, 15123 Maroussi, where various educational activities, events and customers meet ups take place.
In addition, our company participates substantially in events organized by multiple national stakeholders, serving its expertise in line with market needs. Thanks to its strong shareholding and production basis, the company is able to ensure significant and long-term benefits to its customers and partners.
In conclusion EKA Hellas SA believes in generating long term value for its customers through efficient, reliable and quality focused service.

Name: Ergolain
Description:
Ergolain is a family-owned business with more than 28 years of experience in the furniture and design field. We take pride in offering not just furniture but creating solutions that enrich spaces with emotion and functionality. Behind this emotion lies ergonomics, care for employees’ health, and long-term well-being. Our distinctiveness is our sincere dedication to you, expressed through sharing our accumulated knowledge, experience, and ideas.

Our team is ready to bring your small, medium or large business vision to life – from personal expert furniture placement consultations to custom solutions for HORECA, healthcare, office, public and educational spaces – all at an affordable price. We will make sure your space serves you.

Name: Sancilio
Description:
We value your person, your space, your company.
We know your needs, your dreams, your prospects.
We know how to guide you every step of the way.
We are fast, but we also know how to stop and listen.

Do you need to upgrade your offices, with new furniture and IT equipment?
Do you want to rely on someone who can assist you on an ongoing basis?
Do you need to hire office computer equipment?
Do you want to furnish the garden of your facility?

Sancilio is always there for you: at your disposal since 1984.

 Furnishing and equipment for offices, kindergartens, elementary, middle and high schools, universities, beach resorts, health offices and hospitals
 Space planning
 Light design, lighting technology, indoor and outdoor lighting
 Acoustics and soundproofing
 Outdoor, home, contract and vertical garden furniture
 Computer accessories and equipment
 Technical and IT support (supply, rental and sale, consulting and repair, installation and management of company LAN networks)

Name: WorkSpace Interiors
Description:
WorkSpace Interiors is your one-stop shop for office furniture, design and facilities services. We believe that Success Begins Inside—inside the spaces where people work, learn, and heal. With locations all along East Tennessee (Tri-Cities, Knoxville and Chattanooga), we are a trusted commercial furniture partner, offering tailored services and solutions for small to large businesses, schools, government and healthcare facilities, and hospitality.

Come check out one of our three fantastic working showrooms we call WorkLife Centers. They're designed to show how we can create inspiring holistic workplaces. It includes settings for individuals and groups; some are owned, others are shared, and they can exist in open or closed environments.

Name: Be. Workplace Design
Description:
We create innovative, effective workspaces for clients of every size, in virtually every industry.  From design to installation and everything in between, we provide our clients with economically viable and environmentally sustainable solutions. 

Understanding and responding to our customers' needs and questions defines our way of doing business. We apply innovative practices and technology to ensure the goal of creating sustainable facilities is achieved, while giving our clients various choices for function and flexibility.

Be. Workplace Design is located in the San Francisco Bay Area with operational design studios and distribution centers which include owning and operating trucking services to ensure direct transportation with accurate and on time deliveries.

Name: Vivatech
Description:
Founded in 2018, Vivatech began its journey as a reseller of commercial interior products. Over the years, we have undertaken numerous challenging projects, steadily building a strong foundation of skills, technical know-how, and practical experience in application and turnkey build solutions.

We have proudly partnered with leading brands such as Featherlite Furniture, Likos Glass Partitions & Mobile Walls, and Welspun Carpet Flooring, catering to clients across Andhra Pradesh and Telangana. Our collaborations have allowed us to offer high-quality interior solutions tailored to modern workspace needs.

Today, Vivatech services both B2C and B2B segments, managing the complete process—from sales to installation—for small to medium-sized projects. Beyond product supply, we provide design guidance and customized solutions as value-added services, ensuring our clients receive not only the best products but also insightful and functional interior strategies.

Name: Franklin
Description: We help our clients grow, lower costs and improve productivity by creating high performing spaces that integrate architecture, flooring, furniture and technology.

Name: Kershner Office Furniture, Inc.
Description:
Kershner Office Furniture is a supplier for commercial furniture in the Delaware Valley. Now in its second generation as a family-run business, the Kershner name has become a greater-Philadelphia fixture for more than 40 years. With unmatched product knowledge, system designs and industry clout, Kershner Office Furniture can help you maximize your facilities, budgets and time - from 100 square feet to entire buildings. With our leading network of business owners, managers, real estate brokers and furniture wholesalers and manufacturers, we offer an insider's edge to office furnishing for customers large and small. 

Our expert teams combine more than 100 years of experience to deliver a customer centered approach to the workplace that helps you work more effectively. Representing some of the biggest and best names in the furniture business, Kershner Office Furniture helps integrate architectural products, furniture systems, seating, storage and related services in ways that improves your ability to respond to the changing nature of business.

Name: Workplace Inspirations
Description:
Workplace Inspirations is a young company, led by professionals having 20+ years of experience in this industry. 

Over the past years we have partnered with clients, designers and architects to create inspiring work spaces that transform the way that people work. 

We create the optimal working environment with you, based on space effective furniture design, ergonomics and people dynamics.

We offer a full range of services from space planning to procurement and installation of furniture.

Name: Flokk UK
Description:
Flokk is the leading manufacturer of high-quality workplace furniture in Europe, offering a wide range of seating solutions, tables, and accessories for working and public spaces.  

Combining internal expertise with renowned designers from around the world, we create furniture designed to improve the well-being and performance of its users, to ‘inspire to great work’. 

Flokk has over 40 years of experience in developing environmentally friendly furniture. With a systematic approach, using an ever-increasing amount of recycled materials in our designs and following a unique set of guiding principles, our goal is it reduce both our own and our customer's environmental impact, inspiring others to do the same.

Name: Continua Interiors
Description: MillerKnoll Certified Dealer | Integrating furniture, audio visual, and architectural solutions to elevate the art of getting work done. IL • MN • WI • MO

We believe that people are more productive when their work environment has been created holistically – when interior architecture, furniture and technology are seamlessly integrated to create a high-performance environment that meets their needs.

Our commercial insight, together with the ability to outthink restricted budgets and tight deadlines, means we deliver more while spending less. This ensures that every aspect of our service provides industry-leading quality and the cost-effectiveness that you demand.

” We look forward to working with you soon.”

Name: Woplek Office Furniture
Description:
Woplek is a leading Egyptian brand specializing in the manufacturing and export of high-quality home, hotels, and office furniture.
At the core of Woplek’s operations is a state-of-the-art factory, operating 24/7 and equipped with the latest technologies to ensure exceptional quality, efficiency, and consistency. Skilled craftsmen and creative designers work side by side, transforming carefully selected raw materials into furniture pieces defined by durability, precision, and refined design.
Proudly made in Egypt, Woplek supports the national economy by exporting locally manufactured products to global markets, reinforcing Egypt’s position as a trusted source of premium furniture. Our international presence enables a continuous exchange of cultures and ideas, enriching our designs and allowing us to meet the evolving expectations of global clients.

What We Offer
Manufacturing & global export of furniture
Wholesale solutions for traders inside and outside Egypt
Made-to-order furniture tailored to each client’s needs

Our Vision
To empower businesses and partners worldwide by providing access to high-quality Egyptian-made furniture, while supporting small and medium-sized enterprises and contributing to sustainable economic growth.
 
Our Mission
To achieve complete customer satisfaction and exceed expectations by blending traditional craftsmanship with modern innovation, creating inspiring spaces that enhance both personal and professional lifestyles.

Why Woplek?
Large-scale production capacity
3-years warranty on all products
24/7 customer support
Fast shipping within Egypt and internationally
Location: New cairo: chill out American college. South 90th st. , cairo, Egypt

Name: Workagile
Description:
Workagile is a furniture brand providing flexible furniture solutions that enable companies to easily and sustainably adapt to ever changing workspace needs. 

We believe that a truly agile space will always provide choice and our ethos is all about enabling our clients to create spaces that offer just that; 

We are favoured to be trusted by many global brands including Pfizer, HSBC, BT, Tik Tok, Deloitte, DHL and many many more..

With strong emphasis on the need for adaptability in today's ever-evolving workplaces, we conceive innovative designs that encourage communication,
collaboration and creativity around the world.

We'd love to support in creating agile, flexible workspaces. Visit www.work-agile.com to see more.

Name: Brito Office
Description:
Na Brito Office, estamos comprometidos em oferecer a você uma experiência excepcional na criação do seu ambiente de trabalho ideal. Somos uma loja especializada em móveis de escritório, fornecendo soluções inteligentes e funcionais para empresas e profissionais que buscam aperfeiçoar seus espaços de trabalho.

Nossa missão é transformar espaços e impulsionar a produtividade por meio de móveis que combinam design elegante, ergonomia avançada e durabilidade superior. Acreditamos que um ambiente de trabalho bem organizado e confortável pode fazer toda a diferença no desempenho e no bem-estar dos colaboradores.

Contamos com uma ampla variedade de produtos, incluindo cadeiras ergonômicas, mesas versáteis, estações de trabalho modernas, armários funcionais, acessórios práticos e muito mais. Nossa seleção é cuidadosamente escolhida para atender às suas necessidades específicas, seja você um profissional autônomo, uma pequena empresa ou uma grande corporação.

Na Brito Office, a qualidade é uma prioridade. Trabalhamos apenas com os melhores fabricantes e materiais, garantindo que nossos móveis sejam duráveis, resistentes e atendam aos mais altos padrões de qualidade.

Além disso, nossa equipe de profissionais altamente qualificados está pronta para oferecer um atendimento personalizado e orientação especializada em suas escolhas. Entendemos que cada cliente é único, e é por isso que nos dedicamos a encontrar a solução perfeita para o seu espaço de trabalho, levando em consideração suas preferências estéticas, requisitos de funcionalidade e orçamento.

Name: Rama Office Furniture

Name: NOI | Nashville Office Interiors
Description:
Nashville Office Interiors is your premier source for furnishings and space planning for commercial work environments. We partner with our clients to design interiors that make the most of both space and budget—beautifully.

Family owned and operated, NOI has been transforming and elevating commercial spaces since 1935.
Nashville
Knoxville
Chattanooga

Our professional, experienced staff—over 50 of us and counting—is trained, knowledgeable and focused on guiding your business to improved productivity through increased workspace flexibility. We're attuned to the latest trends, newest products and advanced approaches in commercial design. Aware that businesses today have ever-changing space needs, we respond with expert ideas for dynamic interior solutions.

With literally tens of thousands of square feet in showroom and warehouse space across the state, we're fully stocked and on the ready to respond to your business' unique needs.

Name: Harrows
Description:
Champions of social spaces. 

At Harrows our mission is to promote social interaction. Why? Because society is built on the interaction of people. Connection promotes health, happiness, creativity, wellbeing and performance. As humans, we naturally crave connection with others. We come together for all sorts of reasons, drawn to places that make us feel good.

We design and manufacture functionally clever furniture to inspire social interaction. Through our highly configurable designs and resources, we enable designers and architects to create spaces that foster human connection.

Building connections is a personal thing – real people, backing it up with real skills. Thoughtfully crafted designs made here in NZ by family-owned third generation furniture makers. With local design and manufacture you get complete control to re-envision each piece of furniture with a finish that is uniquely yours.

Name: Moventi Ltd
Description:
Moventi are designers and manufacturers of innovative and high quality office furniture and fittings for the ever evolving working environment.

We started by studying people in the workplace - how they work, where they work, how they collaborate and how new working practices are developing. This study formed the foundation of a portfolio of furniture that is not only inspiring but provides practical solutions for everyday activities in the workplace.

With a craving for good design and a commitment to quality manufacturing processes, Moventi’s portfolio boasts a comprehensive range of high performance solutions.

Name: Flexiform
Description:
Flexiform takes the stress out of office transformations. A specialist in UK furniture manufacturing and office fitouts, with 65 years’ experience, we offer services including consultancy, surveys, audits, office design, manufacturing, bespoke office furniture design & manufacture, stock & storage management, project management, furniture installation, and relocation. Clients can cherry-pick the individual services they need or simply use us as a one-stop-shop for their entire office fitout.

We design, manufacture and supply our own range of office furniture – providing a bespoke design and manufacturing service where required – and work with selected furniture manufacturing partners. Clients benefit from the ease and convenience of a one-stop-shop with an extensive selection of products, a wide variety of design aesthetics, and options for every budget.

As an ethical UK office furniture manufacturer, we’re heavily invested in supporting our clients and communities. We prioritise local supply chains and donate our services, expertise, time and products to charities in our communities across the UK. We equip our clients with high-quality, long-lasting furniture that helps their people to work (and rest) more comfortably, healthily and productively. We’re committed to reaching Net Zero on all our projects, balancing the amount of greenhouse gases emitted into the atmosphere with the amount removed.

Name: HNI GBSC
Description:
HNI Corporation is one of the largest workplace furnishings manufacturers in the world and an industry leader in residential building products. Founded in 1944 in Muscatine, Iowa (USA), HNI is a NYSE listed company with over $2BN in annual sales and more than 8,000 employee members. 
HNI’s Global Business Service Center was established in August 2019 in Pune, India. With 200+ members, this center currently provides best-in-class business services for Product Engineering, Supply Chain Management, IT Digital, Finance/Accounting, 3D Visualization Services, and Customer Service.

Name: wilsonbauhaus Interiors
Description:
wilsonbauhaus interiors is a full-service furniture management company! We provide the real estate, architectural/design, corporate communities, and governmental agencies with strategic planning, professional expertise, and individualized attention designed to meet their objectives. In addition, we offer architectural products and workplace research for companies of all sizes.
Formally known as Wilson Office Interiors and Bauhaus Interiors, these two companies merged in 2022 to form wilsonbauhaus and have over 50 years of collective experience.

At wilsonbauhaus, the client, architect, manufacturer, and dealership are the heart of our business. We are the team of craftsmen who strategically gather information, mold solutions, and execute a flawless finished result, bringing the vision of the client and the team of artisans to fruition. The wilsonbauhaus team focuses on bringing a wealth of resources, creativity, and knowledge to each project to ensure and maximize functionality, efficiency, and various work styles.

By providing a superior product, impeccable service, and competitive pricing, wilsonbauhaus directs our resources to achieve its primary objective of customer satisfaction, delivering a product, and service value well beyond the expectations of our customers and the industry as a whole.

Name: Reyona : Agencement & Rayonnage
Description: REYONA est une société spécialisée dans la fabrication de rayonnages adaptés à tous vos besoins d'entreposage et dans l'agencement de surfaces commerciales.

Name: TC Group
Description:
TC provides a wide range of office seating, desking, storage, conference and training furniture, exclusively through the trade, to clients across the UK and Europe.

With a firm focus on service and support we can supply the majority of our products, on a 24 hour lead-time, from our main logistics centre based in Birmingham.

Our goal is to exceed our customers' expectations in every respect. To achieve this we select products of quality and people with the necessary drive and integrity to reflect this determination.

Titan & TC are trade only suppliers.

Name: INDO INNOVATIONS
Description:
Established in 1995, INDO INNOVATIONS is India’s leading Office Furniture and Sports Infra Company .  

The company produces world-class workstations, desks, tables, storage solutions and various customized modular furniture. 

Indo Innovations also represents internationally acclaimed brands of USA, Malaysia, South Korea, China and New Zealand.

The company prides itself in a strong client base stretching from Fortune 500 firms to the world's biggest PMC's and Industry's most famous Architects.

Name: AJ Products (UK) Ltd
Description:
At AJ Products (UK) Ltd, we’re a B2B multi-channel supplier of workplace furniture, equipment and ergonomic solutions for the entire working environment – from the office to the canteen, as well as workshops, warehouses, schools and public spaces. Our UK office is based in Farnborough, Hampshire, and we’re part of the AJ Group, which includes 26 companies across 20 European countries. Our head office and central warehouse are located on the west coast of Sweden.

Our range includes over 15,000 products – a mix of our own Scandinavian-designed solutions and trusted brands. Alongside our sales companies, the AJ Group also owns three factories: our site in Poland manufactures wooden furniture, the Slovakia factory produces metal lockers and pallet racking, and our newest facility in Lithuania focuses on textile products and sound absorbers.
We’ve been around since 1975 and from day one, we’ve always put our customers’ needs first – from product development to reliable deliveries, responsive support and great service.

Today, the AJ Group employs around 1,100 people and continues to grow with a local sales office in each of the 20 countries we serve.

Name: WELL ERGON

Our products include : Cycle Station, Walk Station, Desk exercise bike, Smart laptop desk, Adjusted tables, Ergonomic chairs, Study table, and many more which will make sure you stay fit & healthy while you work.

Description: DESKIY is an Egyptian company specialized in manufacturing everything related to office furniture … Our start was by importing office furniture .. But with time we started to establish our factory specialized in manufacturing everything related to office furniture, relying on our experience in understanding the Egyptian market .

Name: Sinetica
