Workspace solutions designed to support new ways of working and inspire dynamic people. Since 1995, Sinetica has advanced the evolution of office layout with innovative furniture systems. A brand of Faram

Harmony Systems is in business since 1999, we have been designing and manufacturing innovative and conceptual products for Modular Office Furniture, Metal Storage and 24 x 7 Control Room Consoles/Control Desk. Our products cover all the requirements of Ergonomics, functionalities, Aesthetics Human Factor Design Standards. All our products changed the conventional definitions of workspace from boredom to joyful work. Our comprehensive service is a driving force for customer satisfaction and we offer our best capabilities to meet all customer demands.
Harmony Systems is an ISO 9001, 14001, 45001, and 50001 certified company and an active member of the Indian Green Building Council (IGBC) company. The latest CNC manufacturing capabilities go a long way in producing the international quality products that we provide.
Harmony systems capabilities -

•	Designing, Manufacturing, and executing Modular Office Furniture
•	Designing, Manufacturing, and executing Chairs

From 2021 TECHO was fully become a part of Ahrend family and we communicate under the name AHREND, but nothing will change. It is still us.
Royal Ahrend is one of the largest European producers of office furniture, and with a history stretching back to the 19th century, it is also one of the oldest. Its clients include major banking houses, financial institutions, multinational companies, and public sector organisations. Royal Ahrend has an extensive network of branches across the globe. Additionally, we are dedicated to providing exceptional customer service and satisfaction. With our expertise and dedication, you can easily create a productive and comfortable workspace that you can appreciate for years to come.

Name: CultureSpace
Description:
For more than 40 years, CultureSpace has been redefining workspaces, combining our role as a leading furniture provider with our expertise in creating engaging and community-focused environments. Our services extend beyond traditional office furnishings, combining functionality with design, carefully chosen to reflect your company’s identity and delivered with our signature white-glove, direct-from-manufacturer service. 

Partnering with us means elevating your office to an experience that reflects your company’s character, manifests your culture, and engages your talent. 

Welcome to the new era of office furnishing with The Art of the Workspace.

Name: Zebro Officemate Private Limited
Description:
Zebro Officemate Pvt. Ltd., incorporated in 2003 is a leading office furniture manufacturing company that ensures high-quality ergonomically designed office furniture solution to infuse comfort in day-to-day life. Headquartered in Chennai and with branches spread across India, we are equipped with complete state-of-the-art infrastructure and technology to manufacture Modular and Chair Units. 

The key components used are rigorously tested as per the guidelines laid down by ANSI/BIFMA standards. The furniture is aesthetically crafted for ultimate comfort and perfect functionality using carefully selected high-quality materials, respecting the customers' time, energy, and financial investment.

We evolved with every change in modern offices and develop our products in terms of functionality, design, and ergonomics.

Name: Sonichive
Description:
We distribute VR series pods in UAE and Globally, backed by 36 years of experience in the industry. Our commitment to innovation ensures that each Sonic Hive sound booth sets new standards in acoustic technology. Established in 2008, we continuously refine our products with expertise and innovation, operating from Asia's largest acoustic lab to deliver unparalleled quality and performance. We empower businesses and individuals to create customized sound experiences. Nowadays, we offer a variety of product lines suitable for both commercial and personal needs.

Product line

Solo silence booth (S)
Ideal for individuals needing focused work time without distractions.

Duo silence booth (M)
Perfect for pairs or small teams looking for a quiet space to collaborate effectively.

Quartet silence booth (L)
Great for groups of up to four people seeking a secluded environment for discussions or meetings.

Hexa silence booth (XL)
Designed for larger groups, ensuring ample space and tranquillity for productive gatherings.

Home pod
Our versatile solution for creating a peaceful workspace at home, promoting concentration and productivity.

Name: macotosa design
Description: Macotosa Design, S.L. is a company founded in 1988, specializing primarily in the comprehensive development of office, contract, residential, and hotel equipment projects. The team, led by Ramón Toribio, has grown proportionally to the activities undertaken. Our facilities are located in Tomelloso (Ciudad Real), Spain. In recent times, the demand from our clients has led us to expand our scope of work to include complete interior design services for projects previously designed by us. Throughout our professional trajectory, we have maintained collaborations with construction companies, decorators, interior designers, and architects, participating in competitions and jointly developing projects. Recently, we have acquired machinery to produce custom furniture as the demand for such furniture from our clients has increased. Our working method begins with a thorough study of the client's needs and objectives. We analyze problems in their entirety, explore all possibilities to resolve them, and implement agreed-upon solutions. In carrying out our work, we collaborate with leading brands, aiming to offer our clients products of maximum quality with avant-garde designs and high-quality finishes. Currently, we operate throughout the national territory and in countries such as Morocco, Algeria, and all of Latin America.

Name: somLock   | VMS Elektronik
Description:
Driven by a passion for electronics since 1995, somLock specializes in smart electronic locking technologies that enhance comfort, safety, and efficiency in modern environments.

As Turkey’s first producer of eco-conscious locker locks, somLock has redefined access control with innovative solutions that combine sustainability, low power consumption, and sleek digital integration. Our signature product, the miniK10, is among the world’s first environmentally friendly smart locks — designed for minimal energy use and maximum user convenience.

Our cloud-connected and mobile-accessible systems deliver secure, user-friendly, and modern storage experiences across various industries, including:

Coworking offices
Staff lockers
Spas & wellness centers
Schools & universities
Hospitals & healthcare facilities

 Up to 10 years of battery life
 Easy lock management via hopinlock mobile app
 Compatible with all cabinet types
 Unique locking mechanisms tailored for high-traffic environments
 Quick and simple assembly and integration
 Iconic design that blends aesthetics with functionality

Our mission is to empower shared and private spaces with intelligent, durable, and sustainable locking solutions, trusted by architects, designers, furniture manufacturers, and facility managers around the globe.

We believe that our client’s success is our success, so we go the extra mile in terms of exceptional quality, work ethics, and design novelty to achieve that mutual goal.

En la actualidad, somos líderes en el mercado internacional por la calidad, diseño, tecnología, innovación y competitividad, estando presentes en más de 125 países.

WE MANUFACTURE SEATS. We started manufacturing seats in 1994, and from the very beginning we have always aimed our effort and work at achieving a differentiation from the regular existing solutions available on the market, by developing seats which combine concepts such as the spectators’ comfort, the durability in all possible market sectors and situations, and the design, thus contributing to the beauty and exclusiveness of every project.
We are currently leaders in the global market because of quality, design, technology, innovation and competitivity, being already present in more than 125 countries.
We carry out the 100% of the manufacturing process, from the beginning to the end, so we can be adapted to any customer needs, developing seats according to the highest quality standards.

Name: MVMT
Description:
MVMT is redefining the concept of workspaces, both at home and in corporate environments, with a range of dynamic furniture. Our desks and meeting tables come equipped with electric actuators, allowing for adjustments in height to ensure optimal ergonomics and work comfort, whether sitting or standing.

In MVMT, technology gracefully merges with high-end, carefully crafted designs, produced on demand by skilled European artisans. We make use of the most noble materials – marble, solid wood, stainless steel, and linseed gum – with a single objective: to reconcile beauty and ergonomics.

Born from this ambition is an inspired range echoing the influential works of 20th-century designers such as Gio Ponti, Pierre Jeanneret, and Maria Pergay. Furthermore, MVMT assists architects and decorators in creating entirely bespoke dynamic furniture, from one-of-a-kind pieces to large series.

In addition, MVMT caters to customized requests for comprehensive office space layout projects, managing everything from the concept to the handover of keys. Our expertise spans architecture, fittings, custom furniture, and sourcing.

Name: Get Comfy
Description:
How can a 6-minute in-store trial reveal if a chair will be comfortable for 12 hours?

This question gave birth to Get Comfy.

Get Comfy was created during COVID-19 when the entire world was working from home. It was driven by the struggle to find a high-quality ergonomic chair at a reasonable price. Our founder was frustrated by the overwhelming number of options, expensive prices, and the difficulty of finding comfort from a short in-store trial.

To solve this, Get Comfy offers a 30-day free trial period with no hidden charges.

Ready to experience true comfort and support? Find your perfect ergonomic chair today!
www.getcomfy.co.il

Name: Diversified Services Bermuda Ltd
Description:
Diversified Services (DSB) was established in 1990 by Alan & Suzanne McKay. Since Alan's retirement in 2019, DSB is now run by their daughter Susan Buchanan, who joined the company over 18 years ago. DSB is one of the largest suppliers of office furniture in Bermuda. From the start, DSB flourished and has had the support of many long-standing clients and an excellent service team. 

Staff: Over the years DSB has had a great service team; all Bermudian, all certified and have vast experience. We provide full warranty on all products installed. We also employ a team of part-time installers who we can call upon at a day’s notice to help with large and 'outside of standard hours' projects. We aim to please and work conveniently with all our clients at home or in the office. It is of the utmost importance to us that we keep you happy!

Transport: We co-ordinate all of our own freight logistics from the time the product leaves the manufacturer, to delivery here on the Island. Bermuda Forwarders transports our local containers on our behalf and we do all customs clearances in-house.

Service: We take pride in providing "quality and efficient service", as service is the back-bone of any successful business. We feel that to survive the ups and downs in this unique marketplace, customer service must and will come first to keep our business growing.

Name: SIGMA OFFICE
Description:
Η SIGMA OFFICE συνθέτει ευχάριστα περιβάλλοντα εργασίας, με έπιπλα γραφείου υψηλής ποιότητας και αισθητικής, για κάθε επιχείρηση η οποία ενδιαφέρεται να διαμορφώσει μια ξέγνοιαστη και δημιουργική εργασιακή κουλτούρα.

Με τη βοήθεια ειδικών συμβούλων, οι πελάτες της μπορούν να επιλέξουν και να διαμορφώσουν εξατομικευμένες λύσεις για τον χώρο εργασίας τους, αποκτώντας έτσι τη δυνατότητα να εργαστούν ήρεμοι και ελεύθεροι να δημιουργήσουν .

Οι αξίες μας:
Σε ένα περιβάλλον ειλικρίνειας και ηρεμίας προσφέρουμε στους πελάτες μας την ευκαιρία να ζήσουν την εμπειρία της SIGMA και να δημιουργήσουν τον χώρο εργασίας που τους αρμόζει. Με διαφάνεια σε κάθε επίπεδο της συνεργασίας και αξιοπιστία σε κάθε μας βήμα κάνουμε τους πελάτες να νιώθουν ασφαλείς και σίγουροι για την επιλογή τους.

Ο στόχος μας:
Στόχος μας είναι η τεχνογνωσία και η ενέργεια της SIGMA να βρίσκεται μέσα σε κάθε επιχείρηση που θέλει να προχωρήσει μπροστά, να διευκολύνει και να καλλιεργεί ένα ευχάριστο περιβάλλον εργασίας και να δίνει σε κάθε
εργαζόμενο τα εργαλεία που χρειάζεται για να δημιουργήσει.

Το όραμά μας:
Όραμα μας είναι να βρισκόμαστε σε κάθε επιχείρηση, βελτιώνοντας την καθημερινότητα των εργαζομένων, προσφέροντας μία εμπειρία καλύτερης εργασίας και ποιότητα ζωής.

Name: DPO Furniture Services
Description:
Our director, David O'Callaghan, has been involved in the office furniture industry since 2005 and after nearly 20 years he has gained extensive industry knowledge and close network of construction, design, manufacturer and contractor contacts.



Beginning as MCI(Melbourne Commercial Installation) in 2016, David played a key role in developing industry processes, systems and expectations and ushering the customer-subcontractor relationship into the modern age. 



The onset of COVID in 2020 and it's extended industry impact through the following years presented a shift in industry dynamics. This saw a need for change in the way that furniture services are managed, organized and executed. And so from this, DPO Furniture Services was born - a lean, highly specialized portfolio of furniture industry services that provide the flexibility and adaptability that meet the evolving needs of the industry and it's stakeholders.

Static walls and inflexible spaces are a constraint to productivity, and the truly open-plan doesn’t work. Considering current hybrid and agile working models, the workforce need a mix of choice, privacy and collaboration. 

So we are on a mission to support this, and help workspace creators produce the very best environments, fulfilling our vision: to enable everyone to do their best work in the workspace.

Name: Klappt.
Description:
Klappe auf für mehr Platz.

Klappt. ist das klappbare Homeoffice für deine 4-Wände. Ein höhenverstellbarer Wandschreibtisch, der all deine Bedürfnisse nach einem funktionalen, ergonomischen und stylischen Homeoffice erfüllt. Klappt. schafft mehr Raum auf kleinem Raum und erleichtert mit Funktionen wie Höhenverstellbarkeit, Tageslichtlampe, Beleuchtung für Video Calls und Monitorhalterung sowie cleveren Accessoires deinen Arbeitsalltag. Das Beste: Nach Feierabend klappst du deinen Arbeitsplatz einfach zu. Ciao Laptop, Kabel- & Zettelchaos. Übrig bleibt ein kleines, feines Versteck, das sich harmonisch und absolut zeitlos in dein Zuhause integriert.

Klappt. wurde 2022 von Mark und Karoline gegründet, als sie selbst auf der Suche nach einer funktionalen Lösung für ihre Homeoffice-Situation waren.
Erhältlich sind die Produkte auf www.klpt.de.

Name: Kilab AS
Description:
Kilab AS is a Norwegian company founded in 1988, with development and sales of laboratory furniture and fume cupboards.  
From a modest turnover in the beginning we have grown slowly, and today we have become a major supplier in Norway in our field. 

Since the beginning we have always focused on the customers, and their needs and wants. In cooperation with our customers, whether it is the end user, contractor, the builder or architect, we try to understand the requirements and adapt our solutions accordingly.

We listen, think, give advice, design, deliver, install and finalize - always.

Name: Affe Acoustic
Description:
Affe on akustisten tilaelementtien ja akustiikkatuotteiden muotoilu ja projektikalustamisen asiantuntija.

Affe saa inspiraationsa Affect-sanasta, joka tarkoittaa tunnetilojen vaikuttamista. Meidän tarkoitus on toteuttaa ratkaisuja, jotka vähentävät häiriötekijöitä ja melutasoa, jolloin työympäristöstä tulee rauhallisempi ja tehokkaampi. Ratkaisumme edistävät työntekijöiden hyvinvointia, vähentäen stressiä ja väsymystä. Varmistamme, että tilasta tehdään esteettisesti huoliteltu ja toimiva kokonaisuus, joka tukee myös yrityksen brändiä ja viestii arvokkuutta. Uskomme laadukkaisiin, pitkäikäisiin ja muuntautuviin ratkaisuihin, jotka istuvat niin tilan kuin budjetinkin tarpeisiin. 

Affe on ylpeästi vuoden 2026 kulttuuripääkaupungin Oulu2026 Business Clubin jäsen ja yhteistyökumppani.

Name: Wood Station

Description:
Muebles Cordero es una empresa costarricense con más de seis años de experiencia en el diseño, fabricación e instalación de mobiliario de alta calidad. Nos especializamos en cocinas, closets, baños, puertas y rodapiés, ofreciendo soluciones funcionales, personalizadas y estéticamente atractivas.

Name: IBIS Design Pvt Ltd
Description: At IBIS Design, we believe great spaces inspire great work. We create environments that feel as comfortable as home but built for productivity and collaboration. From modular furniture and ergonomic seating to tech-integrated interiors, every design is crafted to adapt, evolve, and elevate the way people work. Guided by our “Like Home” philosophy, we bring warmth, functionality, and innovation together to help teams connect, create, and thrive.

Name: Mobles.co
Description:
En Mobles, soñamos con un mundo donde las personas no solo trabajen para vivir, sino que disfruten cada momento en su espacio de trabajo . Creemos firmemente que un entorno bien diseñado no solo aumenta la productividad , sino también el bienestar y la felicidad de quienes lo habitan . Por eso, nuestra misión va mucho más allá de ofrecer muebles de oficina; nos dedicamos a crear experiencias, espacios que inspiran a ser mejores cada día.

Sabemos que cada empresa tiene sus propias necesidades y desafíos, y por eso nos comprometemos a entender a fondo lo que buscan nuestros clientes . Trabajamos mano a mano con ellos para ofrecer soluciones personalizadas que optimicen su espacio de trabajo . Desde escritorios ajustables hasta sillas ergonómicas que cuidan tu salud postural , diseñamos cada detalle pensando en la funcionalidad y el confort de tus equipos.

Nuestra promesa es siempre dar más de lo que esperas . Nos esforzamos por ofrecer un servicio de valor superior, donde cada cliente no solo quede satisfecho, sino también impresionado por los resultados. Nos enorgullecemos de ser una empresa colombiana  comprometida con la calidad en cada uno de nuestros productos, porque entendemos que un espacio bien equipado es la clave para el éxito de cualquier negocio .

En Mobles, calidad no es solo una palabra, es nuestro compromiso diario . Trabajamos con pasión y dedicación para asegurar que cada proyecto refleje nuestro estándar de excelencia. Ya sea que estés comenzando con una oficina desde cero o buscando renovar tus espacios actuales, estamos aquí para ofrecerte soluciones innovadoras que transformen la manera en que trabajas y vives tus horas de oficina .

Transforma tu espacio de trabajo en un lugar donde tus ideas fluyan y tu equipo prospere . Con Mobles, no solo obtienes mobiliario, obtienes una experiencia completa que potencia tu bienestar y productividad día tras día. Contáctanos hoy mismo y descubre cómo podemos ayudarte!

Kylan's philosophy is to create individually tailored and aesthetically pleasing office environments. All our solutions strive to maximise the office's potential with visually appealing and highly functional solutions designed to meet your needs.

Industry-leading warranties and service ensure that when you deal with Kylan, you're dealing with people who care—after all, it's how we grow our business and how we help grow yours!

Description: Fabricante de mobiliario de oficina, escolar y vestuario

Name: Braille 4 U
Description:
Braille 4 U se dedica a la creación y fabricación de soluciones y elementos con texto en Braille. A la adaptación y creación de señalética y rotulación accesible para edificios, monumentos, museos, y otros edificios públicos, con pictogramas y texto en alto relieve y Braille de acuerdo a la normativa española vigente UNE 170002:2022 Requisitos de accesibilidad para la rotulación.

Además de:
Regalos, recuerdos, placas y artículos de uso doméstico o personal con grabaciones braille (ayudas tiflotécnicas).

Name: T&C Projects
Description:
En T&C Projects diseñamos y fabricamos mobiliario tapizado a medida y realizamos la fabricación integral de piezas personalizadas. Integramos en nuestras instalaciones la carpintería, metalistería y tapicería tradicional, lo que nos permite ofrecer una solución 360°: desde el diseño y prototipado hasta la producción final, con control total de calidad, plazos y acabados.

Trabajamos para residencial y contract, colaborando con interioristas, arquitectos, diseñadores, decoradores, estudios creativos y tiendas profesionales. Nos avalan la visión técnica, la atención al detalle y una alta flexibilidad productiva para adaptar cada proyecto a las necesidades del cliente.

Contamos con un departamento exclusivo, “La Sastrería”, donde transformamos diseños en piezas únicas: desarrollamos volúmenes complejos, estructuras personalizadas y empleamos tejidos y espumas técnicas para lograr resultados funcionales, duraderos y estéticamente potentes.

Experiencia en espacios contract: hoteles, restaurantes, bares, salas de espera, tanatorios, escaparatismo, oficinas y retail. Cumplimos normativas y exigencias técnicas sin renunciar al diseño ni al confort.

Además, disponemos de colección propia de mobiliario, personalizable en medidas, tapizados, acabados y estructuras, ideal para estudios y marcas que buscan valor diferencial.

Nuestra filosofía: Calidad · Servicio · Confort. Seleccionamos materiales de alto rendimiento, incorporamos innovación en tejidos, espumas y estructuras y validamos cada producto en I+D y control de calidad, evaluando ergonomía, sostenibilidad y durabilidad.

Transformamos espacios a través del diseño, con precisión, compromiso y pasión por el detalle.

Name: Oscar Okul Öncesi ve Eğitim Araçları San. ve Ltd.
Description:
Türkiye'nin Okul Öncesi, İlk Öğretim, Orta Öğretim, Üniversite ürün grubundaki gelişimine liderlik etmek için yola çıkmış olan OSCAR tecrübesini hizmete dönüştürmeye devam ediyor. Ana Okulu Mobilyalarından Park Bahçe Oyun Gruplarına, Labaratuvar Malzemelerinden LED Akıllı Tahta ürünlerine kadar çok geniş ürün yelpazesiyle sizlere hizmet vermekteyiz.

Okul öncesi, ilköğretim, orta öğretim ve üniversite grubunun ihtiyaçlarını karşılayarak, eğitim kurumlarının ihtiyaç ve taleplerine uygun, tatminkâr ürünleriyle, servisi ve hizmetiyle beklentilerinize cevap vermekteyiz. Daima sağlam, güvenilir, çevre dostu ve ergonomik ürünler üreten OSCAR, eğitimde verimliliği arttırmak isteyenler için bir alternatiftir. Çok çeşitli eğitim öğretim materyalleri ile beklentilerinize uygun çözümler üretmekteyiz.

Ulaşılabilir fiyatlarla  eğitim kurumları sektörü için kullanışlı, yalın ürünlerin bulunabildiği Eğitim Araçları markası olan OSCAR, çocuk eğitimini güvenli, keyifli hale getirir ve yeteneklerini geliştirme imkânı sunar. Her türlü hizmet ve servis beklentisine kısa süreli ürün teslimatı ile OSCAR’DA karşılık bulabilirsiniz. Her seviyede eğitim kurumları okul ihtiyaçları ve eğitim araç gereçleri ve Eğitim Materyalleri için sizlerin hizmetindeyiz.

Aqui cada peça de mobiliário é mais do que um produto—é uma ponte para o futuro. Equipamos igrejas onde a fé se fortalece, escolas onde o conhecimento floresce, escritórios onde grandes ideias tomam forma, auditórios onde eventos ganham vida e salas de recepção onde o conforto faz a diferença.

Description:

At Ad23, we believe that great collaboration starts with great enabling furniture. The designs and layouts of furniture have the potential to shape how an organization facilitates collaboration.

As the world evolves, so do work environments. Traditional layouts featuring only desks and chairs no longer meet the diverse needs of modern workplaces. At our company, we specialize in providing solutions for organizations seeking to foster collaboration among their teams. We offer a range of adaptable spaces tailored to different work styles. Whether it's providing quiet areas for focused tasks or creating dynamic environments for collaborative projects, our furniture designs empower individuals to work according to their specific needs.

As we continue to evolve and grow, our commitment to craftsmanship, innovation, and quality remains unwavering. Join us as we shape the future of workspaces in India, one collaborative piece of furniture at a time.

Name: One Source Retail & Hospitality

One Source prides itself on having achieved the expertise and capabilities of much larger furniture companies, while maintaining the flexibility and responsiveness you would expect from an entrepreneurial company. Here are just a few of the things that make us different:

Our products are made in the USA, in our 135,000 square foot facility in St. Louis, MO.

We are flexible and can meet your specific needs. While we have many items in our "catalog" of standard products, we can also customize our products to meet your design requirements.

We find solutions. Bring us a challenge, and we will help find a solution. We specialize in finding ways to reduce the overall cost of your furniture/millwork package.

Our Customer Service is personal, and it is relentless. Many on our customer service team having been doing this for decades and are best in class.

Our lead time is significantly faster than sourcing overseas. Many projects can be delivered in 4-6 weeks.

Our client roster speaks to the quality of work we do. Our experience working with some of the country's largest retailers, corporations, restaurants, and hospitality chains is a testament to our work.

Name: Donati Brasil
Description:
Donati é a marca italiana que equipa as melhores cadeiras corporativas e poltronas do mercado. Há mais de três décadas, lidera o processo de inovação no segmento, combinando qualidade, tecnologia, design, processos e sustentabilidade na fabricação de componentes para a indústria moveleira.

Com instalações industriais em três continentes, a Donati tem fábricas localizadas na Itália, Estados Unidos e China. A presença global da empresa conta, ainda, com representações comerciais em diferentes países, como o Brasil. Com a chegada ao mercado brasileiro, a Donati busca estreitar o relacionamento com fabricantes locais, além de apresentar um portfólio completo de mecanismos, bases, assentos, encostos e braços para cadeiras e poltronas.

Atendendo aos mais rigorosos padrões internacionais, a Donati possui certificações ISO 9001:2015 e ISO 14001:2015, que atestam seus sistemas de qualidade e sustentabilidade. Além disso, assegura garantia de 12 anos a seus produtos, demonstrando a confiança na entrega de componentes precisos, seguros e duráveis.

Started from the year 2007, we now headquarter in Guangzhou & foshan City Industrial Park, having 600+staff, modern manufacturing center in 150,000sqm and showroom 6,000sqm for office & hotel  solutions. As business developing, our Group has branch offices or showrooms also in downtown Guangzhou, Beijing and Hong Kong, and more than 150 dealers networks domestic and overseas.

Cedar is specializing in our Group's International Business Division for: 
#1 Office Project (customizing & bespoke & fit out ); 
#2 Hotel furniture (fix & loose); 
#3 Wholesale for stock office furniture.

In OFFICE furniture category:  we produce Melamine Modular Workstation system, Executive Veneer products, Partition Workstation, Office Chair & Sofa, Collaborative & Lounge Soft Seating, and Metal Storage units. Complete product lines and solutions is our strength to office projects and global tenders, our Dept. of sales, designer, solution and engineering are engaged in PM process from quotation, proposal, presentation, 3-D renderings, shop drawings to layout plan.

In HOTEL furniture sector of Cedar: we follow the FF&E and hotel brand book with architect and PMC, realizing the perspectives of  fixed and loose furniture. We also send out engineering teams to global sites checking, measurement in advance and arrange workers to sites installing.

In WHOLESALE furniture: we keep regular stock of standard office furniture collections for popular & universal sizes and colors, running a shorter lead-time within 1 week for shipment. We distribute to all our dealers and stores. 

Qualification:  ISO/ GREENGUARD / BIFMA / FSC/  WORLD TOP 500 Accounts/ 5-year Warranty.

For inquiry, project cooperation, dealerships, factory-showroom-office visiting... Call us or  Email:  furniture@oncedar.com

Name: Lesro Industries, Inc.
Description:
For over 50 years, Lesro has manufactured high-quality commercial furniture at modest price points.  As a second-generation family-owned company, our Bloomfield, Connecticut headquarters is home to a dedicated team of front office personnel and skilled craftsmen and women working in a modern factory.  
 
Lesro is a domestic custom contract furniture manufacturer that specializes exclusively in lounge, lobby, reception, guest, and waiting room seating.  What separates Lesro is our ability to produce seating the way you want it, fast!  Whether it is steel or wood frames, or fully upholstered soft-seating, Lesro excels by offering nearly unlimited options in frame finish and upholstery combinations with the shortest lead times in the industry.
 
Lesro seating fits perfectly in a wide variety of applications and environments.  We fit in healthcare spaces (hospitals, medical/dental/veterinary offices, urgent care clinics, and senior living facilities), education (libraries, administration offices, student centers, common areas, and dormitories), automotive (dealerships, service centers, and tire, muffler, oil change shops), or corporate (banking/finance, law firms, or any wait for service business) environments. Lesro has a product and style that fits any budget.  
 
With a number of green initiatives, including a solar-powered factory and sustainable manufacturing processes, Lesro believes in being a good corporate citizen who understands taking care of both our customers and the environment and not mutually exclusive propositions.

Name: Hawk Furniture
Description:
Hawk Furniture is a UK manufacturer of high-quality contract furniture, proudly supporting a nationwide network of over 300 dealers and growing.

Operating from our 10-acre, ISO-accredited facility in East Yorkshire, we manufacture 95% of our products in-house - ensuring tight quality control, quick turnaround times and continuous innovation. Our ongoing investment in advanced machinery and design maintains our position as an industry leader.

Backed by a 10-year guarantee, our furniture is built to last, with many products FIRA (Furniture Industry Research Association) tested to BS 4875 standards for strength and durability.

As a family-run business since 1988, we combine professional expertise with a personal, responsive service that has stood the test of time. We take a proactive, partnership-driven approach - delivering tailored solutions that help our customers grow and thrive in an ever-changing market.
Location: Holme Upon Spalding Moor, East Yorkshire

At the core of our products is a patented ventilation technology that boosts productivity and wellbeing, making our pods ideal for continuous use.
 
From single user phonebooths to large scale meeting pods, all VETROSPACE products are proudly designed and built in Littoinen, Finland.

Description:
Alpine Modular Interiors (P) Ltd (AMIL) operating across India, is in Business of Modular office furniture industry since 1995. It is an offshoot of an Interior construction Company, Sachdevson (Estb. in 1970). Alpine  is headquartered in  New Delhi and has vast experience in Modular Office furniture. The  Company  is supported by excellent staff .

In 2001, Alpine started representing Hong Kong based public listed Company, UB Office Systems (HK) Ltd.  Alpine & UB have jointly built a strong platform of satisfied clients across India in last 17 years, by supplying international level quality products and providing satisfactory and committed service.

UBOS has a turnover of over USD 60 Million, employs over 1200 workers in its four State-of-the-Art factories in China. These factories are located near Shanghai and in Guangzhou. UBOS has presence in 14 Countries across Globe.

Recently, UBOS has merged with an established Japanese Furniture  manufacturing Company -ITOKI and the brand has been re-christened from UB to NOVO Workstyle.

ITOKI has a Global presence through Joint venture establishments located in China, Thailand, Vietnam, Indonesia and Singapore besides having its own Plants in Japan. It is amongst the top three Companies in the Business of Office furniture in Japan.

Alpine continues to be the sole authorized representative in India for the new entity-NOVO WORKSTYLE

Name: Go Green Office Solutions

Our vision is to create workspaces that enhance employee happiness and efficiency, helping businesses of all sizes thrive in an eco-friendly and sustainable way. We are committed to reducing the environmental impact of office fit-outs and ensuring our solutions align with our client's corporate sustainability goals. These values drive us to create health-promoting office spaces that are both beautiful and functional.

Our comprehensive range of services includes high-end professional fit-outs, sustainable office furniture, ergonomic office equipment, and custom solutions tailored to meet your specific needs. We provide free bespoke 3D office plans to help you visualise and perfect your design before implementation, ensuring complete satisfaction and minimising the risk of costly changes.

What sets GoGreen Office Solutions apart is our commitment to using eco-friendly materials, providing ergonomic solutions that support employee health, and offering innovative, forward-thinking designs that keep your business at the forefront of modern office trends. Our full-service approach ensures a seamless, stress-free transformation of your workspace, from the initial consultation to the final implementation.

Choose GoGreen Office Solutions for a modern, sustainable approach that combines aesthetic excellence and customisation. Our dedicated team of suppliers, designers, and contractors will work closely with you to create a workspace that not only looks great but also enhances employee well-being and productivity. Let us help you build a positive corporate image and a more efficient, engaging office environment.

We provide complete work space design and furniture management, handling everything from space planning to installation. Let us create a functional and stylish workspace for you.

At SetNer Designs, we redefine workspace environments with a holistic approach to design and functionality. Founded on the principle that thoughtful design enhances productivity and well-being, we offer tailored solutions across multiple sectors:

 Open Space Office: Transform your workplace into a dynamic, collaborative hub. Our open space designs prioritize fluidity and flexibility, fostering creativity and teamwork.

Name: AWM - Australian Workstation Manufacturers
Description:
At AWM Amaroo we live and breathe the Australian workplace.

Founded in 1993 by Anthony Scotts and Ric Lewarne, AWM has grown from humble origins in a household garage to one of Australia’s leading corporate furniture and joinery companies.  

We proudly design and manufacture our commercial furniture and joinery in our Fairfield factory in Sydney, NSW, giving us the ability to service the commercial construction industry with a speed and flexibility few others can match.  

At AWM we never sit still and are always looking forward. We are constantly testing, designing, and refining our products to transform the modern workplace. Having innovation always on our minds led us to design and develop the 2021 Good Design Award-Winning Drum + Base range.  

Looking forward also means we are constantly looking at ways to leave our country (and the planet) in a better state than we found it. 95% of the materials used in our furniture and joinery are sourced domestically, and we work with our suppliers to have the majority of our materials used to be recyclable. Through our partnership with the KARI Foundation and AWM Amaroo, we are making a tangible difference in the lives of young Aboriginal people through education, mentorship, training and employment. 

We pride ourselves on our flexibility, superior quality, sustainability and ability to offer the best lead times in the industry. We love nothing more than a challenge, and we are renowned for working closely with designers, builders or project managers to deliver customised solutions on time, on budget and to exact Australian standards. 

If you would like to learn how we can transform your client’s workspace, please email sales@awm.net.au.

Name: Brokx projectinrichting
Description:
-Wat doet Brokx? 
Wij ontwerpen en leveren kantoorinrichting! Van basic werkplek tot adembenemend totaalproject.

-Denk aan: inspirerende vergaderruimten met de nieuwste opties qua connectiviteit, rustgevende hospitality en break-out zones, dakterrassen, (outdoor)kantoortuinen, belcellen en concentratiewerkplekken. 

-Brokx projectinrichting richt sinds 1976 kantoren in, we hebben bijna 50 jaar ervaring!

-Basic en scherp geprijsd meubilair maar zeker ook luxe werkplekken met bijzondere bladvormen en speciale kleuren inclusief kasten, bureau- en vergaderstoelen in matching colors!

-Onze eigen interieurarchitecten ontwerpen kantoorinrichtingen die verbinden en mensen tot bijzondere prestaties verleiden, wij maken kantoren waar elke generatie zich thuis voelt. 

-Wat kost een kantoorontwerp bij Brokx? 
U krijgt een professioneel plan voor 1,2 of 3 euro per m2. Vraag naar onze voorbeelden voor een goed overzicht.

-Hoe positioneert Brokx projectinrichting zich in het speelveld van kantoorinrichters? 
Brokx hoort in de Top 5 van grootste kantoorinrichters in Nederland. Brokx werkt als gesprekspartner en totaal regisseur rechtstreeks voor mkb en mkb+ eindgebruikers of in teamverband  samen met architecten, interieurarchitecten, vastgoedbedrijven, inkoop, facility, Design & Build partners.

-Locaties werkgebied?
Brokx projectinrichting is voornamelijk actief in de regio Rotterdam, de Brabantse Stedenrij en de provincie Zeeland.
Ons werkgebied is Nederland en België: wij maakten reeds mooie projecten in: Amsterdam, Den Haag
Rotterdam, Dordrecht, Utrecht, Breda, Den Bosch, Tilburg, Eindhoven, Roosendaal en Bergen op Zoom. Maar ook in België en Brussel leverden wij veel mooie projecten op.

Bezoek onze 2.000m2 grote showroom voor kantoorinspiratie, ontdek wat vormen en materialen voor de sfeer van uw kantoorinrichting kunnen betekenen.

Name: Keijsers Interiors
Description:
Bij Keijsers zijn we trots op onze rijke geschiedenis en onze bijdrage aan hoogwaardige interieuroplossingen. Met vestigingen in Utrecht, Horst en Polen behoren we tot de top vijf interieurbouwers van Nederland en hebben we een internationaal werkgebied. We nodigen u uit om onze passie voor vakmanschap en kwaliteit te ontdekken en samen met ons uw droominterieur te realiseren.

Met een geschiedenis van 125 jaar waarin constante innovatie en relevantie in de markt centraal staan, zijn wij een gevestigde en vertrouwde naam in de interieurbouw. Ons internationale netwerk en onze veelzijdige ervaring maken ons tot de ideale partner voor elk interieurproject, groot of klein.
Keijsers produceert maatwerk meubilair die belangrijke aspecten van het leven raken. Van het verwelkomen van nieuwe levens tot het bieden van zorg tijdens afscheid, en van inspirerende leeromgevingen in Nederland tot verbeterde werkplekken in Europese steden. We bevorderen ontspanning in musea en concertzalen en zijn aanwezig bij winkelervaringen met zowel global retailers als lokale spelers. Een aantal van onze gerealiseerde projecten zijn Booking, Shell, Naturalis, College Hotel Amsterdam, Radboud UMC, AMC, Corendon Mangrove Beach Resort, Dille & Kamille en KPN.

Onze expertise en toewijding transformeren elke ruimte tot een bron van duurzaam comfort, inspiratie en welzijn. We zijn daar waar u ook bent. Het geeft voldoening om deel uit te maken van een bedrijf dat op de achtergrond een positieve impact heeft op het leven van mensen, zonder de hoofdrol op te eisen.

Tratamos de ser lo más competitivos posibles , de tener la atención necesaria con los clientes en cada momento de la compra, incluido el servicio de montaje y postventa tan importante para resolver cualquier situación y conseguir una experiencia de compra excelente de 360º.

En un mercado caracterizado por el cambio continuo, logramos satisfacer las necesidades de un cliente final cada vez más exigente.

Para ello, realizamos una fuerte apuesta por los elementos innovadores dentro de nuestro sector, ya que entendemos que es la mejor manera de evolucionar y crecer. Buscamos que nuestros productos sean cada vez más eficientes y confortables para el usuario final.

Ergonomía, calidad visual y estética, diseño industrial, materias primas de alta calidad y tecnología innovadora son los conceptos que definen la manera de equipar de 3C EQUIPAMIENTOS, donde otra forma de equipar es posible.

3C EQUIPAMIENTOS, otra forma de equipar es posible.

Name: Shenzhen Pillars Technology Co. Ltd
Description:

To help professionals to have better health and fitness in their life, Pillars offers a range of ergonomic and aesthetically beautiful products to create them the most optimal workspace possible.

Continuous sedentary work increases risks of not only the physical health issues such as obesity, diabetes, heart disease, and premature death, but also mental problems of dissatisfaction, irritability and depression. Which of course make people work ineffective and less of productivity. 

With Pillars’ Creative Workstation, it reminds people to pay more attention on their health and inspires them to change the traditional way of sitting too long hours during work, instead, alternate between sitting and standing to move their body to a correct posture. 

We strive to make a better Comfortable and Healthier Workstation by well-designed and durable office products such as Electric Height Adjustable Desks, Ergonomic Chair, Anti-Blue Light Lamp, Portable Laptop Stand, and other accessories, which all products are used to help people get relief from pain on back and neck, reduce the pressure on lower back and foot, protect eyes from getting harm by blue-light of Laptop screen. 

We all deserve to Enjoy good health in office, let’s get moved on.

Main scope of activities of Office FS company are services for large polish and foreign companies with cooperation with well known polish designers of office spaces.
Company’s main target is implementation of the projects with usage of the products from Office FS offer that is consistently expanded.

Description: "Welcome to Imperial Innovation, where craftsmanship meets creativity to bring your living spaces to life. At Imperial Innovation, we're more than just a furniture company; we're your partners in creating the perfect ambiance for your home or office interiors. With a passion for design and an unwavering commitment to quality, we curate a stunning collection of handcrafted furniture pieces that seamlessly blend style, comfort, and functionality. Name: Cube Design A/S
Description:
Cube Design A/S designs and manufactures office furniture for offices, canteens, cafes and conference rooms.

Cube Design A/S is Danish design with a production in Denmark. We proudly say that our products are of exceptional quality.

The company Cube Design A / S was founded in 1980. From the very beginning it has been a vision for Cube Design A / S to create both beautiful, functional and unique high-quality furniture.

Cube Design A / S has 45 employees and has 9,000 m 2 production and administration facilities in Hammel.

Cube Design A / S sells in Denmark through a strong dealer network that has extensive knowledge of our products. In addition, exports Cube Design A / S, primarily Scandinavia and especially Norway, but also to the rest of Europe.

Cube Design A / S is working to create a value for European society through a 100% Danish manufactured products. This creates a product that is of exceptional quality.

Name: Arnold's Office Furniture
Description:
A project oriented systems office furniture provider, Arnold's offers great prices on the highest quality new office furniture and is proud to be the exclusive distributor of Sunline Signature Sliding Cubicles - the easiest cubicles in the world to assemble, disassemble, or reconfigure.  Panels simply slide down posts to create walls.  Drill some screws through a small bracket to secure the work surface to the wall, and it's done!  Anyone can build it!

For 15 years, Arnold's Office Furniture has been working hard to make it easy for you.  From space-planning to product selection and into delivery & installation, Arnold's specializes in outfitting entire office spaces with discounted office suites from cubicles to conference tables to guest chairs.

Name: Wrk Lab Inc
Description:
Wrk Lab is a proud Certified Minority-Owned Business and is Florida’s leading contract furniture dealer. Wrk Lab is a Platinum award winning MillerKnoll Certified Dealer (the highest achievement amongst MillerKnoll's dealers). We are South Florida's only MillerKnoll Certified Dealer that's both Minority & Locally-Owned. We also have our NMSDC Certification, State of FL Minority Business Certification, we've earned the exclusive SBA 8(a) certification & hold our own GSA Schedule.

We are a full-service dealership offering high quality office, healthcare, hospitality & educational furniture and ancillary products. As a MillerKnoll dealership, our clients have access to MillerKnoll's entire portfolio of product offerings, as well as 200 other product lines. Our licensed Interior Designers provide our clients with creative design & space planning. We also provide a range of architectural solutions such as modular walls, sound masking systems, flooring & lighting. Wrk Lab delivers the right design and products to enable every client to achieve their goals and highest level of success through increased engagement, productivity, and organizational growth. We have any solution to fit your needs- Defined by You, Delivered by Us!

In addition to our core business, Wrk Lab also has a full-service, Commercial Move and Project Management Division. In this division, we provide clients with fulfilling their storage needs, business to business relocations, building decommissions, asset management & workspace cleaning, We have the means to service clients worldwide.  

Wrk Lab is a: 
4x Best Places to Work winner
22nd Fastest Growing Company in South Florida 
Finalist for South Florida’s Business of the Year Award 
Coral Gables Chamber of Commerce Business of the Year finalist 

Wrk Lab - Creating innovative workplaces, wherever work may happen.

Name: CBI (Corporate Business Interiors, Inc)

CBI (Corporate Business Interiors, Inc) is a leading contract office furniture & architectural products resource in CA.  Established in 1980.

Our Alliance Partners: HNI Brands--Allsteel-Gunlocke-HBF-Hon.

Name: SPF - Specialized Furniture
Description:
SPF (SPECIALIZED FURNITURE SL) specializes in the design and manufacturing of premium consoles and technical furniture tailored for Control Centers.

With over two decades of industry experience, we excel in delivering solutions for critical environments worldwide through our dedicated network of partners.

Our core competency lies in crafting technical consoles for 24/7 control rooms and high-intensity command centers. Engineered for durability and optimized equipment safety, our products feature state-of-the-art designs that meet advanced ergonomic standards.

We offer a versatile range of solutions, including fixed consoles, sit/stand options for operators and supervisors, meeting and crisis tables, auxiliary furniture, file and printer cabinets, reception tables, and supports for monitors and videowalls.

Our furniture serves a broad spectrum of applications such as control rooms, command centers, real time crime centers, traffic control centers, data processing facilities, network operations centers, process control facilities, call centers, and air traffic control towers.

Name: L'agenceur éco responsable
Description:
Chez l'Agenceur Éco-responsable, nous croyons en un avenir où l'aménagement intérieur n'a pas besoin de compromettre l'environnement. Nous nous engageons à créer des espaces fonctionnels et esthétiques tout en minimisant notre impact sur la planète.
Sujet de prédilection: #agencement, #boismassif, #ecoresponsable,  #mobilier,#mobiliersurmesure, #design,#menuisier,#ébéniste

Name: Conklin Office Furniture
Description:
We specialize in remanufactured, recycled, and sustainable office furniture that meets the needs of today’s evolving workplaces. For over four decades, we've helped companies of all sizes furnish their spaces affordably, responsibly, and stylishly.

Our inventory includes remanufactured cubicles, refurbished workstations, ergonomic seating, standing desks, conference furniture, storage solutions, and more, all designed to help your business create a productive and eco-friendly workspace.

 What sets us apart:

- Our in-house team rebuilds furniture to like-new condition
- We keep thousands of pounds of furniture out of landfills each year
- Nationwide shipping and delivery available
- Our products are tariff-free and ReMade in America

We proudly serve corporate offices, small businesses, educational institutions, healthcare providers, and government agencies looking to reduce costs and support sustainability.

 Based in Holyoke, MA
 Over 100,000 sq. ft. of remanufacturing and showroom space
 Committed to the circular economy

If you're searching for used office furniture, remanufactured cubicles, green furniture solutions, or affordable ergonomic chairs, you're in the right place.

Name: Task Systems
Description:
Welcome to TASK, an independent workplace furniture supplier with nearly 50 years of experience in the industry.

With a focus on bespoke furniture solutions, we're all about bringing your ideas to life. We understand how crucial it is to match project needs with the perfect solution, taking into account sustainability requirements, budget constraints, and overall design goals.

Alongside classic products from key suppliers and our own in-house designs, TASK also holds exclusive UK distribution rights for the portfolio of Marelli and ICF, handcrafted furniture made in Italy. 

We pride ourselves on exceeding customer expectations and delivering projects on time and budget. Our London based stock-holding facility allows us to give realistic project lead times, provide delivery and warranty support. Ultimately, we want to give all our customers the best possible experience .

Name: iWorkCommercial
Description:
iWork is a one-stop workspace solution provider, we pride ourself offering agile and smart office furniture strategy and project management empowered by 13 years refined practices, knowledge and expertise, along with in-depth research and analysis of market trends.

We listen intently to our clients to ensure that we truly understand their brand and business strategies, and the way how they work, so that we can tailor a workplace solution that will fulfill their vision.

With an insight and special DNA for efficiency, health, flexibility and costs certainty, iWork is able to transform a workspace that is aligned with your vision, business objectives, financial budgets and stakeholder timelines.

Name: Furniture Solutions OH IN KY
Description:
Furniture Solutions is a Cincinnati based commercial furniture dealership representing Teknion – an industry-recognized leader in design and innovation – and an extensive range of additional premier manufacturers.
 
We are a full-service dealership, dedicated to providing our clients with superior workplace solutions and expert support. Our company’s goal, with every client and every size project, is to exceed expectations while creating exceptional spaces. Spaces that stand out. Spaces that work. Now more than ever, the workplace environment plays a crucial role in the attraction, retention and performance of employees. Our team knows what it takes to turn your workplace vision – from functionality to design to productivity – into a powerful reality.
 
Furniture Solutions serves the Ohio, Indiana, and Kentucky areas, along with a portfolio of nationwide clients. And with today’s technology, our reach is global. Whether you’re creating a new workspace, renovating, moving or expanding, FS will find the solutions that make your space work.

Name: Castell
Description:
Castell (formerly Office Furniture Solutions) is a human-centric commercial interiors supplier that outfits workspaces to help people and companies thrive. 

We provide new and used office furniture out of a 40,000 SF showroom and warehouse in the Metro Detroit area. We are an authorized Teknion dealer– one of North America's largest commercial work system manufacturers– offering full service commercial space planning, design, furniture, finish and fixture specification, delivery, installation, and project management. 

We exist to help firms make intelligent decisions on the design and layout of their workspaces and on the re-use, disposition, and acquisition of their furniture to meet the social, environmental and performance demands of today's workforce.

Name: BOSQ Ergonomic Living, UAE
Description:
BOSQ delivers complete office furniture solutions designed for modern work environments. Based in the UAE, we provide end-to-end workspace furnishing, from concept and design to manufacturing, bulk supply, and installation, serving corporate offices, educational institutions, and government projects across the region.

Our focus is on combining ergonomic comfort, efficient space planning, and durable craftsmanship to create workspaces that inspire productivity and well-being. With a project-first mindset and a dedicated management team, we ensure every project is delivered on time and to the highest standard, no matter the size or complexity.

What makes BOSQ different:
 Specialists in bulk procurement and large-scale delivery
 Ergonomic, space-optimized, and customizable designs
 End-to-end project management and quality assurance
 Reliable service from initial planning to final setup

Whether you’re building a new workspace or expanding nationwide, BOSQ is your trusted partner for smart, scalable, and sustainable office furniture solutions across the UAE.

#comfortfirst #ergonomicliving #workspactransformation #BOSQvalues #sustainabledesign #innovativesolutions #workplacewellbeing

Name: Neeman Furniture
Description:
Neeman Seating Solution Pvt. Ltd. is a leading furniture manufacturer and supplier offering premium modular workstations, ergonomic office chairs, modular office furniture, office almirahs, vertical filing cabinets, and more.

We provide both standard and fully customized furniture solutions tailored to your space and design needs. With a team of skilled AutoCAD designers, we deliver precise layouts and detailed drawings to ensure perfect fit, soft finishing, and superior functionality.

Our online catalog makes browsing and shopping effortless, allowing you to explore our complete furniture range or request customized options with ease. Whether your requirement is a small office setup or a large-scale institutional project, we offer competitive, project-based pricing.

Neeman Seating Solution Pvt. Ltd. is proudly ISO Certified, BIFMA Certified, AIOTA Certified, and IGBC Certified, ensuring globally recognized quality, safety, and sustainability standards in every product we manufacture.

For high-quality, durable, and modern furniture solutions—contact us today!

Give anything to us we craft it beyond your expectations. 
We deal in all kinds of loose furniture ,modular furniture, IT accessories , Carpets etc.

Name: Dupler Office
Description:
Dupler Office is most often associated with office furniture, but we do much more. Our business is about people. About how and where they work, heal, learn and live. Anyone can sell you furniture, but we really think about how you put it all together and that makes the difference. 

Our product offerings include commercial furniture, architectural and industrial wall systems, laboratory furnishings and acoustical solutions.

Dupler Office is certified as a Women’s Business Enterprise by the Women’s Business Enterprise National Council (WBENC), the nation’s largest third-party certifier of businesses owned and operated by women. We recognize the commitment to supplier diversity that is embraced by corporations and government agencies today and we can add diversity to your supply chain.

Name: Berowood
Description:
En Berowood brindamos soluciones integrales para espacios de oficina.

Diseñamos, equipamos y ejecutamos proyectos de oficinas corporativas, acompañando a empresas en todo el proceso: desde el layout inicial hasta la instalación final.

Trabajamos con puestos operativos y gerenciales, mesas de reunión, soft seating, soluciones acústicas y equipamiento funcional, adaptando cada proyecto a la dinámica y necesidades reales de cada organización.

Contamos con fabricación propia en Acebal (Santa Fe) y oficinas en Rosario, lo que nos permite ofrecer altos niveles de personalización, control de calidad y plazos de entrega ágiles.

Name: Palmberg Büroeinrichtungen + Service GmbH
Description: Today, PALMBERG is one of the leading companies of the German office furniture industry and successfully produces high-quality office furnishings for the European market. Besides a strong customer orientation and diverse service features, PALMBERS's success is particularly based on a functional and high-quality range of products.

Name: 5D Diseñadores
Description:
5D diseña soluciones de ergonomía para las personas en su vida diaria, promoviendo un estilo de vida saludable, mediante la investigación y desarrollo de productos innovadores con un diseño cautivador.

Nos centramos en desarrollar ideas y co-crear con Nuestros Clientes para diseñar elementos ergonómicos que les permita a las personas hacer sus actividades productivas de manera efectiva, saludable y feliz en sus estaciones de trabajo de videoterminal-oficina. 

Esta alianza estratégica se logra a partir de 5 aspectos fundamentales de nuestro servicio:

* Soluciones a la medida.
* El estilo único y original de nuestros productos.
* Calidad.
* Trayectoria y conocimiento de mas de 15 años
* Innovación a través de la co-creación de soluciones.

Name: Paradise Furniture
Description: Paradise Furniture provides ergonomically designed products that suits the comfort of customers. Paradise has a large variety of products that helps to organise your home and office, just like the way you desire.

Name: DAS Business Furniture Ltd
Description:
For over 35 years, DAS has worked in partnership with world-leading brands to deliver workplace solutions at scale.

Our collaborative approach means we integrate seamlessly with client teams, consultants, and contractors – aligning design, project management, installation, and after-care to ensure every requirement is met with precision.

At the same time, our dynamic capability allows us to adapt quickly to changing project demands, whether scaling across multiple global locations or responding to evolving workforce needs. With offices in New York and a trusted network of partners across Asia, Australia, and the Middle East, we bring both consistency and flexibility, ensuring projects are delivered efficiently, on time, and built to perform long into the future.

Name: SQUARE ONE MAROC

Spécialisée dans l'aménagement et le mobilier de bureau. SQUARE ONE apporte un supplément d'âme à vos environnements de travail.

Name: Grupo Montiel Oficinas
Description:
𝗟𝗮𝘀 4𝗥 𝘀𝗼𝗻 𝗲𝗹 𝗺𝗼𝘁𝗼 𝗱𝗲 𝗠𝗼𝗻𝘁𝗶𝗲𝗹: 𝗥𝗲𝗱𝘂𝗰𝗶𝗿, 𝗥𝗲𝘂𝘁𝗶𝗹𝗶𝘇𝗮𝗿, 𝗥𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗰𝗹𝗮𝗿 𝘆 𝗥𝗲𝗮𝗰𝗼𝗻𝗱𝗶𝗰𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗮𝗿.

 𝗗𝗮𝗺𝗼𝘀 𝘂𝗻𝗮 𝗻𝘂𝗲𝘃𝗮 𝘃𝗶𝗱𝗮 𝗮𝗹 𝗺𝗼𝗯𝗶𝗹𝗶𝗮𝗿𝗶𝗼 𝗱𝗲 𝗼𝗳𝗶𝗰𝗶𝗻𝗮, rehabilitándolo, reciclando y reacondicionándolo. Si es necesario, 𝘀𝘂𝘀𝘁𝗶𝘁𝘂𝗺𝗼𝘀 𝗽𝗶𝗲𝘇𝗮𝘀, 𝘁𝗮𝗽𝗶𝘇𝗮𝗺𝗼𝘀 𝘆 𝗱𝗲𝘃𝗼𝗹𝘃𝗲𝗺𝗼𝘀 𝗮𝗹 𝗽𝗿𝗼𝗱𝘂𝗰𝘁𝗼 𝘀𝘂 𝗲𝘀𝗽𝗹𝗲𝗻𝗱𝗼𝗿 𝗻𝗮𝘁𝘂𝗿𝗮𝗹, ofreciéndolo como nuevo y prolongando su vida útil.

 𝗔𝗽𝗹𝗶𝗰𝗮𝗺𝗼𝘀 𝘂𝗻 𝗺𝗼𝗱𝗲𝗹𝗼 𝗱𝗲 𝗲𝗰𝗼𝗻𝗼𝗺𝗶𝗮 𝗰𝗶𝗿𝗰𝘂𝗹𝗮𝗿, el cual impulsa el reciclaje y la 𝗦𝗼𝘀𝘁𝗲𝗻𝗶𝗯𝗶𝗹𝗶𝗱𝗮𝗱, contribuyendo a la reducción de la huella de carbono.

 𝗥𝗲𝗱𝘂𝗰𝗶𝗺𝗼𝘀 𝗿𝗲𝘀𝗶𝗱𝘂𝗼𝘀 y fomentamos la 𝗦𝗼𝘀𝘁𝗲𝗻𝗶𝗯𝗶𝗹𝗶𝗱𝗮𝗱 en cada proyecto.

 𝗖𝗿𝗲𝗮𝗺𝗼𝘀 𝗼𝗳𝗶𝗰𝗶𝗻𝗮𝘀 𝗳𝘂𝗻𝗰𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗮𝗹𝗲𝘀 con muebles reacondicionados y opciones nuevas, todo ello de marcas líderes en el mercado, como 𝗦𝘁𝗲𝗲𝗹𝗰𝗮𝘀𝗲, 𝗛𝗲𝗿𝗺𝗮𝗻 𝗠𝗶𝗹𝗹𝗲𝗿, 𝗔𝗰𝘁𝗶𝘂, 𝗙𝗼𝗿𝗺𝗮 𝟱, 𝗛𝗲𝗿𝗽𝗲𝘀𝗮 o 𝗠𝗼𝗯𝗲𝗹 𝗟𝗶́𝗻𝗲𝗮, así como 𝗞𝘂𝗻𝗻𝗮 𝗯𝘆 𝗠𝗼𝗻𝘁𝗶𝗲𝗹, nuestra línea de fabricación propia. 

Desde hace más de 30 años, combinamos 𝗦𝗼𝘀𝘁𝗲𝗻𝗶𝗯𝗶𝗹𝗶𝗱𝗮𝗱, 𝗱𝗶𝘀𝗲ñ𝗼 𝘆 𝗳𝘂𝗻𝗰𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗮𝗹𝗶𝗱𝗮𝗱 para ayudar a las empresas a construir espacios más responsables con el planeta.
Location: Molina de Segura, Region of Murcia

Name: Saudi Damons
Description:
Inspired by Saudi Vision 2030, and led by the Saudi-China mutual growth mission advised by the Commercial Office of China Embassy in KSA, we are committed to the local private sector in the Furniture Industry, contributing to the "SAUDI MADE” mark.

Our mission is to equip Saudi furniture dealers and project contractors with customised workspace solutions by providing them with cutting-edge furniture products and services, making a positive impact on the lives of people.

Name: Federico Giner
Description:
FEDERICO GINER | Más de un siglo transformando espacios educativos y colectivos.

Desde 1910, en Federico Giner diseñamos y fabricamos mobiliario escolar de calidad, con diseño propio y vocación innovadora. Somos una empresa familiar con proyección internacional y un firme compromiso: mejorar la experiencia de aprendizaje y trabajo a través de espacios funcionales, versátiles y duraderos.

 Educación, colectividades, auditorios, academias, universidades... Nuestra gama de productos cubre todas las necesidades de mobiliario para centros educativos y espacios colectivos, adaptándonos a los nuevos modelos pedagógicos y tendencias del diseño.

 Diseño, innovación y durabilidad.

Diseños exclusivos, pensados para responder a los retos de la educación del presente y del futuro.

Modelos patentados, desarrollados por nuestro equipo y en colaboración con expertos nacionales e internacionales.

Calidad garantizada, avalada por generaciones de clientes que siguen confiando en nosotros.

 Con presencia en toda España y en más de 30 países, seguimos creciendo sin perder nuestras raíces: la pasión por el diseño útil, honesto y duradero.

FEDERICO GINER. Referentes de calidad desde 1910.
Location: Tavernes de la Valldigna, Comunidad Valenciana / Comunitat Valenciana

Name: Dental Art SpA
Description:
Since 1973 Dental Art has been designing and manufacturing cabinets and furniture for the dental industry. 
Design, materials, attention to safety and hygiene and maniacal attention to detail, are the distinctive characteristics of the company and of the products, strictly designed & made in Italy.
All this, combined with the ability to satisfy every specific need with highly customized solutions, allows the company to have a leading role in the international dental sector over the years.

Dental Art is also a partner for the development of your new products
and offers a complete design and prototyping service.
The internal team is able to take care of the development of a project even
starting from an idea, up to the realization of the prototype and its mass-production.

Name: LD Seating UK & Ireland
Description:
LD Seating have been designing and manufacturing quality seating solutions in Boskovice, Czech Republic since 1993, and we understand our reputation for excellence relies on the quality of the products we create and the service we deliver.

An independent second-generation business owned by the Huráb family and based in the Czech Republic, our extensive seating range is produced from our state-of-the-art design and manufacturing base in Boskovice, a town where we have very deep roots.

The company is driven by a team of exceptional individuals who are not just employees but ardent contributors to our success. Our people are the heart and soul of our organisation, and their dedication, expertise, and commitment are the driving force behind everything we do. 

Our people are not just experts in their roles; they are also passionate advocates for our customers, going above and beyond to ensure their satisfaction. Their dedication to delivering exceptional customer experiences is a testament to their character and values.

Our passion for style and innovative design is matched by our commitment to reliability and highly competitive pricing. 

Crafted with commitment.

Name: Amfah Office Furniture
Description: AMFAH Office Furniture is a company that provides office furniture and services in the UAE region. We offer a wide range of products, including office furniture, chairs, soft seating, and accessories. We also provide services such as project-based initial budget quotations and office space design.

Name: UCI Australia
Description:
UCI is an Australian owned company and a leader in providing innovative workspaces through products that develop and improve the work environment and the lives of the people that use them.

We manufacture, source, and supply products for the workplace. With a long history in the industry, we’ve learned what it means to do better in every iteration of our offering. UCI Australia brings together Design, Manufacturing and Project Delivery knowledge with industry expertise.

From inception, to implementation, delivery, and beyond, we’re working together to purposefully develop intelligent new solutions, and partner with you to deliver quality spaces.

UCI sees the rapid advances in technology and changes in the way people work and live, not as problems, but as opportunities to re-examine these environments and resolve critical issues. Our aim is to transform spaces into places that are comfortable, functional, efficient and inspiring. 

Ongoing growth has continued through the international alliances and ongoing business relationships with many of Australia’s largest corporate companies, plus local and federal government bodies. 

With showrooms in Adelaide, Brisbane, Canberra, Darwin, Melbourne, Sydney, Perth, Hobart and Ulverstone, UCI is truly a national company. This, supported by UCI Manufacturing in Adelaide, allows us to efficiently deliver quality Australian made and imported exclusive products, Australia wide.

Name: Roomdimensions Ibérica, S.L.
Description:
Roomdimensions Iberica, RDI, is a company that provides technical solutions for control rooms focused on the manufacturing and exporting of high added-value technical furniture and ergonomic solutions for non-stop operation environments.

We have a wide range of products that enhance the management and the organization of the 24x7 operations environments and their annexed spaces, using at any time the appropriate product for the user's needs.

Operations and supervisor consoles, meeting tables, archive furniture, printing cabinets, auxiliary technical furniture, specific 24x7 chairs & ergonomic supports.

As a result of our consideration for innovation, we have grown into a technological benchmark for comprehensive design and development of 24x7 operations environments, as well as for technical solutions for the implementation of control and crisis rooms.

Name: nosolomadera dR
Description: La empresa NOSOLOMADERA DR SL. tiene como objetivo el diseño, fabricación, venta (en local y online), transporte y montaje de mobiliario para el sector contract, retail y residencial.

Name: Grupo Lanzas
Description:
Grupo Lanzas es una empresa familiar con una fuerte vocación artesanal, con sede en Madrid y un segundo centro de producción en el norte de Portugal. Llevamos más de 70 años diseñando, fabricando e instalando muebles a medida para proyectos de mobiliario de alta gama.

Nuestro equipo está formado por más de 150 profesionales, repartidos entre oficinas de diseño, talleres especializados y equipos de instalación. Trabajamos en sectores tan diversos como la hostelería, el comercio, las oficinas, los espacios públicos y la arquitectura civil.
Cada cliente tiene un gestor de proyectos dedicado, un único punto de contacto que coordina todo el proceso, desde la fase conceptual hasta la instalación final.
Gracias a nuestra oficina técnica interna, podemos garantizar soluciones a medida, adaptadas a las limitaciones estéticas y técnicas, respetando los plazos.

Disponemos de más de 12.000 m² de talleres equipados con la última tecnología. En carpintería, utilizamos centros de mecanizado CNC, seccionadoras, encoladoras de cantos automáticas, fresadoras digitales y todo tipo de maquinaria industrial de última generación, además de puestos de montaje manual operados por carpinteros experimentados.

Nuestro taller de metal está equipado con cortadoras láser planas y de tubo, curvadoras CNC, pantógrafos, estaciones de soldadura TIG y MIG, así como zonas dedicadas al pulido de precisión. Fabricamos estructuras complejas en acero, acero inoxidable y aluminio, prestando especial atención al acabado.

Nuestras cabinas de pintura y lacado disponen de zonas de secado, lijado y barnizado, lo que nos permite aplicar acabados personalizados que se adaptan a la identidad de cada cliente.

Nuestra propia flota logística y equipos de montaje garantizan un transporte seguro y una instalación de alta calidad, tanto en Europa como a nivel internacional.

En el Grupo Lanzas combinamos rigor industrial, artesanía y apoyo humano para crear espacios a la altura de los proyectos más ambiciosos.
Location: Paracuellos de Jarama, Community of Madrid

Name: HUMAN ERGO [HEF]
Description:
HUMAN ERGO: Company Overview

Our Vision

To redefine the human-work interface globally, ensuring that every individual sits in a posture of health, and fostering a world where well-being is the foundation of peak performance.

Our Mission

To design, engineer, and ethically manufacture industry-leading ergonomic seating solutions that merge advanced bio-mechanics with sustainable material science, empowering users to achieve optimal comfort, focus, and long-term musculoskeletal health.

Company Profile

HUMAN ERGO is a premier manufacturer specializing in high-performance ergonomic seating and related workplace wellness solutions. We operate on the foundational belief that the chair is not merely a piece of furniture, but a fundamental tool for human productivity, mental focus, and long-term health. Our products are the result of rigorous research, utilizing cutting-edge bio-mechanics, material science, and industrial design principles to actively support the spine, improve circulation, and reduce muscle fatigue.

Core Value Proposition

We transform the sedentary workday from a static burden into a dynamic, comfortable experience. Our product line is distinguished by features such as dynamic lumbar support, intuitive adjustability, and pressure distribution technology, all engineered to adapt seamlessly to the unique needs of diverse body types and work styles.

Commitment to Sustainability and Ethics

Beyond comfort and performance, HUMAN ERGO is deeply committed to sustainability. We prioritize the use of recycled, recyclable, and low-VOC materials, and strive for manufacturing processes that minimize our environmental footprint. We believe in ethical sourcing and transparent operations, ensuring our chairs are built to last, reducing the need for frequent replacement, and supporting a circular economy.

Markets Served

We serve a diverse client base, including large corporate offices, burgeoning home office environments, specialize

Name: ModFurn Interiors
Description:
Businesses, contractors, and designers across the Newcastle and Hunter Valley trust ModFurn’s parent brand, Stuart and Dunn Office Choice. Our competitors, even the very largest in the country, just can’t match our customer loyalty.

Why? Because people love our positivity, our reliability, and our prices.

In the Newcastle and Hunter Valley regions, people know us as a family-friendly business that truly cares. Over the years, we’ve built up a stellar reputation that attracts online and outlet customers from every corner of the nation.

ModFurn was born when Stuart and Dunn decided to give its full office fit-outs a brand of its own. We don’t just supply office furniture. We have years of experience working with architects, designers, and builders from day 1, all the way through to completion.

ModFurn manages office builds and rebuilds for organisations of all kinds, with the attention to quality that built the Stuart and Dunn name.

Name: Acoustic Technologies
Description: Acoustic Technologies specialize in providing comfort and increased productivity in noisy open office environments by applying 3D layered sound absorption material adaptable for office furniture. Our main competitive advantage is specialization on lower sound frequencies like typical human speech (50 - 300Hz) - widely reported as the primary source of stress and conflict at many workplaces.

Name: KNS Group
Description:
KNS Group is a professional office interior design and construction company that focus on providing a full scale fit out services from scratch to completion.

Over the last 7 years we have been helping our local and multinational clients to design, plan, manage and execute their fit-out projects. Ranging from commercial office, showroom, retail, laboratory and warehouse.

Our clients will be appointed a dedicated consultant and team of experts who will assess the space and develop design plan that works for their organization now and well into the future. Our team will manage the entire project, budget and speed of delivery to ensure our client receive the most efficient and cost- effective project solution.

Name: The Green Lab
Description:
Een duurzame samenleving is niet van de een op de andere dag te realiseren. Het is een lang toekomstgericht proces. Onze eerste stap is bestaande producten te verduurzamen. Wij bieden een brede collectie meubels, maar maken ook circulaire interieurproducten op maat. 

Vanuit onze drive om circulair design te maken, werken we nauw samen met onze partners met als doel om van laagwaardige materialen hoogwaardige producten te ontwerpen. We veranderen verspilde kleding in een materiaal dat het circulaire verhaal vertelt door zijn esthetiek.

Wij hebben in Houten een showroom om je te inspireren. Deze kun je tevens huren voor een vergadering, training of creatieve sessie met je collega's (8 tot 10 personen).  Lekker centraal gelegen, bushalte voor de deur of 7 minuutjes op de OV fiets van CS Houten en gratis parkeerplaats voor de deur.  Vanzelfsprekend ook heerlijke koffie of thee.

Name: Fairway Holdings, Inc
Description:
Fairway Holdings Inc. is a Saint Louis-based independent manufacturer holding organization located in the Cherokee Street District, St. Louis’s creative center of commerce and culture. Our 130,000 square foot manufacturing floor produces some of the most successful and innovative brands of office furniture and fixtures in the United States. We have representatives servicing states nationwide.  

Supported by an inside design staff for all quoting and drawing requests Fairway holdings brings in welcome investments and a commitment to improving the customer experience. 

Our lineage in the Saint. Louis market dates back to 1969 to Berco Designs.  Berco Designs founder, Melvin Berkowitz,  believed that listening to his customers, taking care of his employees, and manufacturing here in the US were the keys to building tables and a business that would stand the test of time.

Over 40 years later, Fairway Holdings Inc. continues to take pride in these time-tested values. Now owner Mike Hojnacki is committed to US manufacturing and values the company's team of talented and dedicated workers, just as his predecessors did.

Name: IVONO
Description:
At IVONO, we empower proactive professionals by providing tailored, ergonomic workspaces designed to optimize comfort, productivity, and style.

Our premium electric sit-stand desks, paired with state-of-the-art ergonomic office chairs, are crafted to deliver a truly unparalleled performance boost.

Experience fully customizable, future-proof home offices tailored to your unique needs, with our extensive range of add-ons, such as monitor arms, cable management solutions, laptop stands, and wobble stools. Elevate your workflow and create an awe-inspiring workspace, designed just for you.

With a commitment to quality craftsmanship and customer satisfaction, we help businesses transform their interiors to reflect efficiency, elegance, and modernity. From design consultation to execution, our team ensures seamless project management tailored to each client’s specific needs.
