Location: Indira, Nagar, Anna Sahib Nagar , Maharashtra

Name: ERGOZ
Description:
Office, hybrid, or remote – you spend hours sitting in front of screens, every single day, for decades. 

Prolonged sitting causes poor posture, back problems, weight gain, weakened muscles and joints, diabetes, osteoporosis, and arthritis, also causing stress, fatigue, and even depression. 

Not cool!

So what’s the solution?
How can you achieve great heights at work without compromising your health?

Hi, we’re ERGOZ.

We believe that working can be a source of great pleasure and productivity, without the pain / heavy personal sacrifice. 

Ergoz is the first ergonomic sit-stand desk to help the modern ambitious professional do great things at work. 

Our sit-stand desk are designed to keep your body in an upright position while you work, so you never have to slump over or sag too low in your chair, thus: 
 - improving workplace health
 - increasing productivity 
 - and decreasing stress. 

Being active while working helps improve your mindset and productivity by giving your brain more energy than if it were sitting all day long.

Our vision is to embrace a constantly work-active lifestyle, enabling office staff to function energetically and enthusiastically via our range of products and work-active concepts.

At ERGOZ, you get:
 - ERGONOMIC FURNITURE to assist you in achieving office wellness through active work and proper posture
 - ERGOZ LIFESTYLE an online academy with the purpose to anchor new lifelong healthy habits

Name: THE CHAIR (MAURITIUS) LTD
Description:
Most of us spend most of our time seated at chair in an office or at home almost every day of the week to work. 

Imagine an office without a chair. Seems difficult and unlikely.
Now imagine an office with bad chairs.

We want your chair to be a place of comfort, safety, and inspiration. 

We are a local company, focused on bringing you the most efficient and appropriate solutions in terms of office chairs, including some locally manufactured and maintained products as well as internationally recognized brands. 

The chair for us is much more than just a product.  We have taken deep inspiration from this piece of furniture and articulated our philosophy around it.

A chair will elevate you from the ground, which is both a symbol of status and safety, with its legs. 
It provides you a seat at the table, where you can feel empowered, and your voice can be heard and where your opinion matters. 
Every chair has back support to support your good posture and make sure you can work sustainably comfortably. 

Our company philosophy is designed around these principles to provide you with efficient and reliable products and services. 

We are The Chair Mauritius Ltd.

Une gamme complète distribuée par les acteurs du marché de la sécurité incendie. 

Nous cherchons à étendre notre réseau de revendeurs à travers le monde : 
De nombreux outils de présentation physiques et numériques, sont disponibles pour les aider eux et leurs clients, à sélectionner le modèle et les finitions. 

Nous fournissons une qualité supérieure, un support commercial de premier ordre, offrons une infinité de possibilités pour configurer et personnaliser les produits : Securite & Design by CSID.

Designer manufacturer, we offer ranges of extinguishers cabinets, stands, but also safety plans and safety signs, meeting 3 fundamental needs: 

 - Integrate your safety elements in the decoration of an establishment and thus be able to assume to install them in the recommended places, and ensure their good visibility.

 - To answer the constraints related to the specificities of the building, and those related to the users of the building, ensuring the guarantee of a conform and functional installation.

At Pole Star Office Furniture, we understand the ever-changing office supplies market and the increasing competition that comes with it. But we're not intimidated. That's why we focus on creating furniture that not only serves a functional purpose, but also contributes to the overall visual branding of a space. Whether it's sophisticated designs for a sleek office or bohemian pieces for a more lively atmosphere, we cater to all diverse aesthetics.

As direct manufacturers, we're able to eliminate middlemen and offer our furniture at more cost-efficient prices. At Pole Star Office Furniture, we're dedicated to making your office a beautiful and lively place to be.

Description:
Welkom bij Profwood B.V., uw partner voor maatwerkinterieurs voor zowel zakelijke als particuliere klanten. Ook kunnen we moeiteloos 2D-tekeningen verwerken. Ons ervaren team vertaalt uw visie naar prachtige en functionele ontwerpen, waarbij we gebruikmaken van hoogwaardige materialen en moderne technieken voor duurzame en esthetisch aantrekkelijke resultaten.

Profwood B.V. biedt ook hoogwaardige halffabricaten aan voor verdere verwerking. We begrijpen dat elk project uniek is en werken nauw met u samen om uw specifieke wensen en eisen te realiseren. Van concept tot voltooiing, wij zijn uw betrouwbare partner.

Neem vandaag nog contact met ons op voor meer informatie of bekijk onze bedrijfsvideo. Bij Profwood B.V. streven we ernaar om uw visie werkelijkheid te laten worden met creatieve ontwerpen, vakmanschap en een ongeëvenaarde service.

Conceptual helps build the future of innovative workplaces for companies. Would you like to know more about Conceptual Furniture Design’s products and working methods? Read more on the about us page or contact us.

Name: Modern Smart Lockers (MSL)
Description:
We’re Modern Smart Lockers—on a mission to redefine storage with data-driven solutions and next-level aesthetics that architects, designers, and workplace strategists can’t stop talking about.

From hot-desking hubs to dynamic campuses, we deliver smart storage systems that don’t just solve problems—they elevate spaces.

What We Do
Specializing in workplace & university lockers.
 Workplace Lockers: Built for hybrid offices, IT storage, & hot-desking workflows
 University Lockers: Secure, flexible systems for busy students & faculty
 Spa & Fitness Lockers: Sleek, stylish designs for high-end amenities
 Industrial & Manufacturing Lockers: Tough, smart storage for demanding environments
 Resort & Ski Lockers: Durable, high-performance systems for active spaces

And because one-size-fits-all never fits anyone, we back every system with custom configurations, tech integrations, and a data-driven approach to ensure you get exactly what you need—no more, no less.
--

What Makes Us Different?
We’re not just another locker company. We’re redefining what storage can be with smarter systems and designs that demand attention.
 Data-Driven Planning: No guessing. We analyze real data to deliver the exact number of lockers you need
 Design That Wows: Bold aesthetics and finishes turn lockers into design features
 Smart & Scalable: Built to adapt to hybrid work, mobile access, and future demands
 Workplace Focused: Experts in workplaces, with proven solutions for universities and more
 Proven Results: Trusted across industries to rethink storage and elevate spaces
--

Our Vibe
Confident. Bold. Smart. We’re not here to blend in. We’re here to make lockers cool again—and we’re doing it with a mix of data, design, and disruption.

Name: ALBO MEBLE
Description:
ALBO - Manufacturer of Exquisite Display Furniture. On our profile, we will share with you the grandeur of our accomplishments.
ALBO boasts 30 years of experience in designing and producing entrancingly precise display furniture with timeless design.
With thousands of equipped public spaces across Europe, including France, Germany, Sweden, Norway, and Switzerland, ALBO ensures the highest quality craftsmanship and timely project completion.
Whether planning the modernization or opening of a jewelry salon, museum, art gallery  or any other exhibition space, we invite you to ALBO meble. We are a company with Polish roots and Italian design, dedicated to designing and producing glass display furniture for three decades. Our specialization lies in supplying display furniture for jewelry salons, museums, and art galleries. Additionally, our range includes elegant glass catering cabinets that perfectly showcase unconventional snacks in pastry shops, restaurants, and grocery stores.
ALBO's exhibition furniture production takes place in a modern, fully automated manufacturing facility. The facility is located in northeastern Poland, in the picturesque region known as the Land of a Thousand Lakes. Here, highly qualified employees, including designers, technologists, and carpenters, oversee the production of furniture with the highest quality.
ALBO furniture is crafted from the finest certified materials, including highly regarded worldwide furniture boards from Austrian company Egger, German Pfleiderer, and Swiss Krono.

Name: Flexchair B.V.
Description:
Onbewust elke dag sterker!

Veel mensen ervaren rugklachten tijdens hun werk. Ook nek- en schouderklachten komen veel voor. Dit geldt voor praktisch alle beroepsgroepen waarbij veel zittend werk verricht wordt. Van bureauwerkplekken, onderwijs personeel, tandartsen, pedicures, schoonheidsspecialisten enz. Wij produceren zelf in Vlaardingen ons eigen ontwerp dat samen met de TU Delft ontwikkeld is en verzorgen proefplaatsingen met instructie op de werkplek. 

Wat kun je verwachten?

Bij het gebruik van de Flexchair worden diepe rug- en buikspieren getraind. Deze diepe spieren zijn in onze moderne maatschappij steeds minder actief. De diepe spieren bereiden het lichaam voor om op juiste wijze kracht te kunnen leveren met minder energieverbruik en meer souplesse. 
Door het trainen en functioneel gebruiken van de diepe rug- en buikspieren verbetert de lichaamsbalans en worden prestaties in sport en werk geoptimaliseerd. Het resultaat is dat de pijnlijke en stijve rug  minder wordt of klachten  helemaal verdwijnen. Blijf vitaal terwijl je zit, voorkom bewegingsarmoede op je werkplek door gebruik van de Flexchair.

Het resultaat:

Vitaliteit behouden en weer plezierig zonder klachten kunnen werken. Rugpijn, nek- en schouderklachten verdwijnen of worden duidelijk minder. Ook geschikt voor mensen die bekend zijn met uitval door bewegingsgerelateerde klachten.

    “Beweeg, leef en presteer!”

Name: BONCORDOARREDI COMMERCIALI
Description:
Boncordo Arredi punta sulla qualità dei prodotti e sulla particolarità delle creazioni, modellate e personalizzate sul cliente: ogni opera è unica. Un esperto ascolta le esigenze e i desideri del cliente, lo aiuta a concretizzare le idee riguardanti la realizzazione del locale e ricava il progetto. L'idea si trasforma in un'opera di sicuro successo grazie agli architetti ed agli ingegneri di Boncordo Arredi. Un team di tecnici si rende disponibile, in tutta Italia, ad effettuare i sopralluoghi per la raccolta dei dati utili al progetto; si passa quindi, alla lavorazione ed alla consegna chiavi in mano del locale. Da non trascurare è l'assistenza postproduzione che raccoglie tutti i consigli e suggerimenti del cliente, e che procede con l'invio di una squadra per le eventuali sistemazioni ed accorgimenti.

La competenza, la professionalità e l'esperienza dello staff che pone l'attenzione al dettaglio, alla qualità artigianale ed alla tempestività. Grazie al concetto di personalizzazione su cui punta Boncordo Arredi, gli arredi e le particolarità sono praticamente infinite, come anche la fornitura di accessori che spaziano dai più economici ai più sofisticati.

Idea, Organizzazione, Progettazione. Durante la lavorazione tutto viene tracciato e realizzato manualmente in un ambiente attrezzato e qualificato. Legni e multistrati resistenti e durevoli nel tempo. Cominciano così ad intravedersi le forme progettate; successivamente l'assemblaggio di tutti i componenti pronti all'installazione.

L'installazione in loco avviene con rapidità unita a grande precisione, nella garanzia di un risultato ottimale ed assolutamente affidabile. L'aver disposto precedentemente il piano dei lavori consente infatti di procedere speditamente e in tutta sicurezza. La cura dei particolari, la scelta dei materiali utilizzati fanno dell’arredo commerciale firmato Boncordo Arredi un pezzo unico di alto valore espressivo.

Myymme pääsääntöisesti käytettyjä eli kierrätyskalusteita, mutta valikoimissamme on myös joitain erikoiseriä täysin uusia toimistokalusteita.

Kalustekopla vastaanottaa ja myy kaikkien valmistajien kalusteita. Kalusteet tarkastetaan ennen myyntiin laittoa. Tarvittaessa kalusteita huolletaan ja kunnostetaan.

Valikoimamme vaihtuu nopeasti ja kalusteet liikkuvat, joten päivitämme verkkosivuillemme vain laajemmat kaluste-erät. Näiden kaluste-erien lisäksi meiltä löytyy muita pienempiä tuotesarjoja, yksittäisiä tuotteita sekä erilaisia toimiston lisävarusteita. Tervetuloa tutustumaan edullisiin ja laadukkaisiin toimistokalusteisiin!

Lahjoitamme myyntituotoistamme 10 % paikallisille lasten ja nuorten urheiluseuroille. Meiltä ostaessasi saat itse päättää, mille seuralle haluat varat ohjata.

Käyttöikänsä lopussa olevat kalusteet puretaan, lajitellaan, hyödynnetään ja kierrätetään ympäristön kannalta parhaalla tavalla.

Name: Ergo Design Maroc
Description:
Bonjour à tous ! Nous sommes Ergo Design, la sympathique équipe de spécialistes qui se consacre à te fournir le bureau ergonomique parfait pour tes besoins de bureau.
Depuis plus de 10 ans, nous concevons et fabriquons des bureaux ergonomiques pour répondre aux besoins de nos clients. Nous comprenons que chacun a des besoins différents en ce qui concerne son espace de travail, et c'est pourquoi nous rendons nos bureaux entièrement personnalisables.

Que tu cherches un bureau à intégrer dans un petit recoin, ou quelque chose de plus spacieux pour un bureau plus grand, nous avons le bureau parfait pour toi. Nous avons une gamme de styles et de couleurs qui conviennent à tous les espaces et à tous les budgets. Et si tu cherches quelque chose de plus spécial, nous pouvons ajouter des accessoires tels que des chargeurs sans fil, des chemins de câbles, des bras ergonomiques et plus encore.

Chez Ergo Design, nous comprenons qu'un bureau est plus qu'une simple surface de travail. C'est la pièce maîtresse de ton bureau, l'endroit où tu vas passer la majorité de ta journée. C'est pourquoi nous veillons tout particulièrement à ce que chaque bureau que nous fabriquons soit ergonomique, confortable et élégant. Nous ne croyons pas qu'il faille sacrifier la qualité à la commodité, et c'est pourquoi nos bureaux sont conçus pour durer.

Nous sommes passionnés par le fait de fournir à nos clients l'espace de travail parfait, et nous nous efforçons toujours de rester à la pointe des dernières tendances en matière d'ergonomie. C'est pourquoi nous introduisons constamment de nouveaux produits et accessoires pour nous assurer que nos bureaux sont à jour.

Chez Ergo Design, nous nous engageons à aider nos clients à créer l'espace de travail parfait, et nous sommes toujours heureux de répondre à tes questions. Alors si tu cherches un bureau ergonomique, élégant, confortable et construit pour durer, ne cherche pas plus loin qu'Ergo Design.

Jesteśmy dumni z naszej pracy i zadowolenia naszych klientów. Dzięki naszym meblom biurowym klienci zyskują wyjątkowe rozwiązania, które inspirują i zwiększają ich efektywność w pracy. Jeśli potrzebujesz mebli biurowych, które połączą funkcjonalność z atrakcyjnym designem, zapraszamy do kontaktu z nami.

Name: Fokus Cubes
Description:
Wij creëren ruimte in een drukkende wereld. In elk kantoor, op elke werkplek.

Al in de jaren ‘90 kwam ons antwoord op de toename van prikkels in kantoortuinen. De ruimte-binnen-een-ruimte. De stilte werkplek.

Sinds corona is het een must voor elk kantoor.

En hoewel onze cubes inmiddels niet meer de enige zijn, maakt 25 jaar aan doorontwikkeling onze cubes het antwoord op je behoefte.

Rust. Focus. Een prikkelarme en geluidsarme omgeving waar je kwaliteit kan leveren zoals alleen jij dat kan.

Of je nu een call met vertrouwelijke informatie hebt, geconcentreerd moet werken of tot rust wil komen - in onze modulaire geluidsarme cabines krijg je de ruimte.

Cubes gebouwd om lang mee te gaan, met respect voor de aarde. Een investering in de werkplek van de toekomst.

Wij brengen focus binnen handbereik.

Name: Office Solutions Italia
Description:
Da oltre 20 anni, reinventiamo gli spazi di lavoro. Siamo il punto di riferimento per chi progetta luoghi dove lavorare meglio, che funzionano oggi e sono pronti per il domani. Siamo il più grande dealer italiano di Steelcase e di tanti marchi italiani e internazionali per l’arredo d’ufficio.

Puoi considerarci un partner. Ascoltiamo, comprendiamo e traduciamo i desideri dei nostri clienti in un ambiente che non solo rende più piacevole il modo di lavorare ma anche il quotidiano di chi lo vive. Ci prendiamo cura di ogni dettaglio, dalla riorganizzazione degli spazi fino alle finiture, e seguiamo tutte le fasi di un progetto anche dopo la consegna, assicurandoci che tutto continui a funzionare in armonia.

La nostra esperienza ci ha insegnato che ogni spazio ha una storia diversa da raccontare, e riflette le persone, le loro esigenze e i loro obiettivi. Per noi creare ambienti di lavoro è un processo in perenne movimento, che evolve insieme alla società, alle tecnologie e al modo di lavorare.
Ma non ci limitiamo a pensare soluzioni per spazi funzionali. Vogliamo rendere ogni ambiente inclusivo, perché crediamo che il lavoro migliore nasca quando tutti si sentono accolti e valorizzati. È proprio questa evoluzione continua che ci guida a immaginare luoghi di lavoro più aperti, flessibili e capaci di accogliere il cambiamento.

Name: Mobistar
Description:
Pasiune + știință = ARTĂ!

Cam așa s-ar traduce esența Mobistar, fabrică înființată în anul 2006, cu capital 100% românesc, cu oameni pasionați și dedicați, cu oameni pentru oameni.

Mereu am pus mobila pe un piedestal și am început prin a transforma casele în ACASĂ, ca mai apoi să facem tranziția către partea de corporate, prin a transforma un simplu loc de muncă într-un loc cu adevărat inspirațional, confortabil, un loc în care nu doar să dai tot ce e mai bun din tine pentru a face performanță, ci și unul în care să-ți încarci bateriile, să te delectezi, să te recalibrezi, pentru a performa în continuare.

Avem echipe închegate, dornice de muncă și de transformare, cu experiență de peste 16 ani doar în firma noastră. Stabilitatea, abilitatea de adaptare și pasiunea pentru frumos sunt atributele care ne influențează zilnic, în orice piesă de mobilier sau design de interior pe care le creăm.

Totul este posibil, atâta timp cât perseverența, dedicarea și dorința pentru reușită sunt puternice. Facem tot ce este necesar pentru a fi, mereu, în pas cu vremurile actuale. Vizităm toate târgurile importante de mobilă din Europa și fabricile de la care achiziționăm materiale. Ne asigurăm că primim și oferim mai departe cele mai calitative materiale și accesorii pentru mobila pe care o creăm. Punem satisfacția clientului pe primul loc și ne asigurăm că ceea ce livrăm se ridică la nivelul așteptărilor solicitate.

We understand that workplace productivity hinges on a comfortable and stylish environment, and we strive to bring you furniture that not only looks great but also maximizes performance. El equipo de SYC está para ayudarte: ponte en contacto con nuestros expertos!

SoSilent – Innovative Meetingboxen für moderne Büros

SoSilent bietet Ihnen hochmoderne, schallisolierte Meetingboxen und Telefonboxen, die für ungestörte Gespräche, Videomeetings und konzentriertes Arbeiten in offenen Bürolandschaften entwickelt wurden. Egal ob Sie eine akustische Raumlösung oder ein Raum-in-Raum-System suchen, unsere Produkte bieten vielseitige modulare Bürolösungen. Unsere Bürotelefonkabinen und Akustikmodule passen sich flexibel an Ihre Bedürfnisse an und schaffen komfortable Rückzugsorte im Büro.

Name: Spazio 4 Arredo
Description:
Spazio 4 Arredo nasce nel 2006 con la finalità di coniugare la semplice fornitura di arredi con tutte le fasi di intervento di riqualificazione e ammodernamento di uno spazio collettivo e di un ambiente di lavoro.

Offriamo un servizio di progettazione tecnica completo.
I nostri tecnici abilitati e specializzati, seguono i nostri clienti dalle prime fasi progettuali fino alle pratiche necessarie per i vari Enti: Comune, Ausl, ecc. 
In pratica, Spazio 4 Arredo, se richiesto, segue i  propri clienti dalla progettazione integrata del layout degli arredi con relativi impianti di servizio, fino all'intervento sul manufatto edilizio mediante l'impiego delle proprie maestranze. Il tutto, per ottenere in tempi contenuti e costi certi per il cliente, il massimo risultato in termini controllo di tutte le fasi di lavoro, con la migliore qualità di gestione della delicata fase delle finiture. Il cliente avrà così un unico interlocutore e maggiore controllo su tutto. 

Gli spazi e le postazioni di lavoro così ottenute, seguiranno un preciso criterio per la massima ergonomia e funzionalità. 
La progettazione degli spazi e degli elementi di arredo, parte da un concept, per divenire via via sempre più dettagliata, anche mediante studi di render, per giungere poi alla fase definitiva mediante progetto esecutivo e realizzazione presso i nostri laboratori specializzati.

Spazio 4 Arredo cura dalla semplice fornitura e montaggio di arredi per ufficio, alla installazione di pellicole antisolari specifiche per la mitigazione climatica degli ambienti, fino alle pellicole antinfortunistiche per vetrate.
Realizza pareti e controsoffitti in cartongesso o fibra minerale. Esegue inoltre riqualificazioni complete di uffici ed ambienti di lavoro in genere, con servizio chiavi in mano. 

Contattaci per maggiori informazioni, saremo lieti di illustrarti più dettagliatamente i nostri prodotti e servizi. 
Tel/Fax 051-744615    Cell. 339-5344320     
mail : info@spazio4arredo.it

Name: Hyan Living Global
Description:
At Hyan Living, we believe that great design transforms spaces — and experiences. Founded with a passion for elegance and craftsmanship, we curate and create a refined collection of custom-made furniture, hospitality supplies, tableware collections, decorative collections, handmade flowers, and artisan vases that blend functionality with timeless aesthetics. Whether you're outfitting a restaurant, furnishing a boutique hotel, setting up a collaborative workspace, or decorating your personal studio, Hyan Living is here to help you create spaces that tell your story. We also welcome collaborations with designers and artists to infuse fresh creativity into our collections and continue evolving with purpose.

Mission
To create sustainable and meaningful design pieces — from custom-made office furniture to handmade flowers and artisan decorations. all while championing sustainability. We believe in designs that enhance your space and respect our planet.

Reconhecida pela qualidade de seus produtos, a Meta X possui certificações que atestam a conformidade com as normas técnicas brasileiras, garantindo segurança, ergonomia e durabilidade.
Compromisso com a Excelência
Com uma política de qualidade baseada em satisfação do cliente, inovação e sustentabilidade, a Meta X se destaca no mercado por:
•	Produtos de Alta Performance: Cadeiras e poltronas projetadas para oferecer conforto, ergonomia e longa vida útil, atendendo a rigorosos padrões industriais.
•	Foco no Cliente: Soluções personalizadas que se adaptam às necessidades de cada projeto, desde ambientes corporativos até espaços educacionais e culturais.
•	Responsabilidade Ambiental: Uso de materiais ecológicos e processos produtivos sustentáveis, alinhados à preservação do meio ambiente.
•	Melhoria Contínua: Investimento em tecnologia e capacitação da equipe para aprimorar constantemente produtos e processos.
Missão, Visão e Valores
•	Missão: Oferecer mobiliário corporativo que una conforto, eficiência e durabilidade, contribuindo para ambientes de trabalho mais produtivos e ergonômicos.
•	Visão: Ser referência nacional no segmento de mobiliário corporativo, superando expectativas com produtos inovadores e serviços excepcionais.
•	Valores: Qualidade, ergonomia, sustentabilidade, personalização, ética e comprometimento guiam cada decisão e relação com clientes e colaboradores.
Com uma equipe dedicada e um modelo de gestão focado na excelência, a Meta X consolida-se como uma parceira estratégica para empresas e instituições que buscam mobiliário funcional, durável e alinhado às demandas contemporâneas.

Name: Mipa Optim
Description:
Cu o experiență solidă în domeniul comercializării de produse esențiale pentru afaceri, suntem dedicați să vă oferim cele mai bune soluții pentru gestionarea eficientă a resurselor dumneavoastră.

Mipa Optim se remarcă prin calitatea și diversitatea gamei noastre de produse, fiecare dintre ele fiind proiectat pentru a îmbunătăți operațiunile și a maximiza potențialul afacerii dumneavoastră. Cu o gamă variată de paleti și europaleti, suntem alegerea ideală pentru a vă asigura că mărfurile dumneavoastră sunt transportate în siguranță și cu eficiență.

Pentru a completa eforturile dumneavoastră de organizare, Mipa Optim oferă o selecție extinsă de vestiare metalice, gândite pentru a răspunde cerințelor dvs. de depozitare și securitate. Indiferent dacă lucrați într-un mediu industrial, comercial sau de birou, vestiarele noastre metalice sunt construite pentru durabilitate și funcționalitate de top.

Experiența de lucru este îmbunătățită prin gama noastră de mobilier de birou ergonomic și funcțional. De la birouri moderne și confortabile la soluții de depozitare inteligente, mobilierul nostru de birou este conceput pentru a sprijini o productivitate sporită și un mediu de lucru plăcut.

În ceea ce privește siguranța angajaților dumneavoastră, Mipa Optim vă oferă echipamente de protecție de înaltă calitate, adaptate nevoilor dvs. de securitate. De la îmbrăcăminte specializată la echipamente pentru protecția feței și a ochilor, aveți încrederea că echipamentele noastre vă asigură un mediu de lucru sigur și protejat.

Rafturile metalice sunt un element cheie în organizarea spațiului de lucru și depozitare, iar Mipa Optim vă pune la dispoziție opțiuni de rafturi metalice durabile și versatile. Indiferent dacă aveți nevoie de soluții pentru depozitare industrială sau comercială, rafturile noastre vă ajută să gestionați eficient spațiul și resursele.

Nous sommes une entreprise familiale fondée il y a plusieurs années et qui continue à croître grâce à notre engagement envers la qualité, le service et la satisfaction de nos clients.

Description:
Custom-made furniture with respect for materials, the environment & craftsmanship. Welcome to the world of Bulo, the prestigious furniture manufacturer based in the historic city of Mechelen, Belgium.

Bulo is not an ordinary furniture manufacturer; it stands for extraordinary and iconic design, driven by an unwavering commitment to delivering visionary solutions for contemporary workspaces. With a deep-rooted focus on the human perspective and a keen eye for captivating aesthetics, Bulo's timeless creations have the power to stimulate and ignite your imagination.
Bulo’s collection includes iconic pieces such as the Monica chair, designed by Gensler. Monica is a soft lounge chair with a solid wooden structure and a ‘draped’ upholstered soft shell resting on it. Other stand-out designs include Mr Walter, a tribute to the original file pedestal from founder Walter Busschop in 1963; and Senses Workstation, a unique solution to configure clusters of height-adjustable desks whilst supporting an organic and humanistic environment to work in.

Name: BENTEC CWB -Móveis Sob Medida
Description:
Com mais de quatro décadas de tradição, a Bentec Curitiba e a Mondrian Exclusive não apenas projetam móveis, mas tecem sonhos em cada fibra de suas criações. Através do brilho nos olhos de nossos clientes, encontramos nossa verdadeira inspiração. Combinando tecnologia de vanguarda, materiais de primeira linha e um design audacioso, nós transformamos visões em realidade, dando vida ao lar que você sempre desejou.

Na vanguarda do segmento de móveis planejados, nós acreditamos que um projeto de interiores deve fazer mais do que simplesmente preencher um espaço. Ele deve refletir a essência de quem o vivencia diariamente, traduzindo personalidade em cada detalhe.

Cada peça que criamos é uma obra de arte, meticulosamente planejada para ressoar com a identidade única de nossos clientes. Entregamos ambientes que são não apenas autênticos e inovadores, mas que também representam a verdadeira definição de luxo. Desafiamos o convencional, reimaginando espaços com possibilidades infinitas.

Para nós, cada lar deve narrar a história de quem nele habita e cada casa que mobiliamos se torna parte da nossa própria história. Venha experienciar um mundo onde o design encontra a paixão e onde cada móvel conta uma história. Sua casa não é apenas um lugar, é um capítulo da sua vida, escrito com carinho e excelência pela Bentec Curitiba e Mondrian Exclusive. Sua casa é o nosso lar.

Um desvendar de possibilidades

Participar da realização de sonhos vai muito além de projetar móveis. É colocar brilho nos olhos. Com este sentimento de fazer parte dos projetos de vida, a Bentec investe continuamente em tecnologia de ponta, matéria-prima de alta qualidade e design arrojado. A versatilidade e o visual contemporâneo dos produtos ficam por conta de uma variada gama de cores e materiais. Os móveis Bentec compõem os ambientes da casa toda e são utilizados também em projetos empresariais.

Name: SolarFlip
Description:
SolarFlip geeft afgedankte zonnepanelen een tweede leven als circulaire, verrijdbare whiteboards/flipovers. Het glasoppervlak van het paneel wordt het schrijfvlak: een praktisch product én een zichtbaar duurzaam statement. In plaats van (alleen) recycling kiezen we voor hoogwaardig hergebruik: maximale waardebehoud en circulaire impact die je elke dag terugziet.
Voor kantoren, (semi-)overheden en onderwijsinstellingen die laagdrempelig willen verduurzamen, zonder verbouwing.

Wat je van ons kunt verwachten:
• 100% circulair concept: hergebruik van zonnepanelen als grondstof
• Direct klaar voor gebruik (plug-and-play, geen installatie of elektra)
• Verrijdbaar en flexibel inzetbaar in elke ruimte
• Duurzaam, robuust schrijfoppervlak met een sterk verhaal voor je organisatie

Wil je sparren over aantallen, een pilot of een offerte? Stuur een bericht of bezoek solarflip.nl.

Name: Sempre Ofis Mobilyaları
Description:
Sempre Ofis Mobilyaları, ofis koltuk sektöründe yedek parça tedarikiyle başladığı yolculuğunu 2007’de ofis mobilyaları üretimiyle sürdürmektedir. 1500 m²’lik tesisi, modern makine parkuru ve deneyimli ekibiyle makam koltukları, personel koltukları, konferans-sinema koltukları, misafir bekleme grupları, ofis kanepeleri, çalışma ve toplantı masaları üretmektedir.
Metal aksam, poliüretan sünger ve ahşap parçaları kendi tesisinde üreterek dışa bağımlılığı azaltan Sempre Ofis Mobilyaları, CNC ve elektrostatik boya hattıyla yüksek kalite sunmaktadır. Yüksek Basınç Poliüretan teknolojisiyle üretilen süngerler ve C-Kanca döşeme sistemi sayesinde dayanıklı, ergonomik ve estetik ürünler ortaya çıkmaktadır. Koltuklarda dünya markası amortisörler kullanılmaktadır.
İnsan sağlığını ön planda tutan firma, uzun süre masa başında çalışanlar için bel destekli OSCAR koltuğunu geliştirmiştir. Ayrıca kendi tasarımı SİDE ve TORONTO modelleriyle uluslararası patent almış, Red Dot Design Award yarışmasına katılmıştır.
Kalite ve müşteri memnuniyetini ilke edinen SEMPRE; ürünlerini talebe özel ölçü ve renklerde, 2 yıl garantili olarak sunmaktadır. Tekzen’in tedarikçisi olan firma; Koç Holding, Hyundai, Aras Kargo gibi birçok kurumun tercihi olmuştur.
İstanbul Çağlayan ve Masko’daki mağazalarıyla hizmet veren SEMPRE, “Ürünü Ofisinde Dene” uygulamasıyla müşterilerine ofislerinde ürün deneyimi sunmaktadır. Ayrıca Nurus ofis sandalyelerinin anlaşmalı satış noktası olarak bu markayı ürün gamına katmıştır.
Her zaman yenilikçi, ergonomik ve kaliteli çözümler üreten Sempre Ofis Mobilyaları, bilgi birikimini gelecek nesillere aktarmaya devam etmektedir.

Sempre Mobilya, Ürün Gamına Nurus Ofis Sandalyelerini katarak Anlaşmalı Satış Noktası olarak hizmet vermeye başlamıştır.Çağlayan ve Masko Mağazalarımızda Nurus ürünlerini deneyimleyerek satın alma işlemi gerçekleştirebilirsiniz. Nurus Ürünleri stoklu olarak mağazalarımızda bulunmaktadır.

Name: Van Garderen Kantoormeubelen
Description:
Van Garderen Kantoormeubelen, dé complete kantoorinrichter!
Bij Van Garderen Kantoormeubelen weten we dat een goed ingericht kantoor het verschil maakt. Voor je productiviteit, voor je uitstraling én voor het werkplezier van je team. Daarom gaan wij een stapje verder. Wij denken mee, ontwerpen, leveren én monteren complete kantoorinrichtingen, van ontvangst tot werkplek, van vergaderruimte tot stiltezone. 
Onze kracht? Maatwerk, persoonlijk contact en een verrassend breed assortiment. Of het nu gaat om het creëren van een inspirerende werkplek voor een groeiend MKB-bedrijf of het volledig inrichten van een nieuwe vestiging van een grote organisatie: we zorgen dat alles klopt, functioneel, ergonomisch en esthetisch. Dankzij onze korte lijnen, service en eerlijke prijzen ontzorgen we onze klanten van A tot Z. 
Geen ingewikkelde processen, maar een duidelijke aanpak met één vast aanspreekpunt. Je kunt bij ons rekenen op advies waar je écht iets aan hebt, oplossingen die werken én een inrichting waar je trots op bent.

Name: Spek
Description:
Spek sources beautifully designed furniture with a real purpose. Built on a love for creating inspiring spaces, we’re a furniture supply company that’s all about being design-led, consultative, and committed to doing things ethically.

Furniture is as important to a practical environment as the air we breathe. What you put in a space defines its purpose, its functionality and its aesthetic appeal. That's why we get involved from the outset of your project to optimise value throughout the entire process. We spend time getting to know the project, understanding your needs and defining the key drivers for design, functionality, and sustainability. 

At Spek, sustainability is at the heart of everything we do because we believe that businesses have a responsibility to create positive change for both people and the planet. As an aspiring B Corp company, we're committed to the highest standards of social and environmental performance, accountability, and transparency. 

Our consultative approach means we listen carefully to your needs, provide regular updates, and stay flexible to any changes that may arise. By maintaining transparent communication at every stage – from concept and design to delivery and installation – we make sure your project runs seamlessly, delivering the right furniture solutions on time and on budget.

We’d love for you to join us as we set out to change what it means to supply furniture that’s not just beautiful, but also ethically made.

Contact us.

Telephone: +44 161 515 4228
Email: enquiries@spekfurniture.com

Dianof is a brand that combines quality, aesthetics, and functionality in office furniture, adding value to the professional world. Utilizamos materiales de primera calidad y técnicas artesanales combinadas con tecnología de vanguardia para asegurar acabados impecables en cada detalle en Barcelona. Nos esforzamos por ofrecer los mejores resultados y asegurar la plena satisfacción de nuestros clientes en cada etapa del proceso en Barcelona.

En UrbanStudioBcn, estamos comprometidos a no solo entregar proyectos excepcionales, sino también a construir relaciones duraderas basadas en confianza y calidad en Barcelona. Confía en nosotros para llevar tus ideas a la realidad de manera profesional.

Name: Weston International
Description:
We believe innovation, design integrity, and quality standards are most often driven by focused, design-led manufacturers. Weston International works with a carefully curated group of these partners, helping them build effective international market presence while supporting designers, dealers, and end users with reliable, well-executed solutions.

Our role is to connect exceptional manufacturing resources with real projects worldwide — providing the experience, structure, and coordination required to specify, adapt, deliver, and support products across regions and markets. We work alongside local partners and design teams to ensure solutions are thoughtfully tailored to cultural context, technical requirements, and long-term performance expectations.

What we do:
	•	Curate a diverse portfolio of high-quality furniture solutions across key market categories
	•	Enable access to differentiated products in the local markets where specifiers work
	•	Manage local, regional, and multi-market standards programs for corporate end users
	•	Build and support distribution systems that deliver consistent sales, service, and aftercare

Our focus is not on replacing designers or local expertise, but on strengthening the ecosystem — so better, longer-lasting spaces can be realized with clarity and confidence.

Nasza pasja do naturalnych materiałów i klasycznego designu przerodziła się w markę, która łączy tradycyjne rzemiosło z nowoczesną estetyką. Z litego drewna dębowego i orzecha amerykańskiego tworzymy meble, które zachwycają wyglądem, trwałością i funkcjonalnością. Dopełniamy je starannie dobranymi tkaninami oraz naturalnymi skórami, nadając każdemu projektowi wyjątkowy charakter.
W naszej pracowni precyzja rzemieślnika spotyka się z zaawansowaną technologią. Każdy mebel powstaje z dbałością o najmniejszy szczegół — od starannego wyboru drewna, przez zaawansowane procesy produkcyjne, aż po perfekcyjne wykończenie. Dzięki temu tworzymy coś więcej niż meble — tworzymy doświadczenie jakości.
Nasze kolekcje to ukłon w stronę tych, którzy cenią ponadczasowe piękno i naturalne materiały. To propozycja dla tych, którzy chcą wnieść do swojego wnętrza ciepło, styl i funkcjonalność w najlepszym wydaniu.

As a result we are today the largest and the most trusted pan India office furniture company and online store exclusively dedicated to creating contemporary work spaces.

Our dedicated and professional teams for delivery, fit outs and after sale service ensure that delivery and installation is carried out at your site in a smooth, seamless and hassle-free manner. Name: Kontor Konsult AS

Kontor Konsult AS leverer nye møbler til kontor, kantine, møterom og fellesområder. Vi importerer og leverer våre kontormøbler selv, slik at du som kunde unngår fordyrende mellomledd. Fritt levert og ferdig montert på sentrale Østlandet. Hos oss får du hjelp til å finne  gode løsninger for din bedrift. Med 3D tegninger av våre løsninger kan man lett visualisere nye, spennende lokaler.

Kontor Konsult har 3.000 m2 lager og kjøper inn i store kvanta for å kunne holde prisene nede. Vi omsatte i 2022 for 23 millioner og satser på framtidig vekst gjennom produkter av høy kvalitet, rask levering og høyt servicenivå.

Vi er 7 ansatte som elsker jobben vår og våre sjåfører sørger for at kontormøblene blir montert og satt der de skal – uten ekstra kostnad i Oslo, Akershus og Østfold.

Som medlem av Grønt Punkt betaler vi avgift for all emballasjen som vi importerer. Ved levering, tar vi med papp og plast tilbake for gjenvinning. Elektrisk avfall skal innleveres til godkjent mottak.

Våre leverandører har høy miljøprofil, så du kan være trygg på at alle produkter er godkjent og bærekraftige med lang levetid. Vi kan også levere deler til kontorstoler eller bare bytte bordplate der resten av produktet er OK. 

Vi har vært  Miljøfyrtårn siden 2017 og vi jobber kontinuerlig med HMS og miljøfremmende tiltak.

Kontor Konsult tar personvern på alvor. Alle kundeopplysninger som firmanavn, kontaktperson, telefon, adresse og epost blir registrert i Visma Global og brukes kun til historikk om vår handel. Vi utleverer ikke personopplysninger til tredjepart. Du har rett til å få vite hvilke opplysninger vi har lagret om deg og kan be om å få dem endret eller slettet.

Kom gjerne innom oss i Strykerveien 21 på Sellebakk, vi har åpent mandag – fredag fra 08.00-16.00.

Name: Re-use24
Description:
Think sustainably and be part of the solution. Not of the pollution. Vanuit deze gedachtengoed is Re-use24 opgericht. Wij zetten ons in voor een circulaire economie en duurzaamheid. Onze jarenlange ervaring binnen de kantoormeubelbranche stelt ons in staat om u hoogwaardige refurbished bureaustoelen aan te bieden. Re-used24 maakt bestaande bureaustoelen geschikt voor hergebruik en streeft naar meerdere levens voor deze stoelen.
Niet alleen richt Re-used24 zich op de verkoop van refurbished bureaustoelen, ook kopen wij gebruikte stoelen zelf in door bij onze klanten de "oude" stoelen mee te nemen. Ons doel is een milieuvriendelijke verwerking volgens het "Cradle2Cradle"  principe. Met andere woorden, na het eerste gebruik wordt een product opnieuw grondstof voor het volgende product. Re-use24 streeft naar maximale hergebruik van producten en grondstoffen en minimaliseren van waardevermindering in door een circulaire economie. Dit draagt bij aan CO2-reductie en het verminderen van het gebruik van fossiele grondstoffen.

Re-use24 reinigt en herstelt uw bureaustoelen grondig. Daar waar nodig worden de stoffering en het mechaniek vervangen.
Re-use24 heeft een eigen demontagelijn voor hoogwaardige recycling.
Onze stoelen worden efficiënt uitgeleverd via een eigen vervoerskanaal, waarvan een gedeelte elektrisch. 

Maatschappelijke betrokkenheid:
Ondersteuning van non-profitorganisaties, zoals Dorcas met geschikte zitmeubelen.
Leveringen aan hulporganisaties, zoals voor Oekraïense vluchtelingen.

Initially we have started with manufacturing a manual height adjustable desk for offices and work from home, which provides an affordable health solution with the best ergonomic solution.

Why should we use a height adjustable desk?
Your health is our top most priority.
In Darwin's theory of mankind evolution, a probable monkey-like species was our predecessor, which is always seen in standing posture in most of the old sculptures and drawings found in today’s era. It supports that humans are designed to live in mostly standing position. 
EISEN promises to provide and promote ergonomically designed comfortable workspaces to users, should be accessible to reach at the end segment of user. Study found that the workforce are spending 8 to 10 hours daily in the office in a sitting position. And while sitting in this position most of the time, people are not sitting in appropriate position i.e. Right angle in knee, taking lumber support, straightness of neck, eye vision angle, etc. Consistent sitting position causes stress in muscle, shoulder, neck, back pain, suffer spinal disc causes chronic pain. Small Coffee brakes eases the body to normal position so after a break in the cafeteria people feel fresh and more energetic.
So EISEN height adjustable stand provides committed simplicity while working. Another advantage of height adjustable desk is it provides sitting height variation as per variations in sitting heights of the workforce. Height adjustable desk are easy to operate, 

People who are enthusiastic to work with organizations want to be always motivated by providing them comfort so they can perform well, be productive and organized.

Ogni prodotto è il risultato di un approccio progettuale attento alla funzionalità, alla qualità dei materiali e all’estetica degli ambienti. Arredi che non si limitano a riempire uno spazio, ma lo valorizzano, lo rendono funzionale, accogliente, motivante.

Con Reswell Design, Vastarredo rinnova il suo impegno: creare ambienti in cui le persone possano vivere meglio, muoversi meglio, ritrovare equilibrio.
Perché il benessere non è un dettaglio. È una scelta di valore!

Name: DivisioneUfficio S.a.s.
Description:
DIVISIONE UFFICIO è un'azienda che da oltre 20 anni progetta uffici con l'obbiettivo primario di creare ambienti di lavoro funzionali e moderni. La collaborazione con i piu' importanti studi di Milano crea una sinergia che accompagna il cliente nelle scelte e da la garanzia del risultato.

SHOWROOM - Venite a visitare la nostra esposizione sapremo consigliarvi la soluzione migliore per le vostre esigenze.

PROGETTAZIONE - L'aspetto più importante quando si deve arredare un ufficio e' sicuramente la progettazione. L'ambiente che si viene a creare deve essere sicuramente funzionale, comodo ma soprattutto pensato per chi lo utilizzerà e per quali scopi. Il supporto alla progettazione è un servizio che Divisione Ufficio considera importante se non fondamentale. Creare un'area reception accogliente che diventi la vetrina della propria azienda, una sala riunioni che sappia accogliere in modo adeguato riunioni interne ma anche clienti e fornitori, postazioni di lavoro comode pensate e previste per chi lavora molte ore prevenendo e evitando gli sgradevoli problemi ortopedici dovuti a posture scorrette oppure un sistema di armadiature conforme alle proprie esigenze di archiviazione è il lavoro che quotidianamente facciamo per i nostri rivenditori. 	

CONTRACT - Il mondo dell'arredamento per ufficio per noi non si ferma alla sola fornitura di sedie, scrivanie e armadi. Parte integrante del nostro lavoro e' l'inserimento di elementi funzionali e di arredamento come pareti divisorie e attrezzate, controsoffitti, pavimenti galleggianti e rivestimenti in cartongesso che aumentano non solo la funzionalità dell'ambiente di lavoro ma anche la sua estetica.

RILIEVI - Un nostro tecnico eseguirà gratuitamente un sopralluogo presso i locali da arredare e insieme al progettista proporrà la soluzione più adatta alle esigenze del cliente.

MONTAGGIO E TRASLOCO - Parte integrate della fornitura è il servizio di montaggio degli arredi nuovi e l'eventuale trasloco di quelli vecchi.

Name: Officina Italia
Description:
Una tradizione di oltre 30 anni nel settore. 

Siamo un punto di riferimento per la progettazione e produzione di arredi su misura. La nostra missione è rispondere alle esigenze di un mercato sempre più attento alla qualità, al design e alla sostenibilità. Con un forte impegno verso l’innovazione, creiamo soluzioni che uniscono estetica, funzionalità e unicità, trasformando ogni idea in un progetto concreto.  

Il sogno del cliente al centro.

Realizziamo arredi unici, personalizzati e in grado di rispecchiare perfettamente i desideri di chi li sceglie. L’abilità artigianale dei nostri falegnami e l’approccio progettuale integrato ci permettono di seguire ogni fase del processo produttivo: dalla creazione dell’idea alla realizzazione del prodotto finale. Ogni pezzo è il risultato di una combinazione di passione, cura del dettaglio e attenzione al design, per creare spazi che emozionano.

Interventi edili
Adattiamo gli ambienti in cui inserire gli arredi, gestendo opere quali fori, tassellature, creazione di pareti leggere o controsoffitti, finiture, predisposizioni murarie e rifiniture finali, per garantire un risultato uniforme e professionale.

Impiantistica elettrica
Curiamo la realizzazione ex‑novo o l’adeguamento di impianti elettrici in sinergia con il montaggio degli arredi: predisposizione di prese, cablaggi nascosti, quadri elettrici dedicati e soluzioni di illuminazione integrate con gli elementi d’arredo.

Arredi personalizzati: forniamo soluzioni d'arredo ergonomiche e stilisticamente raffinate, su misura per le specificità di ogni realtà aziendale. Siamo convinti che l'arredo debba essere pratico, visivamente appagante e capace di rispecchiare l'identità della tua impresa.

Soluzioni per l'acustica: implementiamo sistemi fonoassorbenti e isolanti per creare ambienti di lavoro più tranquilli, favorendo così un incremento della produttività del personale.

Illuminazione su misura: progettiamo sistemi di illuminazione in grado la funzionalità dello spazio e il comfort visivo, contribuendo al benessere complessivo.

Decorazioni murali per uffici: per elevare l'immagine aziendale e la qualità dell'ambiente, proponiamo pareti verdi da interno, che uniscono estetica e funzionalità.

Name: Contrato Akustyka - Budki, sale akustyczne
Description:
Potrzebujesz komfortu w pracy? Poznaj Contrato.

Jesteśmy producentem mebli biurowych, ze szczególnym uwzględnieniem rozwiązań akustycznych: paneli akustycznych i budek telefonicznych. Przeprowadzamy analizę akustyczną pomieszczeń, aranżujemy biura ze sprzyjającą pracy akustyką.

Firma powstała z pasji, wiedzy i doświadczenia założycieli w tworzeniu pięknych i funkcjonalnych wnętrz. Pracujemy w Łodzi i Warszawie, tworząc meble dla biur, hoteli i sklepów oraz rozwiązania akustyczne poprawiające komfort pracowników.

Oferujemy spersonalizowane rozwiązania wyciszające, w tym panele wygłuszające oraz budki akustyczne, które pozwalają na utrzymanie ciszy w tych pomieszczeniach biurowych, w których jest szczególnie potrzebna.

Produkujemy nowoczesne meble biurowe, sklepowe i hotelowe dopasowane do projektu i potrzeb Klienta. A jeśli nie posiadasz jeszcze projektu swojego miejsca pracy – pomożemy Ci w jego stworzeniu.

W Contrato podchodzimy do rozwiązań akustycznych oraz aranżacji biur kompleksowo, wykorzystując olbrzymią wiedzę o potrzebach i oczekiwaniach klientów biznesowych oraz indywidualnych, a także dogłębną znajomość procesów projektowania, produkcji mebli oraz właściwości nowoczesnych materiałów. Doradzamy w zakresie współczesnych trendów kształtujących przestrzeń do życia i pracy.

Jesteśmy świadomi biznesowych potrzeb swoich Klientów, dzięki czemu do wymogów i oczekiwań przedsiębiorców podchodzimy elastycznie. Naszym celem jest tworzenie przestrzeni pięknych i funkcjonalnych, które zauważalnie zwiększają komfort życia i pracy.

Pracuj tak jak lubisz. Wybierz Contrato.

Name: DELITE HI TECH FURNITURE
Description:
Delite Hitech Furniture stands as a benchmark in intelligent, well-engineered furniture solutions—trusted by individuals, businesses, and institutions across a broad spectrum of industries. Founded in 1957, and backed by over 70 years of expertise, Delite Hitech has grown into one of India’s most respected names in furniture manufacturing, renowned for its design innovation, ergonomic excellence, and sustainability-driven philosophy.

At the heart of Delite Hitech’s operations is a steadfast commitment to responsible manufacturing and a visionary goal to become carbon negative. The company runs a cutting-edge, fully solar-powered facility spanning 300,000 square feet, underscoring its dedication to renewable energy and zero-waste practices. Each year, the facility produces over 50,000 chairs and 15,000 workstations, serving more than 20,000 customers with products designed for comfort, aesthetics, and lasting quality.

With a strong footprint across India, Delite Hitech offers comprehensive, end-to-end workspace and furniture solutions tailored to the evolving needs of modern enterprises. From large-scale, multi-location projects to customized office environments, the company consistently upholds its core values of quality, customer satisfaction, and environmental responsibility.

Combining cutting-edge design with precision engineering, Delite Hitech creates ergonomic furniture that enhances wellness, increases productivity, and elevates the workplace experience. Its integrated project management ensures seamless execution at every stage—guided by attention to detail, timelines, and client objectives.

As workspaces continue to transform, Delite Hitech Furniture remains at the forefront—reimagining how people work, collaborate, and thrive. Through constant innovation, sustainable practices, and a customer-centric approach, Delite Hitech continues to shape the future of intelligent workspace design in India.

Łączymy metal, szkło, drewno i tapicerkę w spójne systemy, które spełniają najwyższe standardy jakościowe i estetyczne. Nasze doświadczenie obejmuje realizacje dla największych marek motoryzacyjnych w Europie (m.in. Niemcy, Austria, Hiszpania, Włochy).

Co robimy:
	•	Metalowe konstrukcje i zabudowy – precyzyjne, trwałe, zgodne z wymaganiami inwestora
	•	Elementy szklane – cięcie, obróbka, montaż, pełne bezpieczeństwo i logistyka
	•	Meble tapicerowane i drewniane – od projektu po realizację “pod klucz”
	•	Kompleksowe wyposażenie salonów i showroomów – od koncepcji po montaż
	•	Serwis i jakość – obsługa reklamacji, naprawy, serwis mobilny w całej Europie

Dlaczego my:
	•	Doświadczenie międzynarodowe – projekty w całej UE
	•	Precyzja i terminowość – własne standardy kontroli jakości
	•	Elastyczność – dopasowujemy się do wymagań klienta i projektu
	•	Partnerstwo – działamy długofalowo, nie jednorazowo

 Skontaktuj się z nami, jeśli szukasz partnera do realizacji projektu retail lub automotive w Europie.

Name: Texas Furniture Solutions
Description:
Most people don't know where to start when they need to furnish an office. That is where Texas Furniture Solutions can help. We make it easy and affordable. Where do people start - Google, however, this get you an unlimited supply of websites that let you "shop" for office furniture by looking at endless lists of individual pieces of office furniture. This is a daunting task that does not put you any closer to knowing what furniture you should buy to outfit your office. In addition, you have no idea how the conference chair you "selected" might go with the conference room table that you "selected" on a separate page of the website.

Texas Furniture Solutions was designed to address this problem for people. When you go to our website, you will see that there are no lists and no categories of furniture. Instead we have curated furniture styles for you. Most of the pictures are of fully furnished rooms so that you can see what the total room would look like. We have created a very simple process to help you find the office furniture that will make your new (or renovated) space a functional, inspirational, and exciting place for employees to come to work. Saving you time and money in the process. Reach out to us to discover how we make this happen.

Our History
The story of Helios starts with two existing millwork companies searching for someone to help them automate their work. They were aware of many automated material handling and packaging systems, and were even savvy with the capabilities and limitations of CNC machines and laser cutters. And despite years of exploring different options with different companies, and even making a few large purchases they seemed no closer to a solution than they were. Until one fateful morning.

On January 15th, 2019 a man called one of the millwork companies looking for a custom piece to be built based on a design from his friend, an artist. The piece was so interesting it got the millworker talking to the man about other possibilities and eventually it was revealed that the man designed robotics and a several hour long conversation ensued with plans to fully automate part of the workshop over the next few years.

A few months and a few lawyers later, in late 2019, Helios Millwork Corporation was founded. From our fully hand crafted one of a kind pieces to our affordable economy line utilizing automated fabrication, our wide range of products can fit most tastes and all budgets.

Name: Macphersons Office Furniture
Description:
Welcome to Macphersons Office Furniture
For 40+ years we have manufactured and designed a comprehensive range of business office furniture for call centres, restaurants, hospitals, hotels, guest houses, warehouse and factory environments, throughout South Africa.

Functionality Meets Perfection
Macphersons was founded in 1982 by the present CEO and owner, Billy Macpherson. We are one of the largest leading, independent office furniture manufacturers and suppliers in the country. We have over 85 independent dealer networks countrywide, including Namibia, Botswana, Malawi, Mozambique, Lesotho and Swaziland. Our newly owned and invested plant of 3500m², includes the latest machinery based on international standards. With our well trained and dedicated staff and installation teams, we are able to handle all size projects. With fine craftsmanship and pride, we blend outstanding quality and dedication in manufacturing with cutting edge trends in technology, aesthetics and function. Our wide range varies from executive style to customised office and boardroom furniture, open plan modular systems, storage, coffee bars, receptions and training areas. Wood finishes include veneers, solids, laminates, Formica and Melamine’s. The projects department assists with floor plans, CAD 3D drawings, colour coordination as well as full turnkey projects. Our Sales Consultants are well experienced and trained to handle the design and improving the office space.
Amongst our machinery, we have 3 CNC Nesting machines, a 3 Axis point to point CNC Machine, a CNC Beam Saw and state of the art edge benders which include straight edging and contour machinery. All our solid woods are machined on our CNC controlled spindle moulders and our 5 spray booths are state of the art and vacuum sealed to prevent dust. Deadline focused deliveries of orders are assured through our national network.

Name: Mobil Office Furniture
Description:
Mobil Office Furniture is an Italian company specialized in the production of office furniture for both executive and operational offices. It also offers solutions for space division and turnkey projects aimed at both public and private organizations, operating in Italy and abroad. The proposed solutions are designed to improve the quality of work environments, complying with safety and comfort regulations, while offering a wide range of customization options in terms of finishes and colors. In this way, the company creates pleasant, dynamic, and functional workspaces. 

Founded in the 1950s by brothers Mario and Antonio Spagnol, the company started as a small craft business in the wood district. The passion for craftsmanship and the know-how acquired led the founders to create tailor-made furniture pieces, achieving great success that led to the expansion of the business. Today, Mobil Office Furniture is part of SCL&B Srl and has a 15,000-square-meter facility. The company specializes in the design and production of office furniture, with a particular focus on ergonomics and environmental sustainability. With an international presence, it offers modern and functional furniture solutions distributed worldwide.

Mobil Office Furniture is also active in the CONTRACT sector, with experience in designing and producing furniture for offices, companies, and hotels. The services offered include consulting, customer assistance, design, logistics, installation, and after-sales support. All products are designed and manufactured entirely in Italy, ensuring high-quality standards. The company is committed to being eco-sustainable, promoting environmentally friendly practices such as waste reduction and recycling, contributing to the protection of the planet.

Name: Chi Concept
Description:
Chi Concept specializes in ergonomic, modern, and environmentally friendly products. Chi Concept’s main objective is to provide furniture that not only looks good but also supports the dynamic and collaborative nature of today’s workplaces.

One of the business objectives of Chi Concept is specializing in ergonomic, modern, and environmentally friendly products is to establish itself as a leading provider of high-quality, innovative office solutions that enhance workplace productivity, employee well-being, and sustainability.

By focusing on ergonomics, the company ensures that its products not only meet but exceed industry standards for comfort and health, helping businesses reduce the risk of workplace injuries and improve employee satisfaction and performance.

In addition to ergonomics, Chi Concept prioritizes modern design, understanding that the aesthetic appeal of office furniture plays a crucial role in shaping the corporate identity and environment. By offering sleek, contemporary designs that complement various office spaces, Chi Concept caters to businesses looking to create inspiring and functional workspaces that reflect their brand values and culture.

Environmental sustainability is another cornerstone of the company’s business objectives. Recognizing the growing importance of eco-friendly practices, Chi Concept is committed to sourcing materials responsibly, minimizing waste, and reducing the environmental impact of its products. This commitment extends to offering acoustic furniture that is durable, recyclable, and made from sustainable materials.

By doing so, Chi Concept aligns itself with the global push towards sustainability, appealing to businesses that prioritize corporate social responsibility and seek to reduce their carbon footprint.

W naszej ofercie znajdą Państwo różnego rodzaju meble metalowe, wykonane z materiałów najwyższej jakości, co gwarantuje ich trwałość i wytrzymałość na długi okres użytkowania. Nasze meble są starannie zaprojektowane i wykonane z dbałością o każdy szczegół, co zapewnia nie tylko ich funkcjonalność, ale również estetyczny wygląd.

Dzięki wieloletniemu doświadczeniu w produkcji mebli metalowych i zgranej ekipie doświadczonych specjalistów, jesteśmy w stanie sprostać oczekiwaniom nawet najbardziej wymagających klientów. Oferujemy także możliwość realizacji indywidualnych zamówień, co pozwala na dostosowanie mebli do specyficznych potrzeb i wymagań.

Współpraca z nami to gwarancja satysfakcji z zakupionych mebli oraz profesjonalnej obsługi na każdym etapie realizacji zamówienia.

Tutti questi prodotti vengono utilizzati dai progettisti per soddisfare le esigenze del Committente, le cui idee vengono realizzate su misura progetto dopo progetto in maniera unica. 
Ricerca e innovazione sono le fondamenta della Società, che grazie ad un elevato livello tecnologico e produttivo sono in grado di valorizzare gli investimenti della clientela dando prodotti di elevata qualità e durabilità nel tempo.

Name: Geschwender Interiors Ltd.
Description:
The name Geschwender is known throughout the world as the leading manufacturer of offshore accommodation furniture, specialising in offshore bunk and offshore cabin furniture. The strength, durability and ability to withstand fire and water ingress has set our product’s special High Pressure Laminate Compact (HPL-Compact) material apart from all competitors, allowing us to provide our clients with IMO furniture, NORSOK furniture and marine furniture that has a guarantee of 10 years and a life expectancy of 30-40 years!

No better example of our product’s strength is our Pullman bunk; completely self-supporting with no structural wall reinforcing required, allowing it to be retro-fitted to any cabin new or existing.

Our innovative swivel bunk / rotating bunk which revolves within its footprint revolutionised offshore accommodation design and immediately provided our clients with the potential to increase their Person On Board (POB) numbers by 50%. 

What is less known is our onshore capabilities; furnishing a wide range of sectors such as medical and laboratory, sport, leisure, education and student accommodation with the same requirements of high quality products that are aesthetically pleasing and functional, but also stand up to the punishment of daily use.

With project and asset operation and maintenance budgets continuing to lower, our product provides peace of mind that you install it once and never have to think of it again.

DP Design è il punto di riferimento per l'arredamento di prestigio per Uffici e Contract, con oltre 30 anni di esperienza nel settore. La nostra missione è creare spazi di lavoro e hospitality che ispirino e facilitino il benessere, il comfort e l’efficienza delle persone che li vivono. Offriamo un servizio completo, dalla consulenza alla progettazione, dal montaggio fino al post-vendita, garantendo una cura dei dettagli che ci distingue nel settore.

Scegli DP Design per arredare il tuo ufficio o il tuo spazio contract con soluzioni che trasformano ogni ambiente in un'esperienza unica.

Name: Curvik
Description:
Curvik provides a unique concept where customers can fully customize their furniture. You can choose the shape, dimensions, colors, and even print logos or pictures on the furniture. There are also 60 pre-made models designed by Curvik’s team which can be ordered online or used as inspiration for creating your custom pieces.

Curvik offers a variety of furniture types including shelves, desks, cabinets, and lockers. Each piece is designed to be both functional and aesthetically pleasing, suitable for modern interiors and professional environments.

The furniture is made from high-quality materials like HPL (High-Pressure Laminate) and anodized aluminum. These materials are known for their durability, resistance to dents, scratches, and chemicals, and are suitable for damp environments such as bathrooms and locker rooms. Additionally, they are environmentally friendly and easy to clean.

Curvik’s lockers are fully customizable, making them ideal for changing rooms and storage in offices, public buildings, sports and cultural facilities, and schools. Customers can choose the dimensions, colors, and even add decorative LED lighting. The lockers are made from recycled anodized aluminum and solid HPL, ensuring they are durable and sustainable.

One of the notable features of Curvik’s furniture is its easy assembly. The pieces can be constructed using just an Allen key, making them ideal for scenarios requiring frequent assembly and disassembly, such as trade shows and events.

Curvik combines innovative design, functionality, and sustainability to create furniture that fits both personal and professional spaces. If you need more specific information or have a particular project in mind, you can explore their offerings and contact them through their website.

In addition, they also offer lift tables that allow the height of the work surface to be adjusted, contributing to a healthier and more productive working environment.

As a family-owned company, Ergoles pays special attention to its relationships with customers and partners. They are committed to sustainable development and responsible business, which includes the use of environmentally friendly materials and processes in production. Their vision is to remain the market leader in office furniture, with a focus on innovation, quality and customer satisfaction.


Today, Ergoles works with a wide range of companies, public institutions and individuals who value their commitment to excellence. The company boasts a long tradition, a wealth of experience and many satisfied customers, which confirms their reputation as a reliable and innovative office furniture manufacturer.

Şirketimizde, modern ve ergonomik ofis mobilyaları tasarımında uzman ekibimiz tarafından özenle seçilen ofis masaları, ofis dolapları ve ofis bölme sistemleri gibi ürünler sunuyoruz. Ürünlerimiz arasında yönetici koltuklarından çalışma koltuklarına kadar çeşitli ofis sandalyeleri bulunmaktadır. Ergonomik ve rahat tasarımlarımız, çalışanlarınızın iş verimliliğini artırırken konforunu da sağlayacak şekilde dizayn edilmiştir.

Dorem Ofis Mobilyaları olarak, ofis mobilyası satışı konusunda uzman ekibimizle size en iyi hizmeti sunmak için çalışıyoruz. Sizlere en uygun ofis mobilyalarını seçerken, ofisinizin gereksinimlerini ve tarzını göz önünde bulunduruyoruz.

Name: IntelliOpus Engineering * HERSTAR
Description:
HERSTAR was founded in 2021 under the leadership of Ms. Caixia Liu. Backed by two decades of industrial expertise from Suzhou Hengsheng Machinery Co., Ltd.—a precision machining company established in 2002—HERSTAR was built on a solid foundation of engineering excellence and innovation.

With a deeply rooted engineering culture, our experienced team applies rigorous standards and technical precision to every product. This commitment enables our clients—leading adjustable desk manufacturers—to achieve return rates as low as 0.1%, reflecting the stability and consistency our lifting systems bring to their product lines.

In 2024, we expanded our global footprint by establishing Intelli-Opus Engineering in the United States. This subsidiary focuses on advanced R&D and regional sales, including the development of intelligent lifting control systems that can sense user behavior and provide smarter, more responsive workspace solutions.

Our design team, composed of talent from Northeastern University, blends engineering precision with human-centered thinking—helping furniture manufacturers deliver modern, health-focused, and aesthetically refined office solutions.

 

Today, HERSTAR is more than a supplier—we are your innovation partner, committed to shaping the future of intelligent, healthy, and reliable work environments.

Name: Guangdong Starroad Furniture Co., ltd.
Description:
STARROAD SEATING is a professional manufacturer specializing in public seating and integrated furniture solutions. With nearly three decades of industry focus, we support projects worldwide with reliable, human-centered seating designed for high-use public environments.

We operate a vertically integrated production base covering mold development, injection molding, woodworking, metal fabrication, bentwood processing, upholstery, and final assembly. This full-process manufacturing capability allows us to maintain strict quality control, stable lead times, and flexible customization for diverse project requirements.

Our product portfolio includes cinema seating, healthcare furniture, education furniture, hospitality and dining furniture, office furniture, and public waiting seating. Every product is developed with a balance of ergonomic comfort, structural performance, and spatial aesthetics, ensuring durability, safety, and long-term value.

To date, STARROAD SEATING has successfully delivered over 5,000 projects, with products exported to more than 160 countries and regions and implemented across 30+ major cities in China. We work closely with contractors, architects, developers, and institutional clients to provide seating solutions that are practical, efficient, and built to last.

From concept to delivery, STARROAD SEATING is committed to supporting every project with professional manufacturing, responsive service, and dependable execution — helping shape public spaces where people gather, work, and connect.

Featured Products & Services
* Cinema Seating & Theater Chairs
* Healthcare & Medical Furniture
* Education & Campus Furniture
* Hospitality & Dining Furniture
* Office Furniture & Public Waiting Seating

Наші напрямки:
Виробництво та монтаж торгівельного обладнання для продуктових мереж та аптек
Будівельно-ремонтні роботи – повне оснащення торгових точок "під ключ"
Електромонтажні роботи – проведення електрики, підключення інверторів
Власна логістика – маємо власний автопарк вантажних і легкових автомобілів, працюємо по всій Україні

Наші клієнти
 Продуктові мережі:
- Файно Маркет (VARTO)
- АТБ
- Денер та М’ясомаркет (роздрібна мережа МХП, Наша Ряба)
- Копілка

Аптечні мережі:
- Подорожник 
- Бажаємо Здоров’я 

Наші виробничі потужності
- Технічний відділ – розробка проєктів, 3D-візуалізація, підготовка технічної документації
- ЧПУ-цех – фрезерна обробка (включаючи метал, камінь, поворотну вісь)
- Цех обробки листового металу – лазерне різання, гнуття
- Зварювальний цех – зварювання напівавтоматичними апаратами, аргонне зварювання (нержавіюча сталь, алюміній), шліфування
- Цех обробки плитних матеріалів – ЛДСП, фанера, композитні матеріали, пластик (розкрій, автоматична лінія кромкування)
- Малярний цех – фарбування та покриття різних матеріалів
- Столярний цех – обробка натуральної деревини (від необрізної дошки до готового виробу)
- Власна логістика – маємо вантажний автопарк, що забезпечує оперативну доставку по всій Україні

Чому обирають нас?
Досвід – багаторічний досвід роботи з великими мережами
Гарантія якості – міцні та зносостійкі матеріали, що витримують інтенсивну експлуатацію
Дотримання термінів – швидка розробка, виготовлення та монтаж
Гнучкість під кожного клієнта – адаптуємо рішення під індивід

Name: Sintaka Direct
Description:
Kdo jsme?
Jsme zastupující partneři osvědčených, především českých, výrobců kancelářského nábytku a židlí.

Co děláme?
Navrhujeme a dodáváme moderní kancelářské a bytové interiéry, které jsou navrženy tak, aby se v nich každý cítil pohodlně a příjemně.

Proč zvolit právě nás?
Profesionálové se zkušenostmi: Máme bohaté zkušenosti v oboru a přinášíme osvědčená řešení.

Individuální přístup: Nabízíme řešení pro každý interiér a nebojíme se realizovat vaše nejnáročnější představy.

Široká nabídka: Poskytujeme široký sortiment nábytku a doplňků.
Osobní péče: Jsme připraveni věnovat vám tolik času, kolik bude potřeba.

Zdravé sezení: Pomůžeme vám s výběrem správné židle a naučíme vás zásady zdravého sezení.

Pohodlí na prvním místě: Přijedeme za vámi domů nebo do kanceláře.
Vzorková prodejna: Většinu našeho sortimentu si můžete odzkoušet přímo v naší vzorkové prodejně.

Kde realizujeme?
Působíme především v Moravskoslezském, Olomouckém a Zlínském kraji a jejich okolí. Neomezujeme se však pouze na tyto oblasti a rádi realizujeme projekty i mimo tuto vytyčenou hranici.

Name: Ohana Inu
Description:
Polski
Ohana Inu to manufaktura specjalizująca się w tworzeniu luksusowych mebli biurowych i dekoracji wnętrz z litego drewna oraz naturalnego mchu. Nasze projekty są dedykowane przestrzeniom biznesowym premium – biurom, lobby, recepcjom i open space.

Każdy mebel i dekoracja powstaje na indywidualne zamówienie – sam decydujesz o wielkości, kształcie czy kolorystyce. Dzięki temu powstają unikatowe realizacje, których nie znajdziesz nigdzie indziej. To sprawia, że Twoje biuro staje się wyjątkowe i podkreśla prestiż firmy.

Oferujemy stoliki kawowe, stoły konferencyjne, panele akustyczne i dekoracje ścienne, które łączą elegancję, naturalne materiały i precyzję ręcznego wykonania. Naszą misją jest tworzenie wnętrz, które wyróżniają się stylem, a jednocześnie wnoszą harmonię i ponadczasowy charakter do przestrzeni pracy.

 Deutsch
Ohana Inu ist eine Manufaktur, die sich auf luxuriöse Büromöbel und Interior-Dekorationen aus Massivholz und natürlichem Moos spezialisiert. Unsere Projekte richten sich an Premium-Geschäftsräume – Büros, Lobbys, Empfangsbereiche und Open Spaces.

Jedes Möbelstück und jede Dekoration entsteht als Einzelanfertigung – Sie entscheiden über Größe, Form und Farbgestaltung. So entstehen einzigartige Werke, die es nur einmal gibt. Damit erhält Ihr Büro einen unverwechselbaren Charakter und Ihre Firma gewinnt an Prestige.

Wir bieten Couchtische, Konferenztische, Akustikpaneele und Wanddekorationen, die Eleganz, natürliche Materialien und handwerkliche Präzision verbinden. Unsere Mission ist es, Räume zu schaffen, die außergewöhnlich sind und zugleich Harmonie sowie zeitlose Ästhetik in die Arbeitswelt bringen.

לאחרונה רכשנו נגריית אומן וביצענו מיזוג עם מסגריית נפחות ונגריית ריהוט סטנדרטי. מיזוג זה מעניק לנו את הגמישות והיכולת לעצב וליצור קשת רחבה מאוד של פריטי ריהוט משרדי בהתאמה אישית מלאה בכל גודל, גוון, כמות וחומר, על-פי דרישת הלקוח, המעצב או האדריכל. וזאת, תוך הקפדה בלתי מתפשרת על תכנון פונקציונלי, איכות החומרים, רמות גימור גבוהות, עיצוב מוצר עם חשיבה מחוץ לקופסא ונוחות המשתמש. 

Re-Design - מעצבים ומתכננים לך את המשרד
במקביל, אנחנו, רי-דיזיין משווקים: שולחנות מתכווננים, זרועות מסך, תעלות וקופסאות תקשורת, מבחר גדול מאוד של כיסאות מנהלים, כיסאות עובדים, כיסאות אורח וחדרי ישיבות, צמחיה מלאכותית, אקססוריז, פינות וספות המתנה המיוצרים ומיובאים ממיטב היצרנים בעולם. אנו ערוכים לספק פריטי ריהוט בכמויות קטנות וגדולות כאחד, וזאת בזמני אספקה ובמחירים ללא תחרות. השירות שלנו מותאם עבור עסקים פרטיים, קטנים וגדולים כאחד, מוסדות, חברות וארגונים. רכישה מרוכזת של ריהוט משרדי בהתאמה אישית, תבטיח לכם כמובן מחירים אטרקטיביים תוך עמידה בלוחות זמנים קצרים. 
עוברים למשרד חדש או שהגיע הזמן לרענן את המשרד הקיים? אתם מוזמנים ליצור עמנו קשר, אנו נשמח להגיע אליכם לשמוע ולהבין מהם הצרכים והחלומות שלכם, להביא את הניסיון, הידע הרחב והיכולות שלנו, על מנת לענות ולהגשים את חלומותיכם ועדיין לשמור ולהישאר במסגרת התקציבית אותה קבעתם. אתם מוזמנים כמובן לבקר באתר ולהתרשם מהעיצובים, היכולות, המקצועיות והמעוף.

Name: 2ECO Projects
Description:
2ECO Projects is een dochteronderneming van 2ECO BV (opkoop en veilingen) en zusterbedrijf van 2ECO Sales (verkoop aan particulieren en KMO's) en fungeert als een platform voor projectontwikkelaars, ontwerpbureaus en architecten om projecten op te zetten met volledig verantwoord 2de hands, refurbished en circulair meubilair zonder te moeten toegeven aan looks of kwaliteit. 

We nemen ook graag uw wensen voor uw kantoor of werkruimte in overweging en helpen u de stap te zetten naar een volledig verantwoorde circulaire inrichting, en dat alles voor slechts een derde van de nieuwprijs! Wij werken steeds met topkwaliteit kantoormeubilair van A-merken zoals BULO, Ahrend, Vitra, Kinnarps, NNOF, Steelcase, Wilkhahn en kunnen binnen elk budget een oplossing bieden.

Ons meubilair is afkomstig van ons moederbedrijf, 2ECO, dat actief op zoek gaat naar oplossingen voor overstocks, kantoormeubilair, IT materiaal, horecamateriaal en andere overgebleven goederen bij verhuizingen en overnames. Deze goederen werden vroeger vaak afgedankt of onterecht als stuk of onbruikbaar bestempeld en op de container gegooid, terwijl ze vaak nog een tweede leven kunnen krijgen bij particulieren, KMO's, scholen, enzovoort. Bij 2ECO worden deze goederen zorgvuldig geselecteerd op hergebruiksmogelijkheden en vervolgens aan onze klanten aangeboden via 2ECO, 2ECO Sales en 2ECO Projects. 

Deze pagina biedt een gestructureerde manier voor grotere projecten om tweedehands meubilair tegen concurrerende prijzen aan te schaffen en zo bij te dragen aan het verminderen van de afvalberg en het bevorderen van volledige circulariteit binnen het bedrijfsleven.

Bent u als particulier of KMO op zoek naar tweedehands kantoormeubilair dan kan u terecht bij ons dochterbedrijf 2ECO Sales (www.2ecosales.be). Bent u op zoek naar een opkoper voor uw kantoormeubilair, bekijk dan ons moederbedrijf 2ECO (www.2eco.be)

Name: Mstyle
Description:
La nostra storia inizia nel 1999 con la creazione della società Mael srl, ma affonda le sue radici ancora più indietro nel tempo, nella tradizione del “triangolo della sedia”: un distretto produttivo unico al mondo, nel cuore del Friuli, punto d’incontro fra le diverse anime dell’Europa. In questo territorio ricco di storia e di natura, la migliore tradizione italiana del legno e dell’arredo si fondono con la cultura contemporanea del progetto, in una sintesi di cura sartoriale per i dettagli e ricerca continua di nuove tecnologie e materiali.

Nello stabilimento Mael prende forma la collezione Mstyle: un brand di sedute per l’ufficio e gli spazi collettivi che nasce per dare una risposta concreta e vincente alle esigenze dei clienti. Nei prodotti Mstyle il design non è fine a se stesso, ma un valore aggiunto, insieme alla funzionalità e all’ergonomia: per lavorare meglio, concentrarsi sui propri obiettivi e raggiungere sempre nuovi successi, in un ambiente tanto piacevole quanto efficiente.
